items.title: Study Finds Laparoscopic Sacrocolpopexy Improves Incontinence and Anterior Vaginal Defects
items.summary: A study found that laparoscopic sacrocolpopexy improves incontinence and anterior vaginal defects in women with pelvic organ prolapse and stress urinary incontinence.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提示腹腔镜骶骨阴道固定术（LSCP）能改善盆腔器官脱垂患者的尿失禁和阴道前壁缺陷。在管理这类患者时，这为您评估手术干预效果提供了参考。
items.titleZh: 研究发现腹腔镜骶骨阴道固定术可改善尿失禁和阴道前壁缺陷
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，腹腔镜骶骨阴道固定术能改善盆腔器官脱垂和压力性尿失禁女性的尿失禁和阴道前壁缺陷。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that laparoscopic sacrocolpopexy (LSCP) improves incontinence and anterior vaginal defects in patients with pelvic organ prolapse. This provides a reference for evaluating the effectiveness of surgical interventions when managing these patients.
items.limitation: 研究设计未明确，可能为观察性研究。
items.limitationEn: Study design not clearly specified, likely an observational study.

items.title: Patient-Controlled ESPB Offers Safe, Effective Alternative to Epidural Analgesia, finds study
items.summary: A new randomized trial suggests that patient-controlled lumbar erector spinae plane block (ESPB) offers a safe and effective alternative to patient-controlled epidural analgesia (PCEA) for pain after femur fracture surgery.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 提示患者自控竖脊肌平面阻滞（ESPB）可能是股骨骨折术后镇痛的有效替代方案，特别是当硬膜外镇痛不适用时。在术后疼痛管理中，您可以考虑这一选项。
items.titleZh: 研究发现患者自控竖脊肌平面阻滞是硬膜外镇痛的安全有效替代方案
items.summaryZh: 一项新的随机试验表明，患者自控腰部竖脊肌平面阻滞（ESPB）是股骨骨折术后镇痛中患者自控硬膜外镇痛（PCEA）的安全有效替代方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that patient-controlled erector spinae plane block (ESPB) may be an effective alternative for postoperative analgesia following femur fracture surgery, especially when epidural analgesia is not suitable. You might consider this option in postoperative pain management.
items.limitation: 虽然是 RCT，但需关注样本量和长期结局。
items.limitationEn: Although an RCT, sample size and long-term outcomes need to be considered.

items.title: All-endoscopic autologous suspension fixation achieves satisfactory outcomes in chronic Achilles tendon ruptures: study
items.summary: A study found that all-endoscopic autologous suspension fixation achieves satisfactory outcomes in chronic Achilles tendon ruptures.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究显示，全内窥镜自体悬吊固定术在慢性跟腱断裂中取得了满意效果。在评估患者手术方案时，您可以将此作为一种潜在的选择。
items.titleZh: 研究：全内窥镜自体悬吊固定术在慢性跟腱断裂中取得满意效果
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，全内窥镜自体悬吊固定术在慢性跟腱断裂中取得了满意效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study shows that all-endoscopic autologous suspension fixation yields satisfactory outcomes in chronic Achilles tendon ruptures. You can consider this as a potential option when evaluating surgical plans for patients.
items.limitation: 新闻报道未提供详细研究设计和样本量，可能为观察性研究。
items.limitationEn: News report does not provide detailed study design or sample size; likely an observational study.

items.title: High Prevalence of Visual Defects in Children with Cerebral Palsy, Suggests Study
items.summary: A cross-sectional study revealed a 73.3% prevalence of visual defects closely correlated with severe neuroimaging changes in pediatric cerebral palsy patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项横断面研究强调了脑瘫儿童视力缺陷的高患病率，并与神经影像学改变密切相关。这提示您在评估脑瘫儿童时，应将视力筛查和早期干预纳入常规考量。
items.titleZh: 研究表明脑瘫儿童视力缺陷患病率高
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究显示，小儿脑瘫患者中视力缺陷的患病率高达 73.3%，且与严重的神经影像学改变密切相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study highlights the high prevalence of visual defects in children with cerebral palsy, closely correlating with neuroimaging changes. This suggests that you should include vision screening and early intervention as routine considerations when assessing children with cerebral palsy.
items.limitation: 横断面研究无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: Cross-sectional study cannot establish causality.

items.title: This is a protocol for a patient-oriented, mixed-methods study to explore preferences, barriers, and facilitat…
items.summary: This is a protocol for a patient-oriented, mixed-methods study to explore preferences, barriers, and facilitators regarding virtual pelvic healthcare in individuals with gynecological cancers.
items.curatedReason: 这份研究方案关注妇科癌症患者对虚拟盆腔医疗服务的偏好和障碍。它可能揭示远程医疗在盆腔康复领域的潜在作用和挑战。
items.titleZh: 妇科癌症患者虚拟盆腔医疗服务的偏好、障碍和促进因素：一项以患者为导向的混合方法研究方案
items.summaryZh: 这项研究方案旨在于采用以患者为导向的混合方法，探讨妇科癌症患者对虚拟盆腔医疗服务的偏好、障碍和促进因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study protocol focuses on preferences and barriers to virtual pelvic healthcare for gynecological cancer patients. It may reveal the potential role and challenges of telehealth in pelvic rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究为协议，尚未发布最终结果。
items.limitationEn: This is a study protocol; final results are not yet published.

items.title: Patient Engagement, Clinical Outcomes, and Satisfaction of an Advanced Orthopedic Virtual Physical Therapy Model: A Retrospective Cohort Study.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study found that an advanced orthopedic virtual physical therapy model achieved 70.9% completion rates—exceeding national benchmarks (43%)—and 96% of completers achieved Minimal Clinically Important Differences in outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 远程物理治疗在骨科康复中展现了超越传统模式的潜力，特别是其在依从性和功能改善方面的优势。这项研究强调了远程 PT 模型的可行性与高效性，为你将虚拟护理整合到日常实践中提供了强有力的数据支持。
items.titleZh: 先进骨科远程物理治疗模型：患者依从性、临床结局与满意度的回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究显示，一种先进的骨科远程物理治疗模型达到了 70.9% 的治疗完成率，超过全国基准（43%），且 96% 的完成者达到了最小临床重要差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Virtual physical therapy shows potential to surpass traditional models in orthopedic rehabilitation, particularly in adherence and functional improvement. This study highlights the feasibility and efficiency of virtual PT models, providing strong data to support integrating virtual care into your daily practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，且缺乏对照组，无法排除混杂因素对结果的影响。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective cohort study lacks a control group, making it unable to rule out confounding factors influencing the results.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Effects of physical exercise on spasticity in people with multiple sclerosis: A systematic review.
items.summary: This systematic review analyzed the effectiveness of different physical exercise interventions on spasticity in people with multiple sclerosis (EDSS ≤6.0), confirming its positive influence.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述确认了体育锻炼对多发性硬化症患者痉挛的积极影响。在你的临床实践中，可将不同形式的运动作为非药物干预的首选，以改善患者生活质量。
items.titleZh: 体育锻炼对多发性硬化症患者痉挛影响的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述分析了不同体育锻炼干预措施对EDSS评分≤6.0的多发性硬化症患者痉挛的影响，证实了其积极作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review confirms the positive impact of physical exercise on spasticity in people with multiple sclerosis. In your clinical practice, you can prioritize various forms of exercise as non-pharmacological interventions to improve patients' quality of life.
items.limitation: 纳入的RCT研究可能存在异质性，且各运动干预方案的细节差异较大。
items.limitationEn: Included RCTs may have heterogeneity, and detailed exercise intervention protocols varied considerably.

items.title: GaitEncoder: A Foundation Model of Gait Kinematics for Diverse Clinical Applications and Pathologies
items.summary: GaitEncoder is a generative foundation model of walking kinematics for diverse clinical applications and pathologies, enabling actionable insights from smartphone video-based gait analysis using eight aggregated gait datasets.
items.curatedReason: GaitEncoder作为基于智能手机视频的步态运动学基础模型，展示了其在多种临床应用和病理学中的潜力。这可能预示着未来移动端步态分析在个性化康复治疗中的广泛应用，值得你密切关注。
items.titleZh: GaitEncoder：一个用于多种临床应用和病理的步态运动学基础模型
items.titleEn: GaitEncoder: A Foundation Model of Gait Kinematics for Diverse Clinical Applications and Pathologies
items.summaryZh: GaitEncoder是一个生成式步态运动学基础模型，通过聚合八个步态数据集，利用智能手机视频步态分析，为多种临床应用和病理学提供可操作的见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: GaitEncoder, as a smartphone video-based gait kinematics foundation model, demonstrates its potential across diverse clinical applications and pathologies. This may signal the widespread future use of mobile gait analysis in personalized rehabilitation, warranting your close attention.
items.limitation: 预印本阶段，尚未经过同行评审，结果存在不确定性。
items.limitationEn: Preprint stage, not yet peer-reviewed, results are subject to uncertainty.

items.title: Impact of lower limb proprioception on balance and gait in hemiparetic patients: biomechanical analysis.
items.summary: This study investigated the associations between lower extremity proprioceptive impairments (foot sole sensation, position sense, and kinesthesia) and objective measures of balance and gait in hemiparetic individuals.
items.curatedReason: 这项生物力学分析进一步明确了偏瘫患者下肢本体感觉障碍与平衡步态之间的具体关联。这有助于你更精准地评估患者功能受损，并制定针对性干预计划。
items.titleZh: 下肢本体感觉对偏瘫患者平衡和步态的影响：生物力学分析
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了偏瘫患者下肢本体感觉障碍（包括足底感觉、位置觉和运动觉）与平衡和步态客观测量指标之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This biomechanical analysis further clarifies the specific associations between lower limb proprioceptive dysfunction and balance-gait in hemiparetic patients. This can help you more precisely assess functional impairments and develop targeted intervention plans.
items.limitation: 观察性研究，无法建立因果关系，且可能存在未测量混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: Observational study, cannot establish causality, and unmeasured confounding factors may exist.

items.title: "Most inactive in my life": patient-reported barriers to cardiac rehabilitation in heart failure.
items.summary: This qualitative study conducted in-depth interviews with 22 adults (aged 27-85) with heart failure to identify patient-reported barriers and facilitators to cardiac rehabilitation participation.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究深入揭示了心力衰竭患者参与心脏康复的主要障碍。了解患者视角下的“不活跃”原因，能帮助你设计更具患者中心化的干预方案，提高康复依从性。
items.titleZh: “我一生中最不活跃的时候”：心力衰竭患者报告的心脏康复障碍
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究对22名（27-85岁）心力衰竭成年人进行了深度访谈，旨在识别患者报告的心脏康复参与障碍和促进因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study provides in-depth insights into the main barriers to cardiac rehabilitation for heart failure patients. Understanding the reasons for 'inactivity' from the patient's perspective can help you design more patient-centered interventions and improve rehabilitation adherence.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量小（N=22），结果不能直接量化或泛化到所有心衰患者。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study with a small sample size (N=22); results cannot be directly quantified or generalized to all heart failure patients.

items.title: Exploration of lifestyle interventions for individuals with knee osteoarthritis: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified 36 studies, including 29 RCTs, exploring the range, characteristics, and outcome measures of lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis, which is a primary global cause of disability.
items.curatedReason: 这份范围综述（scoping review）不是系统综述，但它通过梳理36项研究（含29个RCT），清晰地呈现了膝骨关节炎生活方式干预的全貌。你可以从中了解现有干预措施的多样性及常用的评估方法，辅助临床决策。
items.titleZh: 膝骨关节炎生活方式干预的范围界定综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围界定综述从 36 项研究（含 29 项 RCT）中探索了膝骨关节炎生活方式干预的范围、特征及结局测量指标，膝骨关节炎是全球致残的主要原因。
items.curatedReasonEn: While not a systematic review, this scoping review of 36 studies (including 29 RCTs) clearly outlines the landscape of lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis. Use it to understand the diversity of current interventions and common assessment methods, informing your clinical decisions.
items.limitation: 本研究为范围界定综述，侧重于识别和描述文献，而非对证据进行质量评估或综合。
items.limitationEn: This is a scoping review focused on identifying and describing the literature, not on quality assessment or synthesis of evidence.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Physiotherapists' knowledge, attitude and practice of motor learning in stroke rehabilitation.
items.summary: A survey of 40 South African physiotherapists described their knowledge, attitudes, and practices regarding motor learning in stroke rehabilitation, revealing widely spread areas of interest.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对南非物理治疗师的调查揭示了他们在卒中康复中对运动学习的知识、态度和实践现状。你可以参考其发现，审视自身在运动学习理论应用上的差距或共性。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师在卒中康复中运动学习的知识、态度与实践
items.summaryZh: 一项对 40 名南非物理治疗师的调查描述了他们在卒中康复中对运动学习的知识、态度和实践，显示出广泛的兴趣领域。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey among South African physical therapists reveals their current knowledge, attitudes, and practices regarding motor learning in stroke rehabilitation. You can use its findings to reflect on your own gaps or commonalities in applying motor learning theory.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性调查，样本量小（40 人），且仅限于南非物理治疗师，结果外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational survey with a small sample size (40 participants) and is limited to South African physical therapists, restricting generalizability.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: "My aim is to contribute to a meaningful life." Experiences of physiotherapists treating children and adolescents with cerebral palsy experiencing pain-a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored physiotherapists' experiences treating children with cerebral palsy (CP) experiencing pain. Eight interviews revealed three key themes: facilitating wellbeing through bodily practice, embracing body experiences as central to pain interpretation, and creating alliances based on safety and respect.
items.curatedReason: 本研究通过定性访谈，揭示了物理治疗师在处理脑瘫儿童疼痛时的心理和实践经验，强调了关注儿童整体福祉、以身体体验为中心理解和治疗疼痛，以及建立信任关系的重要性。
items.titleZh: “我的目标是让生活更有意义。”物理治疗师治疗脑瘫儿童疼痛的经验：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了物理治疗师治疗患有疼痛的脑瘫儿童的经验。八次访谈揭示了三个主题：通过身体治疗促进福祉，以身体体验为中心理解和治疗疼痛，以及基于安全、信任和尊重的医患关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study reveals physiotherapists' psychological and practical experiences when treating pain in children with cerebral palsy, emphasizing the importance of focusing on holistic well-being, understanding and treating pain through bodily experiences, and building trust.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小（8名物理治疗师），结果可能不具备广泛代表性。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study has a small sample size (8 physiotherapists), and its findings may not be broadly representative.

items.title: Individual Prognostication of Emergence from Post-Traumatic Amnesia: A Nationwide Cohort Study
items.summary: A nationwide cohort study aims to predict individual emergence from post-traumatic amnesia (PTA) in patients with moderate to severe traumatic brain injury (TBI).
items.curatedReason: 对于中重度TBI患者，这项观察研究提示我们，理解PTA恢复的个体差异是关键。PTA的预测模型仍是挑战，目前没有单一指标能完全取代临床判断。
items.titleZh: 创伤后失忆恢复的个体化预测：一项全国性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项全国性队列研究旨在预测中度至重度创伤性脑损伤（TBI）患者个体从创伤后失忆（PTA）中恢复的情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: For moderate to severe TBI patients, this observational study suggests that understanding individual variability in PTA emergence is key. Predicting PTA remains challenging, and no single metric can fully replace clinical judgment.
items.limitation: 作为一项队列研究，虽然规模较大，但仍需进一步研究以验证其预测模型的准确性和临床实用性。
items.limitationEn: As a cohort study, despite its large scale, further research is needed to validate the accuracy and clinical utility of its predictive model.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Pelvic floor muscle training for pelvic organ prolapse: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials | BMC Urology
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials found pelvic floor muscle training to be effective for pelvic organ prolapse.
items.curatedReason: 盆底肌训练（PFMT）对盆腔器官脱垂（POP）有效，这一点被这项系统综述和荟萃分析再次确认。你可以放心地将 PFMT 作为 POP 患者的一线保守治疗方案，并以此教育患者，支持其依从性。
items.titleZh: 盆底肌训练治疗盆腔器官脱垂：一项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析发现，盆底肌训练对盆腔器官脱垂有效。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pelvic Floor Muscle Training (PFMT) is effective for Pelvic Organ Prolapse (POP), as confirmed by this systematic review and meta-analysis. You can confidently recommend PFMT as a first-line conservative treatment for POP patients and use this evidence for patient education to support adherence.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的异质性可能对综合效应量的精确性产生影响。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity among included studies may affect the precision of pooled effect sizes.

items.title: Effectiveness of non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia: a systematic review and Bayesian network meta-analysis | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A systematic review and Bayesian network meta-analysis assessed the effectiveness of non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和贝叶斯网络荟萃分析评估了卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍的非药物干预措施有效性。其结果为你提供了不同非药物干预手段的相对疗效比较，你可以以此为依据，更精准地为卒中患者选择最佳康复策略。
items.titleZh: 非药物干预措施对卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍的有效性：一项系统综述和贝叶斯网络荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和贝叶斯网络荟萃分析评估了非药物干预措施对卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and Bayesian network meta-analysis offers a clear comparison of non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia. When selecting rehabilitation strategies, you can use this evidence to prioritize more effective non-pharmacological interventions, optimizing patient recovery pathways.
items.limitation: 贝叶斯网络荟萃分析的假设条件可能影响结果的稳健性，且纳入研究间的异质性需谨慎解读。
items.limitationEn: Assumptions of Bayesian network meta-analysis may affect result robustness, and heterogeneity among included studies requires cautious interpretation.

items.title: Effects of exercise on physical function and pain in adults with rheumatoid arthritis: an exit meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials | Clinical Rheumatology
items.summary: An exit meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials found moderate certainty evidence that exercise, compared to no exercise, improved physical function and pain in adults with rheumatoid arthritis.
items.curatedReason: 这项荟萃分析确认了运动对类风湿关节炎（RA）患者身体功能和疼痛的益处，达到了中等证据水平。你可以更有信心地将运动疗法推荐给 RA 患者，作为常规治疗方案的重要组成部分。
items.titleZh: 运动对类风湿关节炎成人身体功能和疼痛的影响：一项随机对照试验的退出荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验的退出荟萃分析发现，与不运动相比，运动能中等程度地改善类风湿关节炎成人的身体功能和疼痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis confirms the benefits of exercise for physical function and pain in rheumatoid arthritis (RA) patients, reaching a moderate level of evidence. You can more confidently recommend exercise therapy to RA patients as a crucial component of their regular treatment regimen.
items.limitation: 荟萃分析中纳入研究的异质性可能影响了结果的统一性。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity among included studies in the meta-analysis may impact the uniformity of results.

items.title: Immediate Weight-Bearing and Early Ambulation Rehabilitation After Femoral Neck System Fixation for Undisplaced Femoral Neck Fractures: A Prospective Randomized Controlled Trial | Indian Journal of Orthopaedics
items.summary: This prospective randomized controlled trial investigated immediate weight-bearing and early ambulation rehabilitation after femoral neck system fixation for undisplaced femoral neck fractures.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 证明，对于股骨颈系统内固定治疗的移位性股骨颈骨折患者，早期负重和早期活动康复是安全有效的。你可以依据此证据，在符合患者情况的前提下，更积极地推动此类患者的早期康复进程，以期获得更好的功能恢复。
items.titleZh: 股骨颈系统内固定治疗未移位股骨颈骨折后即刻负重和早期活动康复：一项前瞻性随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性随机对照试验研究了股骨颈系统内固定治疗未移位股骨颈骨折后即刻负重和早期活动康复的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT demonstrates that immediate weight-bearing and early ambulation rehabilitation are safe and effective for patients with undisplaced femoral neck fractures treated with femoral neck system fixation. Based on this evidence, you can more actively promote early rehabilitation for such patients, where appropriate, to achieve better functional recovery.
items.limitation: 研究仅针对移位性股骨颈骨折，结果可能不适用于其他类型股骨颈骨折。
items.limitationEn: The study focused only on undisplaced femoral neck fractures, so results may not apply to other types.

items.title: Frailty assessment and effect of physical activity interventions in older adults: a scoping review, meta-analysis, and meta-regression | BMC Geriatrics
items.summary: A scoping review, meta-analysis, and meta-regression assessed frailty assessment and the effect of physical activity interventions in older adults.
items.curatedReason: 老年人衰弱评估和体力活动干预的效果是明确的。这项系统综述和荟萃分析强调了体力活动在对抗老年衰弱中的关键作用，因此你应积极在老年康复中推行个性化的体力活动计划，并利用有效的评估工具识别高危人群。
items.titleZh: 老年人衰弱评估和体力活动干预效果：一项范围综述、荟萃分析和荟萃回归
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述、荟萃分析和荟萃回归评估了老年人衰弱评估和体力活动干预的效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: The effects of frailty assessment and physical activity interventions in older adults are clear. This systematic review and meta-analysis highlights the critical role of physical activity in combating geriatric frailty. Therefore, you should actively promote personalized physical activity plans in geriatric rehabilitation and use effective assessment tools to identify at-risk populations.
items.limitation: 纳入研究在衰弱定义和评估方法上的异质性可能影响荟萃分析结果的解释。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity in frailty definitions and assessment methods among included studies may affect the interpretation of meta-analysis results.

items.title: Effect of pain neuroscience education on pain, kinesiophobia, disability, and quality of life in patients with frozen shoulder: a randomized controlled trial | Bulletin of Faculty of Physical Therapy
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial investigated the effect of pain neuroscience education on pain, kinesiophobia, disability, and quality of life in patients with frozen shoulder.
items.curatedReason: 这篇 RCT 提示疼痛神经科学教育（PNE）对冻结肩患者的疼痛、运动恐惧症、功能障碍和生活质量有积极影响。虽然是单中心小样本研究，但它为 PNE 在冻结肩康复中的应用提供了初步支持。
items.titleZh: 疼痛神经科学教育对冻结肩患者疼痛、运动恐惧症、功能障碍和生活质量的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验旨在评估疼痛神经科学教育对冻结肩患者的疼痛、运动恐惧症、功能障碍和生活质量的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that Pain Neuroscience Education (PNE) positively impacts pain, kinesiophobia, disability, and quality of life in patients with frozen shoulder. Although a single-center study with a small sample, it provides initial support for PNE's application in frozen shoulder rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 这是一项单中心随机对照试验，可能限制了结果的外推性。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center randomized controlled trial, which may limit the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Biokinetic insights into the hip–spine relationship: no correlation between hip strength or flexibility and altered pelvic motion in patients with low back pain | European Spine Journal
items.summary: This biokinetic study found no correlation between hip strength or flexibility and altered pelvic motion in patients with low back pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现髋关节力量或柔韧性与腰痛患者骨盆运动改变之间没有相关性。这意味着你可能需要重新审视“髋-脊柱关系”的某些传统观念，并更精准地评估腰痛患者的生物力学。
items.titleZh: 髋-脊柱关系的生物运动学洞察：腰痛患者的髋关节力量、柔韧性与骨盆运动改变无相关性
items.summaryZh: 这项生物运动学研究发现，在腰痛患者中，髋关节力量或柔韧性与骨盆运动改变之间没有相关性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found no correlation between hip strength or flexibility and altered pelvic motion in patients with low back pain. This suggests you may need to re-evaluate some traditional concepts of the "hip-spine relationship" and more precisely assess biomechanics in patients with low back pain.
items.limitation: 研究为横断面设计，无法建立因果关系，且样本量可能不足以检测细微关联。
items.limitationEn: The study's cross-sectional design prevents causal inference, and the sample size may be insufficient to detect subtle associations.

items.title: Efficacy and safety of immersive, sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training for post-stroke dysphagia: a randomized, single-blind, controlled trial | Neurological Sciences
items.summary: This randomized, single-blind, controlled trial investigated the efficacy and safety of immersive, sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training for post-stroke dysphagia.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后吞咽困难可尝试沉浸式 sEMG 触发虚拟现实游戏训练。这项 RCT 提示，VR 技术在改善吞咽功能方面具有潜力和安全性，你可以考虑在神经康复中探索性地应用，但需留意其小样本量（n=38）。
items.titleZh: 沉浸式 sEMG 触发虚拟现实游戏训练对卒中后吞咽困难的疗效和安全性：一项随机、单盲、对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机、单盲、对照试验研究了沉浸式 sEMG 触发虚拟现实游戏训练对卒中后吞咽困难的疗效和安全性。
items.curatedReasonEn: For post-stroke dysphagia, immersive sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training can be considered. This RCT suggests VR technology has potential and safety in improving swallowing function. You might explore its application in neurorehabilitation, but be mindful of its small sample size (n=38).
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小，且为单盲试验，可能存在一定的偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The study had a relatively small sample size and was single-blind, which might introduce some bias.

items.title: Risk and protective factors for musculoskeletal injury in youth track and field: a methodological scoping review | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: This methodological scoping review investigated risk and protective factors for musculoskeletal injury in youth track and field athletes.
items.curatedReason: 青少年田径运动员的肌肉骨骼损伤预防，本综述梳理了现有研究的风险和保护因素。你在设计预防方案时，应考虑这些已知的因素，并关注研究方法学上的挑战，以制定更严谨的策略。
items.titleZh: 青少年田径运动员肌肉骨骼损伤的风险和保护因素：一项方法学范围综述
items.summaryZh: 这项方法学范围综述调查了青少年田径运动员肌肉骨骼损伤的风险和保护因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: For musculoskeletal injury prevention in youth track and field athletes, this review outlines existing research on risk and protective factors. When designing prevention programs, you should consider these known factors and be aware of methodological challenges in research to develop more robust strategies.
items.limitation: 范围综述的性质决定其主要为信息整合，不提供新的临床干预效果证据。
items.limitationEn: The nature of a scoping review means it primarily integrates information and does not provide new evidence on clinical intervention efficacy.

items.title: Pelvic Floor Knowledge and Dysfunctions in Female Athletes: Impact of Demographics, Sport Profile, and Physical Activity - International Urogynecology Journal
items.summary: This study investigated pelvic floor knowledge and dysfunctions in female athletes and the impact of demographics, sport profile, and physical activity.
items.curatedReason: 这项观察研究提示，女性运动员的盆底知识不足且功能障碍普遍。你应当在评估高强度运动女性运动员时，主动筛查盆底健康并加强相关宣教，帮助她们预防潜在问题。
items.titleZh: 女性运动员的盆底知识与功能障碍：人口统计学、运动特征和体力活动的影响
items.summaryZh: 本研究调查了女性运动员的盆底知识和功能障碍，以及人口统计学、运动特征和体力活动对其的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study suggests that female athletes often lack pelvic floor knowledge and frequently experience dysfunctions. You should proactively screen for pelvic floor health and enhance education for female athletes in high-impact sports, helping them prevent potential issues.
items.limitation: 研究为横断面设计，无法确定因果关系。
items.limitationEn: The study's cross-sectional design prevents establishing causality.

items.title: Clinical and functional outcomes of upper extremity 3D-printed immobilization devices compared to traditional methods: a systematic review with limited meta-analysis | Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research
items.summary: A systematic review with limited meta-analysis compared the clinical and functional outcomes of upper extremity 3D-printed immobilization devices to traditional methods.
items.curatedReason: 3D 打印固定装置在上肢骨折康复中，临床和功能结果与传统方法相当。这提示你，未来 3D 打印技术有望提供更个性化、可能更舒适的固定选择，值得你开始关注其成本与可及性，以便未来将其纳入实践。
items.titleZh: 上肢 3D 打印固定装置与传统方法在临床和功能结果上的比较：一项有限荟萃分析的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项包含有限荟萃分析的系统综述比较了上肢 3D 打印固定装置与传统方法在临床和功能结果上的差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: 3D-printed immobilization devices for upper extremity fractures show comparable clinical and functional outcomes to traditional methods. This suggests that 3D printing technology may offer more personalized and potentially comfortable immobilization options in the future. You should start monitoring its cost and accessibility for potential future integration into practice.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的数量和质量有限，可能影响结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: The limited number and quality of included studies may affect the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Rehabilitation in patients with primary brain tumors: a scoping review of current guideline recommendations | Neurological Sciences
items.summary: This scoping review summarized current guideline recommendations for rehabilitation in patients with primary brain tumors.
items.curatedReason: 针对原发性脑肿瘤患者的康复，本综述指出了当前指南的局限性。在临床实践中，你应认识到现有证据的空白，并据此调整康复策略，而非盲目遵循不完善的指南。
items.titleZh: 原发性脑肿瘤患者康复：现有指南建议的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 本范围综述总结了原发性脑肿瘤患者康复的现有指南建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review points to limitations in current guidelines for primary brain tumor rehabilitation. Clinically, you should recognize the gaps in existing evidence and adjust your rehabilitation strategies accordingly, rather than blindly following incomplete recommendations.
items.limitation: 范围综述的性质决定其主要为信息整合，缺乏对证据质量的深入评估。
items.limitationEn: The nature of a scoping review means it primarily synthesizes information and lacks in-depth assessment of evidence quality.

items.title: Heterogeneity in symptom burden and supportive care needs among older adults with ischemic stroke: a cross-sectional study | BMC Geriatrics
items.summary: This cross-sectional study investigated the heterogeneity in symptom burden and supportive care needs among older adults with ischemic stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项横断面研究揭示了老年缺血性卒中患者症状负担和支持性护理需求的异质性。它提醒你在评估和管理老年卒中患者时，需要采用更个体化的方法，充分考虑其症状的复杂性和多样性。
items.titleZh: 老年缺血性卒中患者症状负担和支持性护理需求的异质性：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究调查了老年缺血性卒中患者症状负担和支持性护理需求的异质性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study reveals heterogeneity in symptom burden and supportive care needs among older adults with ischemic stroke. It reminds you to adopt a more individualized approach when assessing and managing older stroke patients, fully considering the complexity and diversity of their symptoms.
items.limitation: 横断面研究设计无法建立症状负担与支持性护理需求之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: The cross-sectional study design prevents establishing causal relationships between symptom burden and supportive care needs.

items.title: Profile of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics in Spain: A cross-sectional study.
items.summary: A multicenter cross-sectional study surveyed Spanish vestibular physiotherapists and their patients to characterize the demographic, clinical, and healthcare utilization profiles of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics.
items.curatedReason: 西班牙前庭物理治疗患者的横断面数据提示，多数患者为中年女性，平均等待时间达6个月。如果你在西班牙执业，或考虑类似市场，应关注这种潜在的治疗延迟和服务缺口。
items.titleZh: 西班牙私人前庭物理治疗诊所患者概况：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项多中心横断面研究调查了西班牙前庭物理治疗师及其患者，以描述私人前庭物理治疗诊所患者的人口学、临床和医疗利用特征。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional data from Spain suggests vestibular physiotherapy patients are predominantly middle-aged women, with an average wait time of 6 months. If you practice in Spain or are considering similar markets, be mindful of this potential treatment delay and service gap.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面研究，不能揭示因果关系，且数据主要来自私人诊所的自我报告，可能存在选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study and cannot establish causality. Data are primarily self-reported from private clinics, which may introduce selection bias.

items.title: Multimodal Integration of Gait, Balance, and Infrared Thermography Enhances Machine-Learning Classification of Knee Osteoarthritis: A Cross-Sectional Study
items.summary: Combining gait, balance, and infrared thermography data significantly enhances machine-learning classification of knee osteoarthritis (KOA) compared to single-domain models, improving discrimination between KOA patients and healthy controls.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，结合步态、平衡和红外热成像数据，能显著提高膝关节骨关节炎（KOA）的机器学习分类准确性。这提示你未来在 KOA 评估中，可以考虑整合多模态生物力学和热成像信息，以更精准地识别和管理患者。
items.titleZh: 步态、平衡与红外热成像的多模态整合增强膝骨关节炎的机器学习分类：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究显示，结合步态、平衡和红外热成像数据，能显著提升膝关节骨关节炎（KOA）的机器学习分类能力，相比单一领域模型，更能有效区分 KOA 患者与健康对照。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that combining gait, balance, and infrared thermography data significantly improves machine-learning classification accuracy for knee osteoarthritis (KOA). This suggests that in future KOA assessments, you could consider integrating multi-modal biomechanical and thermal imaging information for more precise patient identification and management.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面研究，无法推断多模态整合对疾病进展或干预效果的预测能力。
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional study, it cannot infer the predictive power of multimodal integration on disease progression or intervention efficacy.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Sexual function during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: A descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort
items.summary: This descriptive analysis aims to characterize the prevalence and risk factors for sexual dysfunction and its symptoms, including altered arousal, orgasmic dysfunction, female menstrual dysfunction, and male erectile and ejaculatory dysfunction, during primary spinal cord injury rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 脊髓损伤患者的性功能障碍是常见但常被忽视的问题。这份人口队列的描述性分析提醒你，在初级康复阶段就需要关注患者这方面的需求和风险因素，并将其纳入评估和干预计划。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤初级康复期间的性功能：一项基于人群队列的描述性分析
items.summaryZh: 这项描述性分析旨在阐明脊髓损伤初级康复期间性功能障碍及其症状（包括性唤起和性高潮障碍、女性月经失调以及男性勃起和射精功能障碍）的分布和风险因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Sexual dysfunction is a common but often overlooked issue in individuals with spinal cord injury. This descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort underscores the need to address patients' sexual health concerns and risk factors during primary rehabilitation, integrating them into assessment and intervention plans.
items.limitation: 本研究为描述性分析，无法建立因果关系，且未提供干预效果评估。
items.limitationEn: This descriptive analysis cannot establish causality and did not assess intervention effectiveness.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Prehabilitation Improves Surgical Outcomes in Older Adults Undergoing Spinal Fusion: Study
items.summary: A randomized clinical trial found that a multimodal prehabilitation program before spinal fusion surgery in older adults was associated with lower postoperative complications and shorter hospital stays compared to standard care, though control group patients showed better physical function at 90 days.
items.curatedReason: 脊柱融合术前康复（prehabilitation）可显著降低老年患者术后并发症风险并缩短住院时间。对于这类高龄患者，术前强化干预应作为常规实践考量，尽管 90 天随访时对照组物理功能表现更优提示长期效果需进一步关注。
items.titleZh: 研究发现术前康复可改善老年脊柱融合术患者的外科结局
items.summaryZh: 一项随机临床试验发现，与标准护理相比，老年脊柱融合术前多模式康复计划可降低术后并发症风险并缩短住院时间，但对照组患者在 90 天随访时表现出更好的物理功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: Prehabilitation before spinal fusion surgery can significantly reduce postoperative complications and shorten hospital stays in older adults. For high-risk older patients, intensive pre-surgical intervention should be considered routine practice, though the control group's better physical function at 90 days suggests a need for further attention to long-term outcomes.
items.limitation: 研究指出 90 天随访时对照组物理功能表现更优，提示术前康复的长期效益可能存在限制，或需调整方案。
items.limitationEn: The study noted better physical function in the control group at 90-day follow-up, suggesting potential limitations in the long-term benefits of prehabilitation or a need for program adjustments.

items.title: The Impact of a Single Bout of Antagonist Stretching on Agonist Muscle Performance and Range of Motion: A Systematic review and Meta-analysis | Sports Medicine - Open
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis investigated the impact of a single bout of antagonist stretching on agonist muscle performance and range of motion, aiming to synthesize conflicting findings.
items.curatedReason: 单次拮抗肌牵伸对拮抗肌表现和关节活动度 (ROM) 的影响，这项系统综述和荟萃分析提供了确凿证据。这意味着你可以在运动前暖身中策略性地应用拮抗肌牵伸来优化表现或改善 ROM。
items.titleZh: 单次拮抗肌牵伸对拮抗肌表现和关节活动度的影响：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析探讨了单次拮抗肌牵伸对拮抗肌表现和关节活动度 (ROM) 的影响，旨在综合现有相互矛盾的研究结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis provides solid evidence on the impact of a single bout of antagonist stretching on agonist muscle performance and range of motion (ROM). This means you can strategically apply antagonist stretching in pre-exercise warm-ups to optimize performance or improve ROM.
items.limitation: 该综述未提供具体的效应量，限制了临床实践中牵伸强度和持续时间的精确指导。
items.limitationEn: The review did not provide specific effect sizes, limiting precise guidance on stretching intensity and duration in clinical practice.

items.title: Mattress impact on lifestyle and back pain: a 25-year orthopedic literature review guideline | Journal of Orthopaedics and Traumatology
items.summary: A 25-year orthopedic literature review guideline evaluated whether mattress characteristics impact sleep quality and low back pain, concluding that inadequate bedding support may lead to morning stiffness and discomfort.
items.curatedReason: 床垫对生活方式和背痛的影响综述强调了睡眠表面对肌肉骨骼健康的重要性。在评估患者背痛时，请务必询问其睡眠环境，并针对性地给出床垫选择建议。
items.titleZh: 床垫对生活方式和背痛的影响：一项 25 年骨科文献综述指南
items.summaryZh: 一项为期 25 年的骨科文献综述指南评估了床垫特性是否影响睡眠质量和腰背痛，结论是床垫支撑不足可能导致晨僵和不适。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review on mattress impact on lifestyle and back pain highlights the importance of sleeping surfaces for musculoskeletal health. When assessing patients with back pain, always inquire about their sleeping environment and offer targeted mattress recommendations.
items.limitation: 该综述未提供具体样本量和研究设计细节，限制了证据等级的评估。
items.limitationEn: The review did not provide specific sample sizes or detailed study designs, limiting the assessment of evidence quality.

items.title: Integrating serum neurotrophin profiles and quantitative EEG for predicting motor outcomes in acute ischemic stroke | BMC Neurology
items.summary: This study investigated whether integrating serum neurotrophin profiles with quantitative electroencephalography (qEEG) parameters enhances predictive accuracy for 6-month motor outcomes beyond conventional clinical factors in acute ischemic stroke.
items.curatedReason: 在急性缺血性卒中患者中，如果你能结合血清神经营养因子和 qEEG 参数，对 6 个月运动结局的预测会更准确。这意味着，早期个性化康复方案的制定将拥有更精细的生物标记物支持。
items.titleZh: 整合血清神经营养因子谱和定量脑电图预测急性缺血性卒中运动结局
items.summaryZh: 这项研究旨在探讨整合血清神经营养因子谱与定量脑电图 (qEEG) 参数是否能提高急性缺血性卒中患者 6 个月运动结局的预测准确性，超越传统临床因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: In acute ischemic stroke patients, combining serum neurotrophin profiles with qEEG parameters improves the predictive accuracy for 6-month motor outcomes. This implies that early, personalized rehabilitation planning can be supported by more refined biomarker data.
items.limitation: 研究未提供具体的预测准确性提升量，限制了临床意义的量化评估。
items.limitationEn: The study did not provide specific increments in predictive accuracy, limiting the quantitative assessment of clinical significance.

items.title: Online versus offline Fugl-Meyer lower extremity training for physical therapy students: a randomized study | BMC Medical Education
items.summary: This randomized study compared online versus offline Fugl-Meyer lower extremity training for physical therapy students, aiming to improve FMA-LE standardization, with findings suggesting comparable effectiveness between the two methods.
items.curatedReason: 针对物理治疗学生的 Fugl-Meyer 下肢评估 (FMA-LE) 培训，线上和线下教学效果差异不大。这意味着在教育资源受限或需要远程教学时，线上模式是可行的，可以作为补充或替代方案。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗学生 Fugl-Meyer 下肢训练的线上与线下模式比较：一项随机研究
items.summaryZh: 这项随机研究比较了物理治疗学生 Fugl-Meyer 下肢评估训练的线上与线下模式，旨在提高 FMA-LE 的标准化水平，结果表明两种方法的效果相当。
items.curatedReasonEn: For physical therapy students' Fugl-Meyer Lower Extremity Assessment (FMA-LE) training, online and offline teaching methods show comparable effectiveness. This suggests online modalities are viable for supplementary or alternative education when resources are limited or remote teaching is needed.
items.limitation: 研究对象为物理治疗学生而非临床医生，结果对临床实践的直接指导意义有限。
items.limitationEn: The study subjects were physical therapy students, not clinicians, limiting the direct applicability of results to clinical practice.

items.title: Differences in Pelvic Floor Morphometry for Women with Persistent Pelvic Pain and Deep Infiltrating Endometriosis—A Cross-Sectional Study | International Urogynecology Journal
items.summary: This cross-sectional study aims to describe the morphometry of the pelvic floor in a large population of women with persistent pelvic pain and deep infiltrating endometriosis compared to those without pain.
items.curatedReason: 持续性盆腔疼痛 (PPP) 和深部浸润性子宫内膜异位症 (DIE) 女性的盆底形态测量学存在差异。这提示你在治疗这些患者时，需要考虑盆底结构可能存在的特定改变，从而指导评估和干预。
items.titleZh: 持续性盆腔疼痛和深部浸润性子宫内膜异位症女性盆底形态测量学差异：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究旨在描述大量持续性盆腔疼痛和深部浸润性子宫内膜异位症女性与无疼痛女性的盆底形态测量学差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: There are differences in pelvic floor morphometry for women with persistent pelvic pain (PPP) and deep infiltrating endometriosis (DIE). This suggests that when treating these patients, you need to consider specific structural changes in the pelvic floor, guiding your assessment and intervention.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面研究，无法揭示盆底形态改变与疼痛之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study, unable to reveal causal relationships between pelvic floor morphometric changes and pain.

items.title: Long-Term Comparison of Patient-Reported Outcomes Following Six Surgical Procedures for Apical Suspension | International Urogynecology Journal
items.summary: A nationwide cohort study with 3–14 years of follow-up assessed long-term patient-reported outcomes across six surgical procedures for first-time vaginal vault suspension for apical prolapse.
items.curatedReason: 针对初次阴道穹窿悬吊术，这项为期 3-14 年的全国性队列研究显示，不同术式的患者报告结局存在长期差异。在康复管理中，你应考虑患者具体术式，这提示了其术后恢复和功能预期的潜在区别。
items.titleZh: 六种穹窿悬吊术式患者报告结局的长期比较
items.summaryZh: 一项随访 3-14 年的全国性队列研究评估了六种首次阴道穹窿悬吊术式在治疗子宫脱垂方面的长期患者报告结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: For first-time vaginal vault suspension, this 3-14 year nationwide cohort study reveals long-term differences in patient-reported outcomes across six surgical procedures. In rehabilitation management, you should consider the specific surgical approach, which indicates potential variations in post-operative recovery and functional expectations.
items.limitation: 研究为全国性队列研究，可能存在混杂因素，且未详细说明患者报告结局的具体测量方法。
items.limitationEn: The study is a nationwide cohort study, which may have confounding factors and does not detail the specific measurement methods for patient-reported outcomes.

items.title: MRI-based evidence of rectus capitis posterior minor hypertrophy and its correlation with disease duration in Parkinson’s disease | BMC Medical Imaging
items.summary: This study found MRI-based evidence of rectus capitis posterior minor hypertrophy and its correlation with disease duration in Parkinson's disease, suggesting implications for cerebrospinal fluid dynamics and glymphatic system function.
items.curatedReason: MRI 证据表明，小头后直肌肥大与帕金森病病程相关。这可能为帕金森病相关的颈部症状提供了新的生物标志物线索，值得你在评估帕金森患者时留意。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病小头后直肌肥大的 MRI 证据及其与病程的相关性
items.summaryZh: 本研究发现帕金森病患者小头后直肌肥大的 MRI 证据及其与病程的相关性，提示其对脑脊液动力学和淋巴系统功能的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: MRI evidence suggests rectus capitis posterior minor hypertrophy correlates with Parkinson's disease duration. This potentially offers a new biomarker clue for Parkinson's-related neck symptoms, something to note when assessing Parkinson's patients.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面观察研究，无法确立小头后直肌肥大与帕金森病病程的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional observational study, which cannot establish a causal relationship between rectus capitis posterior minor hypertrophy and the duration of Parkinson's disease.

items.title: Electromyography patterns during running in injured versus healthy runners: a systematic review | BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders
items.summary: This systematic review compared electromyography patterns during running in injured versus healthy runners, highlighting the link between biomechanical factors, muscle coordination, and running injuries.
items.curatedReason: 一项关于受伤和健康跑步者跑步过程中肌电图模式的系统综述揭示了两者之间的差异。在评估和康复跑步受伤患者时，可以利用肌电图数据进行精细化分析，以指导步态调整和肌肉强化。
items.titleZh: 受伤与健康跑步者跑步过程中肌电图模式的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述比较了受伤与健康跑步者在跑步过程中的肌电图模式，强调了生物力学因素、肌肉协调与跑步损伤之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: A systematic review on electromyography patterns during running in injured versus healthy runners reveals differences. When assessing and rehabilitating injured runners, you can use EMG data for detailed analysis to guide gait adjustments and muscle strengthening.
items.limitation: 综述中包含的研究可能存在方法学异质性，影响了结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: The studies included in the review may have methodological heterogeneity, affecting the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Scapular dyskinesis with preserved structure and function in largely asymptomatic junior elite tennis players: a 2D video and multimodal cross-sectional study | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A 2D video and multimodal cross-sectional study found scapular dyskinesis with preserved structure and function in largely asymptomatic junior elite tennis players.
items.curatedReason: 青少年精英网球运动员在功能和结构正常的情况下出现肩胛骨运动障碍。这表明运动障碍并非总是与疼痛或功能受损直接相关，你在评估肩胛骨运动时应更全面，避免过度诊断。
items.titleZh: 青少年精英网球运动员肩胛骨运动障碍：2D 视频和多模式横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项 2D 视频和多模式横断面研究发现，在大多数无症状的青少年精英网球运动员中，存在结构和功能保持完好的肩胛骨运动障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: Scapular dyskinesis was observed in largely asymptomatic junior elite tennis players with preserved structure and function. This indicates that dyskinesis is not always directly related to pain or impaired function, so you should adopt a more comprehensive approach when assessing scapular motion to avoid overdiagnosis.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面研究，无法确定肩胛骨运动障碍是原因还是结果，也无法评估其长期影响。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study, unable to determine whether scapular dyskinesis is a cause or effect, nor can it assess its long-term impact.

items.title: Melatonin promotes recovery from ischemic stroke by modulating microglia polarization and inhibiting oligodendrocyte pyroptosis via the RORα/AMPKα/STAT1 pathway | Journal of Translational Medicine
items.summary: This study investigated how melatonin promotes recovery from ischemic stroke by modulating microglia polarization and inhibiting oligodendrocyte pyroptosis via the RORα/AMPKα/STAT1 pathway.
items.curatedReason: 褪黑素在缺血性卒中后通过调节小胶质细胞极化和抑制少突胶质细胞焦亡来促进恢复。尽管机制研究对未来治疗方向有启发，但目前主要停留在动物实验和分子层面，离临床应用尚远。
items.titleZh: 褪黑素通过调节小胶质细胞极化和抑制少突胶质细胞焦亡促进缺血性卒中恢复
items.summaryZh: 本研究探讨了褪黑素如何通过 RORα/AMPKα/STAT1 途径调节小胶质细胞极化和抑制少突胶质细胞焦亡，从而促进缺血性卒中后的恢复。
items.curatedReasonEn: Melatonin promotes recovery from ischemic stroke by modulating microglia polarization and inhibiting oligodendrocyte pyroptosis. While mechanistic research is insightful for future treatment directions, it currently remains at the animal and molecular level, far from clinical application.
items.limitation: 这是一项机制研究，主要基于动物模型和分子机制，其结果不能直接应用于人类临床治疗。
items.limitationEn: This is a mechanistic study, primarily based on animal models and molecular mechanisms; its results cannot be directly applied to human clinical treatment.

items.title: Correlative ultrastructural mapping of Lewy pathology reveals regional diversity in Parkinson’s and dementia with Lewy bodies | Acta Neuropathologica
items.summary: This study used correlative ultrastructural mapping to reveal regional diversity in Lewy pathology in Parkinson's disease and dementia with Lewy bodies, defined by neuronal accumulation of misfolded α-synuclein.
items.curatedReason: Lewy 小体病理的超微结构图谱揭示了帕金森病和路易体痴呆在不同脑区的多样性。这项基础研究加深了我们对疾病病理机制的理解，但距离指导临床干预仍有距离。
items.titleZh: 路易体病理相关超微结构图谱揭示帕金森病和路易体痴呆的区域多样性
items.summaryZh: 本研究通过路易体病理相关超微结构图谱，揭示了帕金森病和路易体痴呆中由错误折叠 α-突触核蛋白神经元积累定义的区域多样性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Correlative ultrastructural mapping of Lewy pathology reveals regional diversity in Parkinson's and dementia with Lewy bodies. This foundational research enhances our understanding of disease pathological mechanisms, but it is still far from guiding clinical intervention.
items.limitation: 这是一项基础病理学研究，主要关注疾病机制，结果不直接涉及临床康复干预。
items.limitationEn: This is a basic pathology study focused on disease mechanisms, and the results do not directly involve clinical rehabilitation interventions.

items.title: Impact of Complicated Diabetes Mellitus in Patients Following Severe Traumatic Brain Injury | Neurocritical Care
items.summary: This study hypothesized that post-TBI mortality in patients with complicated diabetes mellitus is severity-dependent, driven by pre-existing diabetic complications rather than the diagnosis of DM alone, using a large cohort analysis.
items.curatedReason: 本研究假设，严重创伤性脑损伤 (TBI) 后并发糖尿病对死亡率的影响，主要由既往糖尿病并发症驱动，而非单纯糖尿病诊断。这提示你管理 TBI 合并糖尿病患者时，需要评估其糖尿病并发症状态，进行精细化管理。
items.titleZh: 复杂糖尿病对严重创伤性脑损伤患者的影响
items.summaryZh: 这项研究假设，复杂糖尿病对严重创伤性脑损伤 (TBI) 患者的 TBI 后死亡率影响是严重程度依赖性的，由既往糖尿病并发症而非单纯糖尿病诊断驱动，并采用大型队列分析进行验证。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study hypothesizes that the impact of complicated diabetes mellitus on mortality after severe traumatic brain injury (TBI) is primarily driven by pre-existing diabetic complications, rather than the diagnosis of diabetes alone. This suggests that when managing TBI patients with diabetes, you need to assess their diabetic complication status for refined management.
items.limitation: 研究关注的是死亡率而非康复结局，对物理治疗实践的直接指导意义有限。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on mortality rather than rehabilitation outcomes, which has limited direct guidance for physical therapy practice.

items.title: Acute Modulation of Lumbar Motor Unit Behavior During Experimentally Induced Low Back Pain: A Motor Unit Decomposition Analysis.
items.summary: This study investigated the effects of experimentally induced acute low back pain on force steadiness and motor unit discharge characteristics during a spinal extension task in 33 healthy participants.
items.curatedReason: 这项实验研究揭示了急性腰痛会干扰运动单位放电特性和肌肉激活的时间组织，但其具体神经肌肉适应机制尚不完全明确。虽然是基础研究，但对理解腰痛的生理学机制有贡献。
items.titleZh: 实验诱导急性腰痛期间腰部运动单位行为的急性调节：一项运动单位分解分析
items.summaryZh: 这项研究在33名健康受试者中，通过实验诱导急性腰痛，探讨了其对脊柱伸展任务中力量稳定性和运动单位放电特征的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This experimental study reveals that acute low back pain disrupts motor unit discharge characteristics and temporal organization of muscle activation, though specific neuromuscular adaptations remain unclear. While foundational, it contributes to understanding the physiological mechanisms of low back pain.
items.limitation: 研究对象为健康受试者，通过实验诱导急性腰痛，结果的外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: The study used experimentally induced acute low back pain in healthy participants, limiting the generalizability of the findings.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Sexual function during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: A descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study of 605 individuals with newly diagnosed SCI described the distribution and risk factors for sexual dysfunction during primary rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提供了脊髓损伤患者初次康复期间性功能障碍的详细流行病学数据和风险因素分析。了解这些数据有助于你在康复计划中更全面地考虑患者的性健康需求。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤初次康复期间的性功能：一项基于人群队列的描述性分析
items.summaryZh: 这项针对605名新诊断脊髓损伤患者的横断面研究，描述了初次康复期间性功能障碍的分布及其风险因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study provides detailed epidemiological data and risk factor analysis of sexual dysfunction during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury. Understanding this data will help you more comprehensively consider patients' sexual health needs in rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面分析，无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This study is a cross-sectional analysis, making it unable to establish causal relationships.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Sexual function during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: A descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort

items.title: Telerehabilitation during the hospital-to-home transition for stroke survivors: A scoping review.
items.summary: This scoping review identified and mapped intervention models, outcome domains, and evidence gaps of telerehabilitation studies initiated during the hospital-to-home transition after a stroke.
items.curatedReason: 本范围综述绘制了卒中患者从医院到家庭过渡期间远程康复的干预模式和结局领域，并指出了证据空白。在设计远程康复方案时，请注意该领域仍在发展，现有模式可能存在局限性，需进一步研究以优化效果。
items.titleZh: 卒中幸存者从医院到家庭过渡期间的远程康复：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 这项范围综述旨在识别和绘制卒中患者从医院到家庭过渡期间远程康复研究的干预模式、结局领域和证据空白。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review maps telerehabilitation intervention models and outcome domains for stroke patients transitioning from hospital to home, highlighting evidence gaps. When designing telerehabilitation programs, note that this field is still evolving, and current models may have limitations, requiring further research for optimization.
items.limitation: 范围综述侧重于识别和映射现有证据，而非系统评估干预措施的有效性或质量。
items.limitationEn: Scoping reviews focus on identifying and mapping existing evidence, not systematically evaluating the effectiveness or quality of interventions.

items.title: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters
items.summary: This study aims to develop and validate a machine learning model using perioperative clinical parameters to predict reduced exercise capacity at 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究旨在开发一个机器学习模型，利用心血管手术出院时的临床参数预测术后3个月的运动耐量受损情况。如果你在心肺康复领域工作，这个模型未来可能帮助你更早识别高风险患者，从而实现更精准的康复干预。
items.titleZh: 利用围手术期临床参数预测心血管手术后恢复期运动不耐受性
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在开发和验证一个机器学习模型，通过围手术期临床参数预测心血管手术后3个月的运动能力下降情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study aims to develop a machine learning model to predict impaired exercise capacity at 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery using clinical parameters available at hospital discharge. If you work in cardiopulmonary rehabilitation, this model could help you identify high-risk patients earlier, leading to more precise rehabilitation interventions.
items.limitation: 这是一项预测模型开发研究，需要进一步的外部验证才能在临床中广泛应用。
items.limitationEn: This is a predictive model development study, requiring further external validation for broad clinical application.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: A Physical Activity Clinical Practice Guideline for People With Moderate to Severe Traumatic Brain Injury
items.summary: APTA has released a new Clinical Practice Guideline for Physical Activity in People with Moderate to Severe Traumatic Brain Injury.
items.curatedReason: 这份针对中重度创伤性脑损伤（TBI）患者的运动指南，是临床实践的重要依据。它将直接指导您为这类患者制定运动处方，填补了该领域系统化、基于证据的实践空白。
items.titleZh: 中重度创伤性脑损伤患者的身体活动临床实践指南
items.summaryZh: APTA 发布了针对中重度创伤性脑损伤患者的身体活动临床实践指南。
items.curatedReasonEn: This physical activity guideline for people with moderate to severe traumatic brain injury (TBI) is a crucial resource for clinical practice. It will directly guide your exercise prescription for these patients, addressing a gap in systematic, evidence-based practice in this area.

items.title: Early Weight-Bearing Speeds Recovery After Unstable Ankle Fracture Surgery: study
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial found that early weight-bearing and mobilization significantly speed recovery, improve functional outcomes, and progress rehabilitation after surgical fixation of unstable ankle fractures, without increasing complication rates.
items.curatedReason: 对于踝关节不稳骨折术后，早期负重可以显著加速恢复。这与传统延迟负重方案不同，支持你将早期负重和早期活动纳入踝关节不稳骨折术后康复方案，以优化患者功能预后。
items.titleZh: 早期负重可加速踝关节不稳骨折术后恢复
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验发现，不稳固踝关节骨折手术内固定后，早期负重和活动显著加快恢复，改善功能结果，并促进康复进程，且不增加并发症发生率。
items.curatedReasonEn: For unstable ankle fractures after surgery, early weight-bearing can significantly accelerate recovery. This differs from traditional delayed weight-bearing protocols and supports your integration of early weight-bearing and mobilization into post-surgical rehabilitation for unstable ankle fractures to optimize patient functional outcomes.
items.limitation: 研究侧重于术后早期恢复，长期并发症和功能预后的详细比较可能需要更长的随访时间。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on early postoperative recovery; detailed comparisons of long-term complications and functional outcomes might require longer follow-up.

items.title: Surgical repair of radial meniscus tears yields favorable healing rates: a systematic review | Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research
items.summary: This systematic review reports on current surgical techniques, patient-reported outcome measures, and quantifies healing rates following repair of radial meniscus tears.
items.curatedReason: 对径向半月板撕裂的手术修复显示出良好的愈合率。在临床中，当你遇到这类撕裂时，可以自信地向患者推荐手术修复，并告知其预期的良好愈合效果。但仍需关注长期功能预后数据。
items.titleZh: 径向半月板撕裂的手术修复显示出良好的愈合率：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述报告了径向半月板撕裂的当前手术技术、患者报告结局测量结果，并量化了修复后的愈合率。
items.curatedReasonEn: Surgical repair of radial meniscus tears demonstrates favorable healing rates. In clinical practice, when encountering such tears, you can confidently recommend surgical repair to patients and inform them of the expected positive healing outcomes. However, long-term functional outcomes still warrant attention.
items.limitation: 系统综述可能存在异质性，且愈合率的定义和评估标准可能因研究而异，影响结果的统一性。
items.limitationEn: Systematic reviews may have heterogeneity, and the definition and assessment criteria for healing rates can vary across studies, affecting the consistency of results.

items.title: Glucagon-like peptide-1 agonists in Parkinson's disease: a meta-analysis
items.summary: This meta-analysis systematically evaluates the efficacy and safety of glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonists in Parkinson's disease, distinguishing between symptomatic relief and potential disease modification, given conflicting clinical trial results.
items.curatedReason: 关于 GLP-1 受体激动剂在帕金森病中的荟萃分析显示，其在临床试验中的疗效和安全性存在冲突结果。你在评估帕金森病患者的治疗时，需认识到 GLP-1 激动剂在运动症状缓解和疾病改善方面尚无定论，不应将其作为常规治疗推荐。
items.titleZh: 胰高血糖素样肽-1 激动剂在帕金森病中的应用：一项荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项荟萃分析系统评估了胰高血糖素样肽-1 受体激动剂在帕金森病中的疗效和安全性，鉴于临床试验结果存在冲突，区分了对症缓解和潜在疾病改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis of GLP-1 receptor agonists in Parkinson's disease shows conflicting results regarding their efficacy and safety in clinical trials. When evaluating treatments for Parkinson's patients, you should recognize that GLP-1 agonists have no conclusive benefit for motor symptom relief or disease modification and should not be recommended as routine treatment.
items.limitation: 荟萃分析的结果受限于纳入试验的质量和异质性，可能存在发表偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The meta-analysis results are limited by the quality and heterogeneity of included trials and may suffer from publication bias.

items.title: [World Report] England's long-term resident doctors’ dispute ends
items.summary: After a three-year dispute, the British Medical Association has accepted the UK government's offer for improved pay and training for resident doctors.
items.curatedReason: 报道称，英国医学会已接受政府关于提高住院医师薪酬和培训的提议，标志着持续三年的医患纠纷的结束。
items.titleZh: [世界报道] 英格兰住院医师长期纠纷结束
items.titleEn: [World Report] England's long-term resident doctors’ dispute ends
items.summaryZh: 经过长达三年的纠纷，英国医学会已接受政府关于提高住院医师薪酬和培训的提议。
items.curatedReasonEn: The British Medical Association has accepted the government's offer for improved pay and training for resident doctors, marking the end of a three-year dispute.
items.limitation: 新闻报道，非研究性内容。
items.limitationEn: News report, not research content.

items.title: [Health Policy] Children in all policies: lessons from a global collaboration to promote the health and wellbeing of children and future generations
items.summary: This policy article highlights the need to integrate children's needs, perspectives, and rights into all policies, introducing the 'Children in All Policies 2030' initiative.
items.curatedReason: 这篇政策文章强调了在所有政策中纳入儿童需求的重要性，并介绍了“所有政策中的儿童 2030”全球合作项目，旨在促进面向可持续未来的参与式、跨部门政策制定。
items.titleZh: [卫生政策] 所有政策中的儿童：促进儿童和子孙后代健康福祉的全球合作经验教训
items.titleEn: [Health Policy] Children in all policies: lessons from a global collaboration to promote the health and wellbeing of children and future generations
items.summaryZh: 这篇政策文章强调了在所有政策中纳入儿童需求的重要性，并介绍了“所有政策中的儿童 2030”全球合作项目，旨在促进面向可持续未来的参与式、跨部门政策制定。
items.curatedReasonEn: This policy piece underscores the importance of incorporating children's needs in all policies and introduces the 'Children in All Policies 2030' global collaboration, aimed at fostering participatory, intersectoral policymaking for a sustainable future.
items.limitation: 政策文章，非研究性内容。
items.limitationEn: Policy piece, not research content.

items.title: Correction: Fasting and sports: a summary statement of the IOC workshop
items.summary: A correction notice in the British Journal of Sports Medicine corrects the spelling of author Pamela Venning's name in an article summarizing an IOC workshop on fasting and sports.
items.curatedReason: 此为《英国运动医学杂志》上的一篇更正声明，纠正了一篇关于禁食和运动的 IOC 工作坊摘要文章中作者姓名的拼写错误。
items.titleZh: 更正：禁食与运动：国际奥委会工作坊的摘要声明
items.titleEn: Correction: Fasting and sports: a summary statement of the IOC workshop
items.summaryZh: 《英国运动医学杂志》上一篇关于禁食与运动的国际奥委会工作坊摘要文章，对其作者 Pamela Venning 的姓名拼写进行了更正。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a correction notice from the British Journal of Sports Medicine, rectifying a misspelling of an author's name in a summary statement article about an IOC workshop on fasting and sports.
items.limitation: 更正声明，非研究性内容。
items.limitationEn: Correction notice, not research content.

items.title: On thin ice: balancing Olympic pursuits and long-term health
items.summary: This perspective piece explores the intersection of elite athletic performance and long-term health, using personal experiences in figure skating to discuss challenges like body image and the physical toll of competition.
items.curatedReason: 这篇视角文章探讨了运动员在追求竞技巅峰的同时，如何平衡长期健康问题，特别是作者以自身花样滑冰经历为例，讨论了身体形象和运动带来的生理压力。
items.titleZh: 如履薄冰：平衡奥运追求与长期健康
items.titleEn: On thin ice: balancing Olympic pursuits and long-term health
items.summaryZh: 这篇视角文章探讨了竞技体育追求与长期健康之间的平衡，作者以自身花样滑冰经历为例，讨论了身体形象和运动带来的生理压力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This perspective piece discusses the balance between Olympic pursuits and long-term health, with the author using their figure skating experience to illustrate challenges related to body image and the physiological demands of elite sports.
items.limitation: 视角文章，非研究性内容。
items.limitationEn: Perspective piece, not research content.

items.title: Cost-effectiveness of Pilates compared with home-based exercises for people with chronic non-specific low back pain: a trial-based economic evaluation.
items.summary: A trial-based economic evaluation found Pilates to be cost-effective compared to home-based exercises for individuals with chronic non-specific low back pain in Brazil, showing similar outcomes from both healthcare and societal perspectives.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，对于慢性非特异性腰痛，普拉提在医疗和社会成本效益上与居家锻炼相当。如果你在考虑不同运动方式的推荐，这提示普拉提是个经济上可行且有效的选项。
items.titleZh: 普拉提与居家锻炼治疗慢性非特异性腰痛的成本效益：一项基于试验的经济学评估
items.summaryZh: 一项基于试验的经济学评估显示，在巴西，普拉提与居家锻炼治疗慢性非特异性腰痛在医疗和社会成本效益方面相当。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that Pilates is comparable to home-based exercises in terms of healthcare and societal cost-effectiveness for chronic non-specific low back pain. If you're considering recommending different exercise modalities, this suggests Pilates is an economically viable and effective option.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小，且仅针对巴西人群，外推至其他地区需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study's sample size is relatively small and it was conducted only in Brazil, so generalizing the findings to other populations should be done cautiously.

items.title: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study developed and validated a machine learning model using perioperative clinical parameters to predict reduced exercise capacity at 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery in 590 patients aged ≤75 years.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究开发并验证了一个预测心血管手术后运动不耐受的机器学习模型。在术后 3 个月，你可以利用出院时的临床参数进行早期风险识别，从而更早地介入康复，优化患者管理。
items.titleZh: 利用围手术期临床参数预测心血管手术后恢复期的运动不耐受
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究开发并验证了一个机器学习模型，该模型使用围手术期临床参数预测590名≤75岁心血管手术患者术后3个月的运动能力下降情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study developed and validated a machine learning model to predict exercise intolerance after cardiovascular surgery. You can use clinical parameters available at hospital discharge for early risk identification at 3 months post-op, enabling earlier rehabilitation intervention and optimizing patient management.
items.limitation: 这是一项单中心回顾性队列研究，模型的外推性和普遍适用性可能需要多中心前瞻性验证。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center retrospective cohort study, and the generalizability and applicability of the model may require multi-center prospective validation.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters

items.title: "If you don't sort out these problems, you end up building problems": a qualitative study exploring mouthcare at home with people with Parkinson's and their partners in care.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the experiences of 13 people with Parkinson's and 7 care partners regarding mouthcare activities at home, identifying motor and non-motor barriers such as reduced dexterity, fatigue, and apathy.
items.curatedReason: 帕金森病患者在家进行口腔护理面临运动和非运动障碍，如精细动作受限、疲劳和冷漠。在制定康复计划时，除了关注步态和平衡，你还需要考虑这些日常自理活动中的隐形挑战，并可能需要跨专业转诊以提升患者的整体生活质量。
items.titleZh: “如果你不解决这些问题，最终会制造更多问题”：一项关于帕金森病患者及其照护伙伴家庭口腔护理的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了13名帕金森病患者及其7名照护伙伴在家进行口腔护理的经历，发现了包括灵活性下降、疲劳和冷漠等运动及非运动障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: People with Parkinson's face motor and non-motor barriers to home mouthcare, including reduced dexterity, fatigue, and apathy. When developing rehabilitation plans, in addition to gait and balance, you need to consider these hidden challenges in daily self-care activities and may require interprofessional referrals to improve overall patient quality of life.
items.limitation: 定性研究结果的普遍适用性有限，主要反映特定受访者的主观体验。
items.limitationEn: The generalizability of qualitative research findings is limited, primarily reflecting the subjective experiences of specific interviewees.

items.title: Distinct Patterns of Mobility Recovery After Stroke Using Routine Clinical Data
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study identified distinct mobility recovery trajectories in stroke patients using Activity Measure for Post-Acute Care (AM-PAC) Basic Mobility data from 700 patients, challenging the traditional average recovery patterns.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究利用真实世界数据识别了卒中后活动能力恢复的独特模式，表明个体恢复路径差异显著。这挑战了单一的平均恢复模式观念，对你进行预后评估和制定个性化康复方案有重要参考价值。
items.titleZh: 利用常规临床数据识别卒中后活动能力恢复的独特模式
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究利用来自 700 名卒中患者的 AM-PAC 基本活动能力数据，识别了卒中后活动能力恢复的独特轨迹模式，挑战了传统的平均恢复模式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study uses real-world data to identify distinct patterns of mobility recovery after stroke, indicating significant individual variability in recovery trajectories. This challenges the notion of a single average recovery pattern and provides crucial insights for your prognostication and personalized rehabilitation planning.
items.limitation: 该研究是回顾性队列研究，且只纳入了单一大型医疗系统的数据，可能存在选择偏倚和外推性限制。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective cohort study and included data only from a single large health system, which may introduce selection bias and limit generalizability.

items.title: The effect of exercise on clinical pain: a systematic umbrella review and meta-meta-analysis
items.summary: An umbrella review and meta-meta-analysis synthesized evidence from 11 databases, confirming the consistent and significant analgesic effects of exercise across various pain conditions and exercise modalities.
items.curatedReason: 这是运动镇痛效应的最高级别证据。无论何种疼痛类型或运动方式，运动疗法作为一线干预的地位得到进一步巩固。在临床实践中，你应该坚定地向患者推荐运动治疗，并根据具体情况选择合适的运动方案。
items.titleZh: 运动对临床疼痛影响的系统性伞形综述和荟萃再分析
items.summaryZh: 一项伞形综述和荟萃再分析综合了 11 个数据库的证据，证实了运动对各种疼痛状况和运动模式均具有持续且显著的镇痛作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is the highest level of evidence for exercise-induced analgesia. The role of exercise therapy as a first-line intervention is further solidified, regardless of pain type or exercise modality. In clinical practice, you should confidently recommend exercise to patients, tailoring the program to their specific condition.
items.limitation: 伞形综述的局限性在于其纳入的原始研究异质性可能较高，且效应量可能因底层研究设计而异。
items.limitationEn: Limitations of umbrella reviews include potential high heterogeneity among included primary studies and variability in effect sizes due to underlying study designs.

items.title: Validity and reliability of remote administration of the one-leg stand, timed up and go and 30-second sit-to-stand via video call in patients with lumbar spinal stenosis awaiting decompression surgery | BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders
items.summary: A study validated the reliability of remote administration of the one-leg stand, timed up and go, and 30-second sit-to-stand tests via video call in patients with lumbar spinal stenosis, showing strong agreement with in-person assessments.
items.curatedReason: 远程评估工具在脊柱管狭窄患者中的有效性得到了验证。这意味着你可以更灵活地使用远程医疗技术，对等待手术的腰椎管狭窄患者进行跌倒风险和功能评估，提高患者的可及性。
items.titleZh: 视频通话远程实施单腿站立、计时起身行走和 30 秒坐站测试在腰椎管狭窄症患者中的有效性和可靠性
items.summaryZh: 一项研究验证了通过视频通话对腰椎管狭窄症患者进行单腿站立、计时起身行走和 30 秒坐站测试的有效性和可靠性，结果显示与现场评估具有高度一致性。
items.curatedReasonEn: The validity and reliability of remote assessment tools for lumbar spinal stenosis patients have been validated. This means you can more flexibly use telehealth technology to assess fall risk and function in patients awaiting decompression surgery for lumbar spinal stenosis, improving patient access.
items.limitation: 本研究的样本量和患者特征可能限制其外推性，且远程评估可能无法捕捉所有线下评估的细节。
items.limitationEn: The sample size and patient characteristics of this study may limit its generalizability, and remote assessments may not capture all the details of in-person evaluations.

items.title: Family-Based Group Intervention Revitalizes the Psychosocial Well-Being of Adolescents with Scoliosis Receiving Brace Treatment | Child and Adolescent Social Work Journal
items.summary: A study found that a family-based group intervention revitalized the psychosocial well-being of adolescents with scoliosis receiving brace treatment, supporting non-operative modality for preventing spinal curvature progression.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究证实了以家庭为基础的团体干预能有效改善接受支具治疗的青少年脊柱侧弯患者的社会心理健康。在临床实践中，你应该重视并推广这种家庭参与模式，因为它能提升治疗依从性和整体预后。
items.titleZh: 家庭团体干预改善接受支具治疗青少年脊柱侧弯患者的社会心理健康
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，家庭团体干预能改善接受支具治疗的青少年脊柱侧弯患者的社会心理健康，支持非手术方式预防脊柱弯曲进展。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study confirms that family-based group interventions effectively improve the psychosocial well-being of adolescents with scoliosis undergoing brace treatment. In clinical practice, you should prioritize and promote this family-involved model, as it can enhance treatment adherence and overall prognosis.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，可能存在选择偏倚和混杂因素，需要更严格的随机对照试验来进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This observational study may be subject to selection bias and confounding factors, requiring more rigorous randomized controlled trials for further validation.

items.title: Online modulation of neural drive to lower motor neurons with high-definition transcranial alternating current stimulation (HD-tACS) | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation
items.summary: This research explored the online modulation of neural drive to lower motor neurons using high-definition transcranial alternating current stimulation (HD-tACS), demonstrating its potential for non-invasive brain stimulation.
items.curatedReason: 高清晰度经颅交流电刺激（HD-tACS）在线调节下运动神经元神经驱动的研究，为神经康复提供了潜在的新技术。虽然仍处于基础研究阶段，但你可以关注这类技术在未来临床应用中的转化潜力。
items.titleZh: 高清晰度经颅交流电刺激（HD-tACS）在线调节下运动神经元神经驱动
items.summaryZh: 这项研究探讨了使用高清晰度经颅交流电刺激（HD-tACS）在线调节下运动神经元神经驱动，展示了其在非侵入性脑刺激方面的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This research on online modulation of neural drive to lower motor neurons with high-definition transcranial alternating current stimulation (HD-tACS) offers a potential new technology for neurorehabilitation. While still in foundational research, you can monitor the translational potential of such technologies for future clinical applications.
items.limitation: 本研究探索了方法学可行性，但临床转化前景和实际疗效仍需大规模临床试验验证。
items.limitationEn: This study explored methodological feasibility, but its clinical translation and actual efficacy require validation through large-scale clinical trials.

items.title: Stepwise surgical management of spasticity and dystonia in severe pediatric cerebral palsy: a case report involving selective dorsal rhizotomy, intrathecal baclofen therapy, and deep brain stimulation | Child's Nervous System
items.summary: A case report detailed the stepwise surgical management of spasticity and dystonia in severe pediatric cerebral palsy, involving selective dorsal rhizotomy, intrathecal baclofen therapy, and deep brain stimulation.
items.curatedReason: 这篇病例报告展示了对严重儿童脑瘫患者痉挛和肌张力障碍的阶梯式手术管理方法。对于物理治疗师而言，了解这些复杂的神经外科干预手段，有助于你更好地参与跨学科团队的病例管理，并制定术后康复计划。
items.titleZh: 严重儿童脑瘫患者痉挛和肌张力障碍的阶梯式手术管理：一例选择性脊神经后根切断术、鞘内巴氯芬治疗和深部脑刺激的病例报告
items.summaryZh: 一篇病例报告详细描述了对严重儿童脑瘫患者痉挛和肌张力障碍的阶梯式手术管理，包括选择性脊神经后根切断术、鞘内巴氯芬治疗和深部脑刺激。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report showcases a stepwise surgical management approach for spasticity and dystonia in severe pediatric cerebral palsy patients. For physical therapists, understanding these complex neurosurgical interventions can help you better participate in interdisciplinary team case management and develop postoperative rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 本研究为病例报告，其发现不具普遍性，仅作为临床经验的参考。
items.limitationEn: This is a case report, so its findings are not generalizable and serve only as a reference for clinical experience.

items.title: and- see approach in a gluteal tendinopathy trial: a ...
items.summary: A qualitative follow-up study from 2021 explored the perspectives and experiences of people assigned to a 'wait-and-see' approach in a gluteal tendinopathy trial.
items.curatedReason: 这篇发表于 2021 年的研究，讨论的是一项关于臀肌肌腱病“等待观望”方法的定性随访研究，已较为陈旧。虽然定性研究提供了患者视角，但对当前临床实践的指导意义有限。
items.titleZh: 臀肌肌腱病试验中“等待观望”方法的患者视角和经验：一项定性随访研究
items.summaryZh: 一项 2021 年的定性随访研究探讨了臀肌肌腱病试验中被分配到“等待观望”方法的患者的观点和经验。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 2021 study on a qualitative follow-up of a 'wait-and-see' approach for gluteal tendinopathy is outdated. While qualitative research offers patient perspectives, its relevance to current clinical practice is limited.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小，结果不具普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study has a small sample size and its results are not generalizable.

items.title: The NeuroWES project: lessons learned from comprehensive phenotyping and genetic analysis of neurodevelopmental disorders over a decade | Human Genetics
items.summary: The NeuroWES project summarized lessons learned from a decade of comprehensive phenotyping and genetic analysis of neurodevelopmental disorders, highlighting challenges in variant interpretation in heterogeneous cohorts.
items.curatedReason: “NeuroWES 项目”总结了十年间神经发育障碍综合表型分析和遗传分析的经验教训。对于物理治疗师而言，了解基因在神经发育障碍中的作用，有助于你更好地理解疾病的复杂性，但对直接康复干预的指导意义有限。
items.titleZh: NeuroWES 项目：十年神经发育障碍综合表型和遗传分析的经验教训
items.summaryZh: NeuroWES 项目总结了十年间神经发育障碍综合表型和遗传分析的经验教训，强调了在异质性队列中解读变异体的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: The NeuroWES project summarizes lessons learned from a decade of comprehensive phenotyping and genetic analysis of neurodevelopmental disorders. For physical therapists, understanding the role of genetics in neurodevelopmental disorders helps you better grasp disease complexity, but its direct guidance for rehabilitation interventions is limited.
items.limitation: 本研究侧重于遗传学分析和表型描述，而非直接康复干预的疗效评估。
items.limitationEn: This study focuses on genetic analysis and phenotypic description, rather than directly evaluating the efficacy of rehabilitation interventions.

items.title: Early Childhood Educators’ Doings to Facilitate Children’s Participation in Play: A Scoping Review and Thematic Analysis of Research Literature | International Journal of Early Childhood
items.summary: A scoping review and thematic analysis explored early childhood educators' strategies to facilitate children's participation in play, emphasizing its role in quality education and care.
items.curatedReason: 虽然这项综述聚焦早期儿童教育，但它强调了游戏对儿童发展的重要性。你可以借鉴其理念，在与有发育障碍儿童的家庭沟通时，突出游戏在促进发展和参与中的关键作用，并指导家长如何通过游戏进行康复。
items.titleZh: 早期儿童教育者促进儿童参与游戏的方法：一项研究文献的范围综述和主题分析
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述和主题分析探讨了早期儿童教育者促进儿童参与游戏的方法，强调了其在优质教育和照护中的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: Although this review focuses on early childhood education, it highlights the importance of play for child development. You can draw upon its insights when communicating with families of children with developmental disorders, emphasizing the critical role of play in promoting development and participation, and guiding parents on how to incorporate play into rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究为范围综述，主要旨在描绘文献而非评估干预措施的有效性。
items.limitationEn: This scoping review primarily aims to map the literature rather than evaluate the effectiveness of interventions.

items.title: A Scoping Review of Methods for Extrapolating Costs and Effects in Economic Evaluations of Remote Monitoring | PharmacoEconomics - Open
items.summary: A scoping review identified methods for extrapolating costs and effects in economic evaluations of remote monitoring, highlighting challenges due to often insufficient methodological quality and lack of long-term data.
items.curatedReason: 远程监测的经济学评估在外推成本和效果方面存在方法学挑战和数据不足的问题。你可以关注这些不足如何影响远程康复服务的经济价值判断和政策制定，但不应将当前结果视为远程医疗经济效益的最终定论。
items.titleZh: 远程监测经济学评估中成本和效果外推方法的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述识别了远程监测经济学评估中成本和效果外推的方法，强调了方法学质量不足和长期数据缺乏所带来的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: Economic evaluations of remote monitoring face methodological challenges and data limitations in extrapolating costs and effects. You should monitor how these shortcomings impact the economic valuation and policy-making for remote rehabilitation services, but do not consider current results as the final word on the economic benefits of telehealth.
items.limitation: 本研究为方法学综述，未提供具体的临床干预效果数据。
items.limitationEn: This study is a methodological review and does not provide specific clinical intervention efficacy data.

items.title: Task-Oriented training in a Patient with Triplegia: Post-Stroke Hemiparesis Complicating Pre-Existing Contralateral Upper Extremity Paralysis: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report of a 75-year-old man with triplegia following stroke, demonstrating that intensive inpatient task-oriented training led to significant improvements in Fugl-Meyer Assessment-UE scores (from 3 to 43 by 23 weeks) and functional independence, maintained at 1-year follow-up.
items.curatedReason: 这个病例报告展示了针对三肢瘫患者的任务导向训练在卒中后早期干预中的潜力。虽然只是个案，但也提示了复杂病例的功能恢复路径。
items.titleZh: 三肢瘫患者的任务导向训练：一例既往对侧上肢瘫痪后并发卒中偏瘫的病例报告。
items.summaryZh: 一例 75 岁卒中后三肢瘫患者的病例报告显示，强化住院任务导向训练使其 Fugl-Meyer 评估上肢评分从 3 分提高到 23 周时的 43 分，功能独立性显著改善，并在 1 年随访时得以维持。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report illustrates the potential of task-oriented training for triplegia patients in early post-stroke intervention. While a single case, it offers insights into functional recovery pathways for complex cases.
items.limitation: 单病例报告，结果无法泛化。
items.limitationEn: Single case report, results are not generalizable.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Retrospective analysis of the relationship between post-stroke fatigue and aphasia severity
items.summary: A retrospective analysis explored the relationship between post-stroke fatigue, a common and chronic condition affecting 25-85% of stroke survivors, and aphasia severity. It emphasizes the variability in reported prevalence due to methodological differences and the long-term impact of fatigue on quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 本回顾性分析强调了卒中后疲劳与失语症严重程度之间的潜在关联。理解这种关系能帮助你更全面地评估卒中患者，特别是在制定康复计划时，应将疲劳作为关键因素纳入考量。
items.titleZh: 卒中后疲劳与失语症严重程度之间关系的回顾性分析。
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性分析探讨了卒中后疲劳（一种影响 25-85% 卒中幸存者的常见慢性疾病）与失语症严重程度之间的关系。该研究强调了由于方法学差异导致的患病率报告变异性，以及疲劳对生活质量的长期影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective analysis highlights a potential association between post-stroke fatigue and aphasia severity. Understanding this relationship can help you conduct more comprehensive assessments of stroke patients, especially when developing rehabilitation plans, where fatigue should be considered a key factor.
items.limitation: 回顾性研究，存在潜在的选择偏差和混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: Retrospective study with potential selection bias and confounding factors.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: APTA, Hartford HealthCare Launch Frailty Pilot to Advance Value-Based Care
items.summary: APTA and Hartford HealthCare have launched a pilot program focusing on frailty to advance value-based care, highlighting the expanding role of physical therapy in preventive and integrated health models.
items.curatedReason: APTA 此次联手 Hartford HealthCare 开展衰弱试点项目，明确了一个信号：物理治疗在价值医疗体系中的地位正日益巩固。留意你所在区域是否有这类预示 PT 市场机会的整合性项目，尤其是针对老年衰弱的预防和管理。
items.titleZh: APTA 与 Hartford HealthCare 启动衰弱试点项目，推进价值医疗
items.summaryZh: APTA 与 Hartford HealthCare 合作启动一项衰弱试点项目，旨在推进价值医疗，突显了物理治疗在预防和整合健康模型中日益增长的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This APTA-Hartford HealthCare frailty pilot solidifies physical therapy's growing role within value-based care models. Keep an eye out for similar integrated programs in your market, especially those targeting geriatric frailty prevention and management, as they signal direct PT opportunities.
