items.title: Development and Preliminary Clinical Feasibility of a Wearable Nanovibration Delivery Device for Localised Bone Stimulation in Individuals with Spinal Cord Injury
items.summary: A wearable nanovibration delivery device was developed and demonstrated preliminary clinical feasibility for localized bone stimulation at the distal femur in individuals with spinal cord injury, aiming to address rapid bone loss in paralyzed lower limbs.
items.curatedReason: 这款可穿戴纳米振动设备有望作为脊髓损伤患者局部骨刺激的靶向干预手段。虽然目前仍处于初步可行性验证阶段，但它为未来预防和治疗 SCI 骨质疏松提供了新的研究方向。
items.titleZh: 可穿戴纳米振动递送设备在脊髓损伤患者局部骨刺激中的开发及初步临床可行性
items.summaryZh: 一项研究开发了一款可穿戴纳米振动递送设备，并在脊髓损伤患者的股骨远端局部骨刺激中展示了初步临床可行性，旨在解决瘫痪下肢的快速骨丢失问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This wearable nanovibration device shows promise as a targeted intervention for localized bone stimulation in individuals with spinal cord injury. While currently in preliminary feasibility, it opens new research avenues for preventing and treating SCI-related osteoporosis.
items.limitation: 本研究为初步的临床可行性验证，样本量小，且尚未报告长期疗效和安全性数据。
items.limitationEn: This study is a preliminary clinical feasibility investigation with a small sample size and lacks long-term efficacy and safety data.

items.title: WebPT Introduces the Next Generation of AI-Powered Revenue Cycle Management for Rehab Therapy
items.summary: WebPT has introduced its next generation of AI-powered Revenue Cycle Management (RCM) solutions for rehab therapy, aiming to optimize billing and payment processes for clinics.
items.curatedReason: WebPT 的新一代 AI-RCM 解决方案，旨在优化计费和支付流程。这意味着你的诊所若能有效整合，有望在索赔管理和支付效率上实现显著提升。
items.titleZh: WebPT 推出新一代 AI 驱动的康复治疗营收周期管理解决方案
items.summaryZh: WebPT 发布了新一代 AI 驱动的康复治疗营收周期管理（RCM）解决方案，旨在优化诊所的计费和支付流程。
items.curatedReasonEn: WebPT's new AI-RCM solution aims to optimize billing and payment processes. This means your clinic could see significant gains in claims management and payment efficiency if integrated effectively.

items.title: Comparative efficacy of different joint mobilization techniques in shoulder adhesive capsulitis: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis compared different non-thrust joint mobilization techniques for shoulder adhesive capsulitis, finding generally similar clinical effects on objective and subjective outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 肩关节粘连性囊炎（冻结肩）非推拿关节松动术的系统综述和荟萃分析显示，不同技术间的疗效差异不大。在选择具体松动技术时，优先考虑你最熟练且患者依从性最高的方案。
items.titleZh: 肩关节粘连性囊炎不同关节松动技术的疗效比较：随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析比较了肩关节粘连性囊炎患者采用不同非推拿关节松动技术（单独或联合应用）对客观和主观结局的临床效果，发现总体疗效无显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis on non-thrust joint mobilization for adhesive capsulitis suggests no significant efficacy differences among various techniques. Prioritize techniques you are most proficient in and that maximize patient adherence.
items.limitation: 本综述检索窗口延长至 2025 年 11 月，但发表日期是 2026 年 7 月，可能存在部分纳入文献与检索时间点不完全一致的潜在风险，需警惕未来新证据。
items.limitationEn: The review's search window extending to November 2025 with a publication date of July 2026 suggests a potential risk of mismatch between included literature and search timeline, requiring vigilance for future evidence.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: Real-World Outcomes of a Telephone-Based Virtual Cognitive Rehabilitation Therapy Program: A Retrospective Cohort Analysis
items.summary: A retrospective observational analysis of 141 older adults with MCI or early-stage dementia showed a telephone-based virtual cognitive rehabilitation program combining SLP-led sessions with automated voice exercises improved daily functioning.
items.curatedReason: 对于患有轻度认知障碍或早期痴呆的患者，这种电话结合自动化语音的认知康复模式显示出实际疗效，证明了远程认知康复在提高可及性方面的潜力。
items.titleZh: 电话虚拟认知康复治疗项目的真实世界效果：一项回顾性队列分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对 141 名老年患者的回顾性观察分析显示，结合言语治疗师主导和自动化语音代理辅助的电话虚拟认知康复项目，能改善轻度认知障碍和早期痴呆患者的日常功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: For patients with mild cognitive impairment or early-stage dementia, this telephone-based cognitive rehabilitation model combining SLP-led sessions with automated voice exercises shows real-world efficacy, demonstrating the potential of remote cognitive rehabilitation to improve access.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性观察分析，可能存在选择偏倚和混杂因素，不能完全排除未知变量对结果的影响，且缺乏对照组比较。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective observational analysis may be subject to selection bias and confounding factors, as it cannot fully exclude the influence of unmeasured variables and lacks a control group for comparison.

items.title: Examination and treatment of the spine for upper extremity pain: a case series.
items.summary: This case series describes three patients with upper extremity pain who achieved clinically significant improvements in self-reported disability after receiving spine mobilization or manipulation techniques, even when their symptoms did not correspond with typical pain referral patterns.
items.curatedReason: 这份病例系列提示，当上肢疼痛呈现非典型模式时，不要只盯着局部，也要考虑评估和处理脊柱，特别是颈胸段脊柱功能障碍是否为潜在的疼痛来源。
items.titleZh: 脊柱检查与治疗对上肢疼痛的疗效：一个病例系列
items.summaryZh: 本病例系列报告了三名上肢疼痛患者，他们在接受脊柱松动或手法治疗后，自我报告残疾程度得到临床显著改善，即使症状不符合典型的疼痛放射模式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case series suggests that when upper extremity pain presents atypically, consider evaluating and treating the spine, especially cervical and thoracic dysfunction, as a potential pain source, rather than focusing solely on local issues.
items.limitation: 本研究为病例系列，证据等级低，无法提供关于脊柱干预与上肢疼痛改善之间因果关系的强证据，需要高阶设计研究验证。
items.limitationEn: As a case series, this study provides low-level evidence and cannot establish a strong causal link between spinal intervention and upper extremity pain improvement; higher-level studies are needed for validation.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: CMS Proposes Transformational Medicare Reforms to Expand Accountable Care, Modernize Physician Payment, and Shift from Sick Care to Healthcare
items.summary: CMS proposes transformational Medicare reforms to expand accountable care, modernize physician payment, and shift from sick care to healthcare.
items.curatedReason: CMS 正在提议进行重大医保改革，旨在扩大责任制医疗（Accountable Care）并实现医生支付现代化，将重心从病患治疗转向健康维护。这些改革有望影响你未来与医保体系的互动方式，包括报销结构和提供服务的模式。
items.titleZh: CMS 提议改革医保，旨在扩大责任制医疗、实现医生支付现代化，并将重心从疾病治疗转向健康维护
items.summaryZh: 美国医疗保险和医疗补助服务中心（CMS）提议对医保进行变革性改革，以扩大责任制医疗、实现医生支付现代化，并将服务重心从疾病治疗转向健康维护。
items.curatedReasonEn: CMS is proposing significant Medicare reforms aimed at expanding Accountable Care and modernizing physician payment, shifting the focus from sick care to healthcare. These reforms are likely to impact how you interact with the Medicare system in the future, including reimbursement structures and service delivery models.

items.title: Calendar Year (CY) 2027 Medicare Physician Fee Schedule Proposed Rule (CMS-1848-P) — Medicare Shared Savings Program Proposals
items.summary: The Calendar Year (CY) 2027 Medicare Physician Fee Schedule Proposed Rule (CMS-1848-P) includes proposals related to the Medicare Shared Savings Program.
items.curatedReason: CMS 2027 医保医生收费标准拟议规则（Physician Fee Schedule Proposed Rule）包含针对 Medicare Shared Savings Program (MSSP) 的重要调整。这些提议直接影响你在美国作为物理治疗师的收入和业务模式，特别是如果你参与了 ACO（Accountable Care Organization）模式。仔细审阅这些细节，它们将塑造未来你的执业环境。
items.titleZh: 2027 日历年医保医生收费标准拟议规则（CMS-1848-P）—— Medicare 共享储蓄计划提案
items.summaryZh: 2027 日历年医保医生收费标准拟议规则（CMS-1848-P）提出了关于 Medicare 共享储蓄计划（Medicare Shared Savings Program）的建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: The CMS Calendar Year (CY) 2027 Medicare Physician Fee Schedule Proposed Rule includes significant adjustments to the Medicare Shared Savings Program (MSSP). These proposals directly impact your earnings and business model as a physical therapist in the U.S., especially if you participate in Accountable Care Organizations (ACOs). Review these details carefully, as they will shape your future practice environment.

items.title: The impact of anxiety/depression symptoms on return to work in patients with chronic neck or back pain: a longitudinal cohort study from the Norwegian neck and back registry | BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders
items.summary: A longitudinal cohort study from the Norwegian neck and back registry investigated the impact of anxiety/depression symptoms on return to work in patients with chronic neck or back pain, identifying them as leading causes of non-fatal health loss.
items.curatedReason: 焦虑/抑郁症状会显著影响慢性颈痛或腰痛患者的重返工作能力。这意味着，在康复方案中，你需要将患者的心理健康筛查和必要时的心理支持或转诊，纳入综合评估和管理。
items.titleZh: 焦虑/抑郁症状对慢性颈痛或腰痛患者重返工作的影响：一项挪威颈背部登记的纵向队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项来自挪威颈背部登记的纵向队列研究调查了焦虑/抑郁症状对慢性颈痛或腰痛患者重返工作的影响，指出这些症状是非致命健康损失的主要原因。
items.curatedReasonEn: Anxiety/depression symptoms significantly impact the return-to-work ability of patients with chronic neck or back pain. This means you need to integrate mental health screening and, if necessary, psychological support or referral into your comprehensive assessment and management for these patients.
items.limitation: 作为队列研究，可能存在混杂因素影响重返工作结果，且其在挪威人群中的发现，外推至其他文化和医疗系统可能需要谨慎。
items.limitationEn: As a cohort study, confounding factors may influence return-to-work outcomes, and its findings in the Norwegian population may require caution when extrapolating to other cultures and healthcare systems.

items.title: Professional reintegration after stroke: experiences of Portuguese stroke survivors.
items.summary: A brief report exploring Portuguese stroke survivors' return-to-work experiences highlighted challenges such as managing physical and cognitive impairments, fatigue, and insufficient workplace adaptations, often in the absence of specific policies.
items.curatedReason: 卒中幸存者重返工作面临多重挑战，包括生理、认知障碍和工作场所适应性不足。作为康复医师，你在制定回归社会计划时，需要更全面地考虑这些因素，并倡导多学科合作，以提高重返工作的成功率。
items.titleZh: 卒中后专业再融入：葡萄牙卒中幸存者的经验
items.summaryZh: 一份简要报告探讨了葡萄牙卒中幸存者重返工作的经验，强调了他们在应对躯体和认知障碍、疲劳以及工作场所适应性不足方面面临的挑战，通常在缺乏具体政策的情况下。
items.curatedReasonEn: Stroke survivors face multiple challenges in returning to work, including physical and cognitive impairments and inadequate workplace adaptations. As a rehabilitation clinician, you need to consider these factors more comprehensively when developing return-to-society plans and advocate for multidisciplinary collaboration to improve the success rate of return to work.
items.limitation: 该报告主要基于葡萄牙卒中幸存者的经验，其文化和社会背景可能限制结果对其他人群的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This report is primarily based on the experiences of Portuguese stroke survivors, and its cultural and social context may limit the generalizability of findings to other populations.

items.title: Adherence to exercise intervention including pain threshold, exercise and physiotherapy sessions for patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy
items.summary: This study aims to investigate adherence to two pain threshold protocols during a 26-week exercise intervention for chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy, focusing on adherence to pain thresholds, exercise, and physiotherapy sessions.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项探索性研究，旨在了解慢性肩袖肌腱病患者在长达 26 周的运动干预中，对两种疼痛阈值方案的依从性。研究尚未公布结果，但它提示了我们应该关注患者在实际治疗中对疼痛管理策略的执行情况。
items.titleZh: 慢性肩袖肌腱病患者运动干预（含疼痛阈值、运动和物理治疗）的依从性研究
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在调查慢性肩袖肌腱病患者在为期 26 周的运动干预中，对疼痛阈值协议、运动和物理治疗疗程的依从性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is an exploratory study investigating adherence to two pain threshold protocols over a 26-week exercise intervention for chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy. While results are not yet available, it reminds us to consider patient compliance with pain management strategies during actual treatment.
items.limitation: 研究设计未明确说明，且尚未报告具体结果和结论。
items.limitationEn: The study design is not clearly stated, and specific results and conclusions have not yet been reported.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial investigates the long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain, a condition affecting 3% to 4% of adults worldwide.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 为慢性外侧肘痛提供了新的微创干预选项。如果患者对传统保守治疗反应不佳，你可以考虑转诊或与团队讨论将超声引导经皮电神经刺激作为潜在治疗方案，但记住其长期效果仍需更多验证。
items.titleZh: 超声引导经皮电神经刺激治疗慢性外侧肘痛的长期疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验探讨了超声引导经皮电神经刺激治疗慢性外侧肘痛的长期疗效。慢性外侧肘痛影响全球约 3% 至 4% 的成年人。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT offers a new minimally invasive intervention for chronic lateral elbow pain. If patients respond poorly to traditional conservative treatments, you might consider referral or discuss ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation as a potential option, keeping in mind that its long-term efficacy needs further validation.
items.limitation: 研究未明确报告样本量，且该技术依赖超声引导，对操作者的技能和设备有较高要求，可能影响其在普适临床实践中的可推广性。
items.limitationEn: The study did not explicitly report the sample size. Additionally, this technique relies on ultrasound guidance, requiring high operator skill and specialized equipment, which may limit its generalizability in widespread clinical practice.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Applications of ICF-Based Assessments and Interventions in Post-Stroke Rehabilitation: A Narrative Review.
items.summary: A narrative review synthesized 166 studies on ICF-based assessments and interventions in post-stroke rehabilitation, mapping 546 assessments to the ICF framework, with over 80% overlap with UK Stroke Guideline topics.
items.curatedReason: ICF 框架下的评估和干预在卒中康复中得到广泛应用，本综述帮你快速了解现有研究主要集中在哪些方面、与 UK 指南的契合度。但具体应用策略还得看未来更高级别的证据。
items.titleZh: 基于 ICF 评估和干预在卒中康复中的应用：一项叙述性综述
items.summaryZh: 一项叙述性综述综合了 166 项关于卒中后康复中基于 ICF 评估和干预的研究，将 546 项评估映射到 ICF 框架，与英国卒中指南主题重叠超过 80%。
items.curatedReasonEn: ICF-based assessments and interventions are widely used in stroke rehabilitation. This review helps you quickly understand current research focus areas and alignment with UK guidelines. However, specific application strategies still require higher-level evidence.
items.limitation: 本综述属于叙述性综述，可能存在选择偏倚，且未提供具体干预措施的疗效数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a narrative review, which may be subject to selection bias and does not provide efficacy data for specific interventions.

items.title: Unicompartmental knee arthroplasty and total knee arthroplasty in patients with 15 or more degrees of varus deformity: age- and gender-matched comparative study of radiographic and clinical outcomes | Archives of Orthopaedic and Trauma Surgery
items.summary: An age- and gender-matched comparative study investigated radiographic and clinical outcomes of unicompartmental knee arthroplasty versus total knee arthroplasty in patients with 15 or more degrees of varus deformity.
items.curatedReason: 对于内翻畸形超过 15 度的患者，单髁置换术与全膝置换术在放射学和临床结果上可能存在差异。这项观察性研究提示，在解释重度内翻畸形患者的手术选择和预期结果时，应更审慎地权衡两种术式。
items.titleZh: 重度内翻畸形患者单髁与全膝关节置换术的影像学和临床结果比较研究
items.summaryZh: 一项年龄和性别匹配的比较研究，探讨了在内翻畸形超过 15 度的患者中，单髁膝关节置换术与全膝关节置换术在影像学和临床结果方面的差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: For patients with varus deformity greater than 15 degrees, unicompartmental versus total knee arthroplasty may yield different radiographic and clinical outcomes. This observational study suggests a more cautious approach when explaining surgical options and anticipated results for severe varus deformity, carefully weighing both procedures.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性病例对照研究，存在选择偏倚，且随访时间未在摘要中明确提及。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective case-control study with selection bias, and follow-up duration is not explicitly mentioned in the abstract.

items.title: Mechanisms of Idiopathic Neurodegeneration in Substantia Nigra Neurons: Biochemical, Physiological, and Immuno-Humoral Perspectives | Current Behavioral Neuroscience Reports
items.summary: This review critically synthesizes proposed mechanisms underlying idiopathic neurodegeneration of substantia nigra neurons, emphasizing age-related vulnerability and neuron-specific factors.
items.curatedReason: 黑质神经元特发性神经退行性变的机制复杂，与年龄相关脆弱性和神经元特异性因素有关。这篇综述深化了我们对帕金森病等神经退行性疾病病理生理学的理解，但目前仍停留在理论层面，对你直接的临床实践指导有限。
items.titleZh: 黑质神经元特发性神经退行性变的机制：生化、生理和免疫体液视角
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述批判性地综合了黑质神经元特发性神经退行性变的机制，强调了年龄相关脆弱性和神经元特异性因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Idiopathic neurodegeneration of substantia nigra neurons is complex, linked to age-related vulnerability and neuron-specific factors. This review deepens our understanding of the pathophysiology of neurodegenerative diseases like Parkinson's, but remains theoretical with limited direct guidance for your clinical practice.
items.limitation: 这是一篇综述，主要关注理论机制，而非临床干预或患者结局。
items.limitationEn: This is a review, primarily focusing on theoretical mechanisms rather than clinical interventions or patient outcomes.

items.title: Exploration of Exercise-Induced Gastrointestinal Syndrome in Endurance-Trained Adolescents: Is There Cause for Concern in Regard to Ultra-endurance Event Participation | Sports Medicine - Open
items.summary: An original research article explored exercise-induced gastrointestinal syndrome (EIGS) in endurance-trained adolescents, questioning the cause for concern regarding ultra-endurance event participation.
items.curatedReason: 耐力训练青少年可能存在运动性胃肠道综合征（EIGS）的风险，但这篇观察性研究对超耐力项目的参与是否应引起担忧提出了疑问。仍需更多证据来明确EIGS在青少年超耐力运动员中的实际风险。
items.titleZh: 耐力训练青少年运动性胃肠道综合征的探索：超耐力赛事参与是否引起关注？
items.summaryZh: 一篇原创研究文章探讨了耐力训练青少年中运动性胃肠道综合征（EIGS）的现象，并质疑其在超耐力赛事参与方面是否应引起关注。
items.curatedReasonEn: Endurance-trained adolescents may be at risk for exercise-induced gastrointestinal syndrome (EIGS), but this observational study questions whether ultra-endurance event participation should be a cause for concern. More evidence is needed to clarify the actual risk of EIGS in adolescent ultra-endurance athletes.
items.limitation: 这是一项原始研究文章，不是系统综述，其结论可能需要更多研究验证。
items.limitationEn: This is an original research article, not a systematic review, and its conclusions may require further verification through more studies.

items.title: Assessment and Management Practices for Post-Stroke Shoulder Pain Among Rehabilitation Professionals in Vietnam: A Cross-Sectional Survey.
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey in Vietnam identified variations in assessment and management practices for post-stroke shoulder pain among rehabilitation professionals, highlighting potential evidence-practice gaps and barriers to effective care in lower- and middle-income countries.
items.curatedReason: 本项调查描绘了越南卒中后肩痛的评估与管理现状，提示当地康复专业人员的实践可能与循证指南存在差异。虽然不直接改变你的临床决策，但为了解全球实践差距提供了一个侧面视角。
items.titleZh: 越南康复专业人员卒中后肩痛评估与管理实践：一项横断面调查
items.summaryZh: 一项在越南进行的横断面调查发现，当地康复专业人员在卒中后肩痛的评估和管理实践上存在差异，揭示了中低收入国家在循证实践与有效护理方面的潜在差距和障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study from Vietnam suggests variations in assessment and management practices for post-stroke shoulder pain, possibly indicating evidence-practice gaps. It highlights potential challenges in rehabilitation practices within lower- and middle-income countries.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，仅反映特定时期的实践，无法揭示实践变化趋势或因果关系。
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional survey, this study only reflects practices at a specific time and cannot reveal trends in practice changes or causal relationships.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Transcranial Direct Current Stimulation (tDCS) Application in Neurorehabilitation: A Beginner’s Guide for Clinicians
items.summary: This clinician's guide outlines transcranial direct current stimulation (tDCS) as a noninvasive brain stimulation technique that modulates brain excitability at subthreshold levels, highlighting its low cost (often <$1k) and ease of integration with rehabilitation therapy.
items.curatedReason: 经颅直流电刺激（tDCS）作为一种经济且易于整合的非侵入性脑刺激技术，正被越来越多地应用于神经康复。这份“初学者指南”为你提供了 tDCS 的基本原理、操作细节和临床考量，帮助你了解是否适合将其引入你的实践。
items.titleZh: 经颅直流电刺激（tDCS）在神经康复中的应用：临床医生初学者指南
items.summaryZh: 这份临床医生指南介绍了经颅直流电刺激（tDCS）作为一种非侵入性脑刺激技术，它在阈下水平调节大脑兴奋性，并强调了其低成本（通常低于 1000 美元）和易于与康复治疗结合的优势。
items.curatedReasonEn: Transcranial Direct Current Stimulation (tDCS) is a low-cost, easily integrated neurorehabilitation technique. This guide explains its principles and clinical applications, helping you decide whether to explore its integration into your practice.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Adherence to exercise intervention including pain threshold, exercise and physiotherapy sessions for patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy.
items.summary: This RCT (N=84) evaluated adherence to two pain threshold protocols during a 26-week exercise intervention for chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy, finding that consistent pain level differences were maintained between groups.
items.curatedReason: 这项纳入 84 人的 RCT 提示，在肩袖肌腱病患者 26 周的运动干预中，不同的疼痛阈值管理协议能持续维持疼痛水平差异，并影响患者依从性。这意味着我们在临床实践中，应根据患者具体情况精细化疼痛管理。
items.titleZh: 慢性肩袖肌腱病患者在包含疼痛阈值、运动和物理治疗的干预中的依从性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对慢性肩袖肌腱病患者的 RCT 研究（N=84）评估了 26 周运动干预中两种疼痛阈值协议的依从性，结果显示各组间疼痛水平差异保持一致。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT (N=84) suggests that different pain threshold management protocols can consistently maintain pain level differences and impact adherence in patients undergoing a 26-week exercise intervention for rotator cuff tendinopathy. This means we should refine pain management in clinical practice based on individual patient needs.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（N=84），可能影响结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: The study's relatively small sample size (N=84) may limit the generalizability of the findings.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Adherence to exercise intervention including pain threshold, exercise and physiotherapy sessions for patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy

items.title: The 2027 Proposed Rule is Out. Here's What You Need to Know.
items.summary: The 2027 Proposed Rule for Medicare in the US has been released, outlining key changes that physical therapists need to understand regarding reimbursement and practice guidelines.
items.curatedReason: 2027 年美国 Medicare 拟议规则通常涵盖了物理治疗服务的报销费率、支付政策和监管更新。仔细研读这些变化，尤其是在远程医疗、MIPS 绩效考核和执业范围方面的潜在调整，将直接影响你未来的执业收入和运营模式。
items.titleZh: 2027 年 Medicare 拟议规则出炉：你需要了解的要点
items.summaryZh: 美国 Medicare 2027 年拟议规则已发布，其中包含物理治疗师需了解的报销和执业指南的关键变化。
items.curatedReasonEn: The 2027 US Medicare proposed rule typically covers reimbursement rates, payment policies, and regulatory updates for physical therapy services. Thoroughly reviewing these changes, especially potential adjustments to telehealth, MIPS performance, and scope of practice, will directly impact your future practice revenue and operational model.

items.title: Effectiveness of Combined Biopsychosocial Interventions for Chronic Low Back Pain: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of RCTs evaluates the effectiveness of combined biopsychosocial interventions for chronic low back pain in reducing pain and functional disability.
items.curatedReason: 生物心理社会联合干预对慢性腰痛是有效的。这项高分系统综述再次确认，当你处理慢性腰痛患者的疼痛和功能障碍时，应优先考虑这类综合方案。
items.titleZh: 生物心理社会联合干预治疗慢性腰痛的有效性：随机对照试验的系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项针对随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析，评估了生物心理社会联合干预在减轻慢性腰痛成人患者疼痛和功能障碍方面的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Combined biopsychosocial interventions work for chronic low back pain. This high-scoring systematic review reinforces that you should prioritize these integrated approaches for managing pain and functional disability in your patients with chronic low back pain.
items.limitation: 尽管是系统综述，仍需关注纳入研究的异质性以及干预结构对结果一致性的影响。
items.limitationEn: Despite being a systematic review, attention should be paid to the heterogeneity of included studies and the impact of intervention structures on outcome consistency.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: CMS Modernizes Nursing Home Oversight with New Risk-Based Survey Approach Designed to Highlight High Performance, Encourage Improvement
items.summary: CMS is modernizing nursing home oversight with a new risk-based survey approach designed to identify high-performing facilities and encourage improvement in care.
items.curatedReason: CMS 正在推行养老院监管的新风险导向调查方法，旨在突出高性能机构并鼓励改进。虽然不是直接针对 PT 执业的政策，但你的机构如果服务老年康复，需关注这些监管导向，因为它们会影响你所在机构的整体评估和资源分配。
items.titleZh: CMS 采用新风险导向调查方法，实现养老院监管现代化，旨在突出高绩效、鼓励改进
items.summaryZh: 美国医疗保险和医疗补助服务中心（CMS）正通过新的风险导向调查方法，使养老院监管现代化，以识别高绩效机构并促进服务质量提升。
items.curatedReasonEn: CMS is implementing a new risk-based survey approach for nursing home oversight, aiming to highlight high-performing facilities and encourage improvement. While not directly targeting PT practice, if your facility provides geriatric rehabilitation services, you should monitor these regulatory directions as they will impact your facility's overall evaluation and resource allocation.

items.title: The Oxford visual perception screen detects visual perception difficulties in sub-acute adult stroke survivors: an early cross-sectional diagnostic accuracy study.
items.summary: The Oxford Visual Perception Screen (OxVPS) effectively detects visual perception difficulties in sub-acute stroke survivors (within 6 weeks), aligning with guidelines for efficient identification.
items.curatedReason: 牛津视知觉筛查量表（OxVPS）是早期卒中患者视知觉障碍的有效诊断工具，其设计遵循指南且易于使用。将其纳入卒中康复初筛流程，能更早发现问题并指导针对性干预。
items.titleZh: 牛津视知觉筛查量表在亚急性卒中患者视知觉障碍中的诊断准确性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性横断面研究表明，牛津视知觉筛查量表（OxVPS）能有效发现亚急性期（6周内）成人卒中幸存者的视知觉困难，为早期诊断提供了高效且符合指南的工具。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Oxford Visual Perception Screen (OxVPS) is an effective and guideline-aligned diagnostic tool for early post-stroke visual perception difficulties. Incorporate it into your initial stroke rehabilitation screening to detect issues sooner and guide targeted interventions.
items.limitation: 本研究为早期诊断准确性评估，样本量和随访期有限，长期预测价值尚需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This study is an early-phase diagnostic accuracy evaluation with a limited sample size and follow-up, so long-term predictive value requires further validation.

items.title: Transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation for stroke rehabilitation: a scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation (tSCS) as an emerging noninvasive neuromodulation approach for stroke rehabilitation, with fragmented and methodologically heterogeneous evidence on its benefits.
items.curatedReason: 经皮脊髓电刺激（tSCS）在卒中康复领域是新兴技术，有潜力，但目前证据尚分散且异质性高。将其视为探索性辅助手段，但尚不宜作为常规方案。
items.titleZh: 经皮脊髓电刺激在卒中康复中的应用：范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述系统梳理了经皮脊髓电刺激（tSCS）在卒中康复中的现有证据，发现其作为一种新兴的非侵入性神经调节方法，研究设计、刺激参数和结局指标存在较大异质性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation (tSCS) is an emerging, promising technique in stroke rehabilitation, but current evidence is fragmented and highly heterogeneous. Consider it an exploratory adjunct, but it's not yet ready for routine protocols.
items.limitation: 作为范围综述，主要局限在于纳入研究的方法学异质性高，难以得出明确的临床推荐。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, the main limitation is the high methodological heterogeneity of included studies, making it difficult to draw definitive clinical recommendations.

items.title: Towards strengthening rehabilitation within health systems: a scoping review of rehabilitation-specific quality indicators
items.summary: A scoping review identified, categorized, and appraised rehabilitation-specific quality indicators (QIs) with generic applicability for evaluating interprofessional rehabilitation care.
items.curatedReason: 此范围综述识别并评估了康复特定的质量指标，为评估多专业康复护理提供了通用标准。这些指标能够帮你更好地进行康复服务质量评估和改进。
items.titleZh: 加强卫生系统内康复：一项康复特定质量指标的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述识别、分类并评估了具有通用适用性，可用于评估跨专业康复护理的康复特定质量指标（QIs）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review identifies and appraises rehabilitation-specific quality indicators, providing generic standards for evaluating interprofessional rehabilitation care. These indicators can help you better assess and improve the quality of rehabilitation services.
items.limitation: 该范围综述主要基于文献识别现有质量指标，其通用适用性和在不同康复环境中的可操作性仍需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This scoping review primarily identifies existing quality indicators from literature; their generic applicability and operational feasibility across diverse rehabilitation settings still require further validation.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Balance Stability Characteristics of Patients with Idiopathic Normal Pressure Hydrocephalus
items.summary: An observational study aimed to describe postural control problems in patients with idiopathic normal pressure hydrocephalus (iNPH).
items.curatedReason: 这项研究观察了特发性正常压力性脑积水患者的姿势控制问题，为这类罕见神经系统疾病的步态和平衡障碍评估提供了更多信息。你需要注意这类患者在平衡训练中的特殊需求。
items.titleZh: 特发性正常压力性脑积水患者的平衡稳定性特征
items.summaryZh: 一项观察性研究旨在描述特发性正常压力性脑积水（iNPH）患者的姿势控制问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study observed postural control problems in patients with idiopathic normal pressure hydrocephalus, providing more information for assessing gait and balance disorders in this rare neurological condition. You should pay attention to the specific needs of these patients in balance training.
items.limitation: 这是一项观察性研究，仅观察了患者的姿势控制问题，未能提供干预措施的有效性证据。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study that only observed postural control problems in patients, without providing evidence of intervention effectiveness.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Cross-education via contralateral-limb balance training improves gait speed and sagittal-plane knee motion after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=40) showed that contralateral-limb balance training combined with conventional rehabilitation improved gait speed and sagittal-plane knee motion after ACL reconstruction compared to conventional rehabilitation alone.
items.curatedReason: 这项RCT研究证明了交叉教育结合对侧肢体平衡训练能显著改善前交叉韧带重建术后的步速和膝关节矢状面运动。在ACL术后早期康复中，你应该考虑将这种方法纳入训练方案，尤其是在患侧负重受限的情况下。
items.titleZh: 对侧肢体平衡训练的交叉教育效应可改善前交叉韧带重建术后的步速和膝关节矢状面运动：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（n=40）显示，对侧肢体平衡训练结合常规康复治疗，相比单纯常规康复，能改善前交叉韧带重建术后的步速和膝关节矢状面运动。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT demonstrates that cross-education combined with contralateral-limb balance training significantly improves gait speed and sagittal-plane knee motion after ACL reconstruction. You should consider incorporating this approach into early ACL rehab, especially when ipsilateral weight-bearing is restricted.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量较小（40例），且随访期仅6周，需更长期、大样本研究验证其持续效果。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (40 patients) and a follow-up period of only 6 weeks; longer-term, larger studies are needed to confirm sustained effects.

items.title: Effects of a 4-week neuromuscular balance training program on knee proprioception, functional performance, and landing errors in national-level female wrestlers: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: A 4-week neuromuscular balance training program improved knee proprioception, functional performance, and reduced landing errors in 22 national-level female wrestlers in a randomized controlled trial.
items.titleZh: 4周神经肌肉平衡训练对国家级女子摔跤运动员膝关节本体感觉、功能表现和落地错误的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验发现，为期4周的神经肌肉平衡训练项目改善了22名国家级女子摔跤运动员的膝关节本体感觉、功能表现，并减少了落地错误。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that a short-term (4-week) neuromuscular balance training program can improve knee proprioception, functional performance, and landing errors in national-level female wrestlers. For high-level athletes, consider incorporating this intervention into training plans to reduce lower extremity injury risk.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量较小（22名摔跤运动员），结果外推至其他人群或长期效果需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (22 wrestlers), and results should be generalized to other populations or long-term effects with caution.

items.title: Acute effects of aerobic versus combined aerobic and cervical-upper extremity resistance exercise on pressure pain threshold, pain perception, and fatigue in workers exposed to high ergonomic risk with chronic non-specific neck pain: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=52) compared the acute effects of aerobic exercise versus combined aerobic and cervical-upper extremity resistance exercise on pressure pain threshold, pain perception, and fatigue in workers with chronic non-specific neck pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项纳入52人的RCT提示，对于慢性非特异性颈痛患者，有氧运动结合颈部/上肢阻力训练可能比单纯有氧运动在急性期提供更好的疼痛缓解效果。在临床实践中，可以考虑将阻力训练纳入你的急性期干预方案。
items.titleZh: 有氧运动与有氧结合颈部-上肢阻力运动对慢性非特异性颈痛高人体工程学风险工人的压力痛阈、疼痛感知和疲劳的急性影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（n=52）比较了有氧运动与有氧结合颈部-上肢阻力运动对慢性非特异性颈痛且面临高人体工程学风险的工人，在压力痛阈、疼痛感知和疲劳方面的急性影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT (n=52) suggests that for chronic non-specific neck pain, combining aerobic exercise with cervical/upper extremity resistance training may offer superior acute pain relief compared to aerobic exercise alone. In clinical practice, consider integrating resistance training into your acute intervention protocols.
items.limitation: 本研究仅评估了急性效应，尚不清楚这些运动模式的长期效果。样本量相对较小（52名参与者）。
items.limitationEn: This study only evaluated acute effects, and the long-term effects of these exercise modalities are unknown. The sample size is relatively small (52 participants).

items.title: Comparative biomechanical strength of autografts for ligament reconstruction: quadriceps, rectus femoris, peroneus longus, patellar, hamstring configurations (quadruple and braided) and iliotibial band: an exploratory cadaveric biomechanical study
items.summary: An exploratory cadaveric biomechanical study compared the strength of various autografts—quadriceps, rectus femoris, peroneus longus, patellar, hamstring configurations, and iliotibial band—for ligament reconstruction.
items.curatedReason: 这项尸体研究直接对比了多种自体移植材料在韧带重建中的生物力学强度。这为术后康复提供了宝贵的参考，让你能更精准地匹配康复负荷与移植物的承受能力，避免早期失败。
items.titleZh: 韧带重建自体移植物的生物力学强度比较：股四头肌、股直肌、腓骨长肌、髌腱、襻绳肌（四股和编织）和髂胫束：一项探索性尸体生物力学研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性尸体生物力学研究比较了股四头肌、股直肌、腓骨长肌、髌腱、襻绳肌（四股和编织）和髂胫束等多种自体移植物在韧带重建中的生物力学强度。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cadaveric biomechanical study directly compared the strength of various autografts in ligament reconstruction. Understanding the mechanical properties of different grafts helps you clearly comprehend surgical decisions during discussions with surgeons and adjust postoperative rehabilitation plans to match the graft's load-bearing capacity.
items.limitation: 本研究为尸体研究，其发现可能无法完全复制活体生物力学环境。且仅评估了初始强度，未涉及生物整合和长期负荷能力。
items.limitationEn: This cadaveric study's findings may not fully replicate in vivo biomechanical environments. It also only assessed initial strength, not bio-integration or long-term load capacity.

items.title: The Aspetar Hamstring Injury Rehabilitation Pathway
items.summary: This research report outlines the Aspetar Hamstring Injury Rehabilitation Pathway, offering a structured approach for managing hamstring injuries.
items.curatedReason: 该报告概述了Aspetar诊所的襻绳肌损伤康复路径。这是一个基于专家共识和临床经验的实用框架，你可以将其作为参考，审视并优化自己的襻绳肌损伤康复流程，尤其是在重返运动阶段的指导。
items.titleZh: Aspetar 襻绳肌损伤康复路径
items.summaryZh: 这份研究报告概述了Aspetar襻绳肌损伤康复路径，为管理襻绳肌损伤提供了一个结构化方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This report outlines Aspetar's hamstring injury rehabilitation pathway. It's a practical framework based on expert consensus and clinical experience. You can use it as a reference to review and optimize your own hamstring injury rehabilitation process, especially in guiding return-to-sport phases.
items.limitation: 本研究为机构经验报告，并非随机对照试验，未提供量化的证据等级或效应量。
items.limitationEn: This study is an institutional experience report, not a randomized controlled trial, and does not provide quantified evidence levels or effect sizes.

items.title: Association between low back movement control impairment test results and low back pain - Northern Finland birth cohort study 1966
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of 1907 participants from the Northern Finland Birth Cohort 1966 examined the association between low back movement control impairment (MCI) test results and low back pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项对1907名参与者的横断面研究发现，特定的腰部运动控制障碍（MCI）测试结果与腰痛有关。这意味着在评估腰痛患者时，你应重视MCI的检查，它可能指向一种潜在的治疗靶点。
items.titleZh: 腰部运动控制障碍测试结果与腰痛的关联——1966年芬兰北部出生队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对1966年芬兰北部出生队列1907名参与者的横断面研究，探讨了腰部运动控制障碍（MCI）测试结果与腰痛之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study of 1907 participants found an association between specific low back movement control impairment (MCI) test results and low back pain. This suggests you should prioritize MCI assessment when evaluating patients with low back pain, as it may indicate a potential treatment target.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法确立因果关系。同时，MCI测试的分类可能存在主观性。
items.limitationEn: This study used a cross-sectional design, preventing the establishment of causality. Additionally, the classification of MCI tests may be subjective.

items.title: Weighted total genotype score associated with knee ligament injury incidence in adolescent female basketball athletes
items.summary: A retrospective study of 534 Japanese basketball athletes found an association between weighted total genotype score and knee ligament injury incidence in adolescent female basketball athletes.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性研究发现，基因型评分与青少年女性篮球运动员膝关节韧带损伤的发生率相关。虽然基因是不可改变的风险因素，但了解其作用能帮助你更好地识别高危运动员，并在预防策略上提供更个性化的建议，例如更侧重生物力学修正和训练负荷管理。
items.titleZh: 加权总基因型评分与青少年女性篮球运动员膝关节韧带损伤发生率的关联
items.summaryZh: 一项对534名日本篮球运动员的回顾性研究发现，加权总基因型评分与青少年女性篮球运动员膝关节韧带损伤的发生率存在关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study found that weighted total genotype score is associated with knee ligament injury incidence in adolescent female basketball athletes. While genetics are immutable risk factors, understanding their role can help you better identify high-risk athletes and provide more personalized advice on prevention strategies, such as focusing more on biomechanical correction and training load management.
items.limitation: 研究为回顾性设计，无法建立因果关系。基因型得分的临床实用性仍需前瞻性研究验证。
items.limitationEn: The study's retrospective design prevents establishing causality. The clinical utility of genotype scores still requires validation through prospective studies.

items.title: Beyond patient perception: PROMs correlate with objective functional tests following knee cartilage repair
items.summary: An observational study (n=52) found correlations between patient-reported outcome measures (PROMs) and objective functional performance tests at a mean 66.8 months after knee cartilage repair surgery.
items.curatedReason: 这项观察性研究证实了膝关节软骨修复术后患者报告结局（PROMs）与客观功能测试之间存在相关性。这支持了在临床中将PROMs和客观测试结合使用，以提供更全面的功能评估，指导康复进程。
items.titleZh: 超越患者感知：患者报告结局与膝关节软骨修复术后客观功能测试相关
items.summaryZh: 一项观察性研究（n=52）发现，在膝关节软骨修复术后平均66.8个月，患者报告结局（PROMs）与客观功能表现测试之间存在相关性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study confirmed a correlation between patient-reported outcome measures (PROMs) and objective functional tests after knee cartilage repair. This supports combining PROMs and objective tests in clinical practice to provide a more comprehensive functional assessment and guide rehabilitation progress.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性设计，仅能揭示相关性，无法确立因果关系。样本量相对较小（52名患者），可能影响结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This study is observational, only revealing correlations without establishing causality. The relatively small sample size (52 patients) may affect the generalizability of the results.

items.title: 80 Motor stimulation program in early childhood centers: ‘Proemoji’
items.summary: This report introduces 'Proemoji', a motor stimulation program implemented in early childhood centers.
items.curatedReason: “Proemoji”项目为早期儿童中心的运动刺激提供了新的思路。如果你在社区或机构开展儿童早期干预，可以借鉴其设计理念，探索如何更好地整合运动与情感互动，促进学龄前儿童的全面发展。
items.titleZh: 早期儿童中心运动刺激项目：‘Proemoji’
items.summaryZh: 本报告介绍了在早期儿童中心实施的运动刺激项目‘Proemoji’。
items.curatedReasonEn: The 'Proemoji' program offers new ideas for motor stimulation in early childhood centers. If you are involved in early intervention for children in community or institutional settings, you can draw inspiration from its design to explore how best to integrate movement with emotional interaction to promote holistic development in preschoolers.
items.limitation: 本研究仅为会议摘要，未提供详细方法和结果，因此无法全面评估其有效性。
items.limitationEn: This study is only a conference abstract, lacking detailed methods and results, making it impossible to fully assess its effectiveness.

items.title: Modeling longitudinal growth in handwriting fluency: the role of pencil grip, writing task, and risk status in early education | Reading and Writing
items.summary: A longitudinal study examined how pencil grip maturity and task demands shape the development of handwriting fluency in 290 Spanish-speaking children from early childhood education.
items.curatedReason: 握笔姿势和书写任务确实影响儿童书写流畅度的发展。你应警惕，一个不成熟的握笔姿势或过高的任务要求，可能预示儿童在精细运动发展上存在潜在困难，这会影响其未来的学习能力。
items.titleZh: 手写流畅度纵向增长建模：握笔姿势、书写任务和早期教育中风险状况的作用
items.summaryZh: 一项纵向研究探讨了握笔姿势、书写任务和早期教育中风险状况如何共同影响290名西班牙语儿童手写流畅度的发展。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pencil grip and task demands do affect the development of handwriting fluency in children. Be aware that an immature grip or excessive task demands might signal underlying fine motor development challenges, impacting their future learning abilities.
items.limitation: 本研究虽然是纵向的，但主要关注书写流畅度，对更广泛的运动发展和物理治疗干预的直接关联可能有限。
items.limitationEn: Although longitudinal, this study primarily focuses on handwriting fluency, and its direct relevance to broader motor development and physical therapy interventions may be limited.

items.title: 108 Community-engaged development and preliminary implementation of a peer-delivered mHealth program for Kenyan caregivers of autistic children
items.summary: This report describes the community-engaged development and preliminary implementation of a peer-delivered mHealth program for Kenyan caregivers of autistic children.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究描述了在肯尼亚为自闭症儿童看护者开发的由同伴提供服务的移动健康项目。这种社区驱动的mHealth模式对于资源有限地区的早期干预具有重要参考价值，你可以从中借鉴社区参与和技术赋能的经验。
items.titleZh: 肯尼亚自闭症儿童看护者同伴传递移动健康项目的社区参与式开发与初步实施
items.summaryZh: 本报告描述了肯尼亚为自闭症儿童看护者开发的、由同伴传递的移动健康项目在社区参与下的开发与初步实施情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study describes a peer-delivered mHealth program developed for caregivers of autistic children in Kenya. This community-driven mHealth model is highly relevant for early intervention in resource-limited settings, and you can draw lessons from its community engagement and technological empowerment.
items.limitation: 本研究为初步实施报告，未提供项目长期有效性或对儿童发育结局的量化评估。
items.limitationEn: This study is a preliminary implementation report and does not provide quantitative evaluations of the program's long-term effectiveness or its impact on child developmental outcomes.

items.title: 165 DAKA: innovative technology-based strategy for evaluation, diagnosis, and comprehensive support for autism across the lifespan
items.summary: This report highlights DAKA, an innovative technology-based strategy for evaluating, diagnosing, and comprehensively supporting autism across the lifespan.
items.curatedReason: DAKA项目利用创新技术为自闭症患者提供评估、诊断和全面支持。了解这类数字解决方案有助于你探索如何将新兴技术融入自闭症谱系障碍患者的评估和干预流程，提高服务可及性。
items.titleZh: DAKA：一项用于自闭症终身评估、诊断和全面支持的创新技术策略
items.summaryZh: 本报告重点介绍了DAKA项目，这是一项创新的基于技术策略，用于自闭症患者的终身评估、诊断和全面支持。
items.curatedReasonEn: The DAKA project utilizes innovative technology to provide assessment, diagnosis, and comprehensive support for individuals with autism. Understanding such digital solutions can help you explore how to integrate emerging technologies into the assessment and intervention processes for individuals with Autism Spectrum Disorder, improving service accessibility.
items.limitation: 本研究为会议摘要，未提供详细的方法、结果及有效性验证数据，需等待完整研究发表。
items.limitationEn: This study is a conference abstract, lacking detailed methods, results, and validity data; a full research publication is needed.

items.title: Machine learning approach to analyzing complex care coordination patterns for medically complex children | BMC Medical Informatics and Decision Making
items.summary: A machine learning approach was used to analyze complex care coordination patterns for medically complex children in Japan, where this population has doubled over the past 15 years.
items.curatedReason: 复杂医疗儿童的护理协调模式亟待优化，尤其在日本该群体过去15年已翻倍。机器学习在此类复杂数据中展现了识别效率瓶颈的潜力，提示我们应多关注数据工具如何能辅助发现并改善实际护理流程中的脱节。
items.titleZh: 机器学习方法分析复杂医疗儿童的复杂护理协调模式
items.summaryZh: 一项机器学习方法被用于分析日本复杂医疗儿童的复杂护理协调模式，该人群在过去15年内翻了一番。
items.curatedReasonEn: Care coordination for medically complex children urgently needs optimization, especially in Japan where this population has doubled in 15 years. Machine learning shows promise in identifying efficiency bottlenecks in such complex data, suggesting we explore how data tools can help uncover and improve disconnections in actual care processes.
items.limitation: 本研究侧重于信息学和决策制定，未直接评估物理治疗干预的效果，其临床指导意义主要在于流程优化。
items.limitationEn: This study focuses on informatics and decision-making, not directly evaluating the effects of physical therapy interventions, and its clinical guidance primarily concerns process optimization.

items.title: Lower Urinary Tract Dysfunction in Children and Adolescents with Autism Spectrum Disorder: Current Perspectives on Diagnosis, Management and Transitional Urology Care Gaps | Current Bladder Dysfunction Reports
items.summary: A review provides current perspectives on the diagnosis, management, and transitional urology care gaps for lower urinary tract dysfunction (LUTD) in children and adolescents with Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD).
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述为自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）儿童和青少年下尿路功能障碍（LUTD）的诊断、管理和过渡期泌尿系统护理提供了当前视角。了解这些特殊人群的挑战和护理差距，有助于你在评估和转诊时更加全面。
items.titleZh: 自闭症谱系障碍儿童和青少年下尿路功能障碍：诊断、管理和过渡期泌尿系统护理差距的当前视角
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述提供了自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）儿童和青少年下尿路功能障碍（LUTD）在诊断、管理和过渡期泌尿系统护理差距方面的当前视角。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review offers current perspectives on the diagnosis, management, and transitional urology care gaps for lower urinary tract dysfunction (LUTD) in children and adolescents with Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD). Understanding the challenges and care gaps in this special population will help you be more comprehensive in assessment and referral.
items.limitation: 本研究为叙述性综述，可能存在选择偏倚，且未提供量化的证据等级或效应量。
items.limitationEn: This study is a narrative review, which may have selection bias and does not provide quantified evidence levels or effect sizes.

items.title: Traumatic Neurologic Injuries
items.summary: This is a chapter focusing on traumatic neurological injuries, offering insights into their diagnosis and management.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述关注创伤性神经损伤，这提示你应关注神经损伤的最新进展和康复策略。对于这类复杂病例，了解全面的损伤机制和干预方法是提升临床效果的关键。
items.titleZh: 创伤性神经损伤
items.summaryZh: 这是关注创伤性神经损伤的一个章节，提供了其诊断和管理方面的见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review focuses on traumatic neurological injuries, suggesting you should pay attention to the latest advancements and rehabilitation strategies for such conditions. For these complex cases, understanding comprehensive injury mechanisms and intervention methods is crucial for improving clinical outcomes.
items.limitation: 本研究为综述性质，未提供原始数据和具体证据等级，其推荐意见需结合更高级别证据参考。
items.limitationEn: This study is a review and does not provide original data or specific levels of evidence, so its recommendations should be considered in conjunction with higher-level evidence.

items.title: Developmental outcomes in 4-year-old children born in the first COVID-19 lockdown in England: preliminary findings from the Born In COVID Year – Core Lockdown Effects (BICYCLE) study
items.summary: This study presents preliminary findings from the BICYCLE study on developmental outcomes in 4-year-old children born during the first COVID-19 lockdown in England.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提供了在英格兰首次COVID-19封锁期间出生儿童4岁时的发育结局初步发现。了解这类环境因素对儿童发育的潜在影响，有助于你在评估和干预时考虑更广泛的社会决定因素。
items.titleZh: 英格兰首次COVID-19封锁期间出生儿童4岁时的发育结局：BICYCLE研究的初步发现
items.summaryZh: 本研究展示了BICYCLE研究中，英格兰首次COVID-19封锁期间出生儿童4岁时的发育结局初步发现。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study provides preliminary findings on developmental outcomes at age 4 for children born during England's first COVID-19 lockdown. Understanding the potential impact of such environmental factors on child development helps you consider broader social determinants during assessment and intervention.
items.limitation: 本研究为初步发现，数据仍在收集中，完整结果和长期影响尚待揭示。
items.limitationEn: This study presents preliminary findings, data collection is ongoing, and full results and long-term impacts are yet to be revealed.

items.title: [Correspondence] From targets to minutes: making movement advice actionable
items.summary: This correspondence suggests shifting physical activity messaging from aspirational thresholds to achievable marginal gains, showing that small increases in activity among the least active can yield the greatest population benefit, aligning with WHO guidance.
items.curatedReason: 这项通讯支持将运动建议从“目标”转变为“分钟数”，强调即使是少量增量运动也能带来显著的群体健康益处。在临床咨询中，你可以用这个视角鼓励久坐患者，突出小步快跑的价值，而不是宏大的活动量目标。
items.titleZh: 从目标到分钟：让运动建议更具可操作性
items.summaryZh: 这篇通讯提出，将运动量建议从理想阈值转变为可实现的边际增益，表明即使是活动量最少的人群，小幅度的活动增加也能带来最大的群体效益，与世卫组织指南相符。
items.curatedReasonEn: This correspondence supports shifting physical activity advice from 'targets' to 'minutes,' highlighting that even small incremental movements can yield significant population health benefits. In clinical consultations, you can use this perspective to encourage sedentary patients, emphasizing the value of small, achievable gains over ambitious activity goals.
items.limitation: 本研究为通讯，未提供原始研究设计和数据，且结论依赖于此前已发表的文章，可能存在二次解读的局限性。
items.limitationEn: This correspondence does not provide original study design or data, and its conclusions rely on previously published articles, potentially limiting secondary interpretation.

items.title: Effectiveness of Combined Biopsychosocial Interventions for Chronic Low Back Pain: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials found that combined biopsychosocial interventions are effective in reducing pain and functional disability in adults with chronic low back pain.
items.curatedReason: 生物心理社会干预已被本综述坐实对慢性腰痛有显著疗效。这巩固了这类多模式干预在临床实践中的一线地位，下次跟患者沟通时要强调其全面性。
items.titleZh: 生物心理社会联合干预对慢性腰痛的疗效：一项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析发现，生物心理社会联合干预能有效减轻慢性腰痛成年患者的疼痛和功能障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review confirms that biopsychosocial interventions are significantly effective for chronic low back pain. This solidifies their first-line status in clinical practice, and you should emphasize their comprehensive nature when discussing with patients.
items.limitation: 研究未明确报告具体的效应量和异质性数据。
items.limitationEn: The study did not explicitly report specific effect sizes and heterogeneity data.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Effectiveness of Combined Biopsychosocial Interventions for Chronic Low Back Pain: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials

items.title: A scoping review of outcome and outcome measure sets for adults with spinal cord injury, stroke, and traumatic brain injury.
items.summary: A scoping review identified outcome domains and measures in core outcome sets for stroke, traumatic brain injury, and spinal cord injury, noting that existing sets have not been synthesized across conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这份范围综述提示，核心结局集和标准结局测量集在神经康复领域存在异质性。在设计你的临床路径和研究方案时，注意不同神经损伤（脊髓、卒中、脑外伤）间的测量工具可能缺乏统一性。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤、卒中和创伤性脑损伤成人结局及其测量集范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述综合了卒中、创伤性脑损伤和脊髓损伤的核心结局集与标准结局测量集中的结局域和测量方法，并指出现有集合尚未在不同疾病间进行整合。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review indicates heterogeneity in core outcome sets and standard outcome measures across neurorehabilitation. When designing your clinical pathways and research protocols, be aware that measurement tools may lack uniformity across different neurological injuries (spinal cord, stroke, TBI).
items.limitation: 本研究为范围综述，侧重梳理现有研究的范围和类型，未进行荟萃分析或提供效应量。
items.limitationEn: This is a scoping review, focused on mapping the scope and types of existing research rather than conducting meta-analysis or providing effect sizes.

items.title: A Multimodal Assessment of Gastric Motility, reflux risk, and Clinical Efficacy: Intermittent Oro-Esophageal versus Nasogastric Tube Feeding for Post-Stroke Dysphagia in a Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: An RCT compared intermittent oro-esophageal tube feeding (IOE) versus nasogastric tube feeding (NG) in post-stroke dysphagia patients, aiming to assess efficacy in reducing reflux risk and supporting swallowing recovery.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后吞咽困难患者的鼻胃管喂养常见，但胃食管反流风险高。这项研究提示，间歇性口咽食管管喂养在减少反流风险和促进吞咽功能恢复上可能优于鼻胃管，为你的临床选择提供了新思路，下次评估时可以考虑。
items.titleZh: 卒中后吞咽困难患者间歇性口咽食管管饲与鼻胃管饲的胃动力、反流风险及临床疗效多模态评估：一项随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验旨在比较间歇性口咽食管管饲（IOE）与鼻胃管饲（NG）在卒中后吞咽困难患者中，在降低反流风险和支持吞咽功能恢复方面的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: Nasogastric tube feeding is common for post-stroke dysphagia, but carries a high risk of reflux. This study suggests that intermittent oro-esophageal tube feeding may be superior to nasogastric tubes in reducing reflux risk and promoting swallowing recovery. This offers a new perspective for your clinical choices; consider it in future assessments.
items.limitation: 摘要未提供具体的样本量、干预方案或关键结局数据。
items.limitationEn: The abstract does not provide specific sample size, intervention protocols, or key outcome data.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Digital Addiction and Body Balance: An Investigation of Postural Stability in Young Adults: A Cross-Sectional Study.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of 74 young adults (mean age 22.06 years) found an association between smartphone addiction and impaired postural balance performance, with attention-demanding tasks further affecting balance control.
items.curatedReason: 智能手机成瘾正悄然影响年轻人的姿势和平衡，这篇观察性研究提示我们应关注数字设备过度使用对肌骨健康的潜在风险，尤其是在评估平衡障碍时。
items.titleZh: 数字成瘾与身体平衡：青年人姿势稳定性调查的横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 74 名年轻人（平均年龄 22.06 岁）进行的横断面研究发现，智能手机成瘾与姿势平衡能力受损之间存在关联，且对注意力要求高的任务会进一步影响平衡控制。
items.curatedReasonEn: Smartphone addiction is subtly impacting posture and balance in young adults. This observational study suggests we should consider the potential musculoskeletal health risks of excessive digital device use, especially when evaluating balance impairments.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法建立数字成瘾与姿势平衡障碍之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional study cannot establish a causal relationship between digital addiction and postural balance impairments.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Association of combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation with post-stroke dementia: a U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study
items.summary: A U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study investigated the association of combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation with post-stroke dementia.
items.curatedReason: 这项美国多中心回顾性队列研究表明，物理和认知联合康复与卒中后痴呆的发生率降低相关。它提示你在卒中康复中应重视早期启动联合干预，这对于长期认知预后可能具有重要意义。
items.titleZh: 物理与认知联合康复与卒中后痴呆的关系：一项美国多中心回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项美国多中心回顾性队列研究探讨了物理和认知联合康复与卒中后痴呆发生率之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study suggests that combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation is associated with a reduced incidence of post-stroke dementia. This highlights the potential importance of early combined interventions in stroke rehabilitation for long-term cognitive outcomes.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，可能存在混杂因素和选择偏倚，无法确立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective cohort study, this research may be subject to confounding factors and selection bias, precluding the establishment of causality.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: The effects of resistance exercise with blood flow restriction on muscle performance, muscle mass, and function in older adults: a systematic review | European Review of Aging and Physical Activity
items.summary: This systematic review evaluated the effects of resistance exercise with blood flow restriction (BFR-RE) on muscle performance, muscle mass, and function in older adults, identifying it as a promising strategy for those unable to perform high-intensity resistance exercise.
items.curatedReason: 对于无法进行高强度抗阻训练的老年患者，血流限制抗阻训练（BFR-RE）是一个值得推荐的有效策略。这份系统综述确认了 BFR-RE 在改善肌肉表现、增加肌肉量和功能方面的效果，你应该考虑将其纳入老年患者的训练方案。
items.titleZh: 血流限制抗阻训练对老年人肌肉表现、肌肉质量和功能的影响：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述评估了血流限制抗阻训练（BFR-RE）对老年人肌肉表现、肌肉质量和功能的影响，认为这是一种对无法进行高强度抗阻训练的老年人有前景的策略。
items.curatedReasonEn: Blood flow restriction resistance exercise (BFR-RE) is an important strategy for improving muscle performance and function in older adults, especially those unable to perform high-intensity training. This systematic review evaluates the effects of BFR-RE, which can help you develop evidence-based training programs for elderly patients.
items.limitation: 综述的结论可能受限于纳入研究的异质性、方法学质量以及 BFR-RE 具体方案（如压力、时间、训练量）的差异。
items.limitationEn: The conclusions of this review may be limited by the heterogeneity and methodological quality of included studies, as well as variations in BFR-RE protocols (e.g., pressure, duration, volume).

items.title: Kinesiophobia and its impact on shoulder function in patients following arthroscopic rotator cuff repair of the supraspinatus tendon: a cross-sectional study
items.summary: This cross-sectional study (N=129) assessed shoulder function and kinesiophobia levels in patients six weeks after arthroscopic rotator cuff repair of the supraspinatus tendon, exploring their interrelationships to inform recovery and patient outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 肩袖修复术后患者的运动恐惧症（kinesiophobia）是一个关键的心理康复障碍。这项研究通过评估术后 6 周的运动恐惧症与肩关节功能的关系，提示早期识别和干预运动恐惧症可能有助于改善患者预后。
items.titleZh: 肩袖修复术后患者的运动恐惧症及其对肩关节功能的影响：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究（N=129）评估了在肩袖关节镜修复术后 6 周患者的肩关节功能和运动恐惧症水平，并探讨了它们之间的相互关系，以期为改善康复和患者预后提供见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: Kinesiophobia is a critical psychological barrier to rehabilitation in patients after rotator cuff repair. This study, by evaluating the relationship between kinesiophobia and shoulder function 6 weeks post-surgery, suggests that early identification and intervention for kinesiophobia may improve patient outcomes.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面研究，无法确定运动恐惧症与肩关节功能之间的因果关系，且随访时间较短（6周）。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study, unable to determine causality between kinesiophobia and shoulder function, and has a short follow-up period (6 weeks).

items.title: Associations of exercise frequency and type with trajectories of daily activity limitations among older adults in the UK | BMC Medicine
items.summary: This study examined how exercise frequency and type are associated with trajectories of daily activity limitations among older adults in the UK, aiming to understand their joint effects on delaying functional decline.
items.curatedReason: 了解不同运动频率和类型对老年人日常活动限制轨迹的影响，有助于你为患者提供更精准的运动建议。这项研究揭示了英国老年人群中的这些关联，强调了定期运动在延缓功能衰退中的作用。
items.titleZh: 英国老年人运动频率和类型与日常活动限制轨迹的关联
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了英国老年人运动频率和类型与日常活动限制轨迹的关联，旨在了解它们在延缓功能衰退方面的联合作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: Understanding how different exercise frequencies and types impact trajectories of daily activity limitations in older adults helps you provide more precise exercise recommendations. This study reveals these associations in the UK older adult population, highlighting the role of regular exercise in delaying functional decline.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性设计，无法确定运动频率/类型与日常活动限制轨迹之间的因果关系，且基于自我报告的运动数据可能存在回忆偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This study has an observational design, precluding causal inference between exercise frequency/type and daily activity limitation trajectories, and self-reported exercise data may be subject to recall bias.

items.title: Timely management of COPD exacerbations is associated with limited acute deterioration and early recovery: a prospective observational study | Respiratory Research
items.summary: This prospective observational study found that timely management of acute exacerbations of COPD (AECOPDs) is associated with limited acute deterioration and early recovery, highlighting the importance of early recognition and prompt treatment in routine outpatient settings.
items.curatedReason: 慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）急性加重（AECOPDs）的及时管理对患者康复至关重要。这项前瞻性观察研究强调，早期识别和治疗与有限的急性恶化和早期恢复相关，这强化了你在临床实践中快速响应 AECOPDs 的重要性。
items.titleZh: 慢性阻塞性肺疾病急性加重及时管理与有限的急性恶化和早期恢复相关：一项前瞻性观察研究
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性观察研究发现，慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）急性加重（AECOPDs）的及时管理与有限的急性恶化和早期恢复相关，强调了在常规门诊环境中早期识别和及时治疗的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Timely management of acute exacerbations of COPD (AECOPDs) is crucial for patient recovery. This prospective observational study emphasizes that early recognition and treatment are associated with limited acute deterioration and early recovery, reinforcing the importance of rapid response to AECOPDs in your clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性设计，无法排除混杂因素对及时管理与预后之间关联的影响，且结果可能不具备普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This study has an observational design, precluding the exclusion of confounders influencing the association between timely management and prognosis, and results may not be generalizable.

items.title: Ultrasound-guided platelet-rich plasma myofascial injection for chronic low back pain: a retrospective study
items.summary: This retrospective cohort study (N=58) evaluated the efficacy and safety of ultrasound-guided myofascial platelet-rich plasma (PRP) injection compared to normal saline for myofascial pain syndrome-induced chronic low back pain, assessing pain intensity via VAS and functional disability by ODI.
items.curatedReason: 富血小板血浆（PRP）在慢性腰痛中的应用是一个热门但证据仍在积累的领域。这项回顾性研究提示超声引导下的 PRP 肌筋膜注射对肌筋膜疼痛综合征引起的慢性腰痛可能有效，但结果仍需更高质量的 RCT 验证。
items.titleZh: 超声引导下富血小板血浆肌筋膜注射治疗慢性腰痛：一项回顾性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项回顾性队列研究（N=58）评估了超声引导下富血小板血浆（PRP）肌筋膜注射与生理盐水相比，治疗肌筋膜疼痛综合征引起的慢性腰痛的疗效和安全性，通过 VAS 评估疼痛强度，ODI 评估功能障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: Platelet-rich plasma (PRP) in chronic low back pain is a trending field with accumulating evidence. This retrospective study suggests that ultrasound-guided PRP myofascial injection may be effective for chronic low back pain caused by myofascial pain syndrome, but higher quality RCTs are needed to validate these results.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性研究，未随机分组，可能存在选择偏倚，且样本量较小。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective study with no randomized allocation, potential for selection bias, and a small sample size.

items.title: Expert consensus on the management of nocturnal enuresis in children | World Journal of Pediatrics
items.summary: This expert consensus updates the 2014 guidelines on managing nocturnal enuresis in children, incorporating substantial clinical experience and international guidelines to address its impact on children's physical and psychological health.
items.curatedReason: 儿童夜间遗尿影响广泛，最新管理策略至关重要。这份专家共识更新了 2014 年版指南，融合了新的临床经验和国际指导，你应该参照它来标准化你的诊断和治疗流程。
items.titleZh: 儿童夜间遗尿管理专家共识
items.summaryZh: 这份专家共识更新了 2014 年版儿童夜间遗尿管理指南，结合了丰富的临床经验和国际指南，旨在解决夜间遗尿对儿童身心健康的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: Nocturnal enuresis in children has broad impacts, and up-to-date management strategies are crucial. This expert consensus updates the 2014 guidelines, integrating new clinical experience and international guidance; you should refer to it to standardize your diagnostic and treatment processes.

items.title: Factors influencing virtual reality use in paediatric acquired ...
items.summary: This qualitative study explored factors influencing virtual reality (VR) use in pediatric acquired brain injury upper limb rehabilitation, providing insights into practical implementation.
items.curatedReason: 别盲目引入 VR 到儿科脑损伤上肢康复中。这项定性研究揭示了影响其应用的实际因素。你应该了解这些障碍与促进因素，才能更有效地整合 VR 技术，确保其在临床实践中的成功。
items.titleZh: 影响虚拟现实在儿科获得性脑损伤上肢康复中使用的因素：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了影响虚拟现实（VR）在儿科获得性脑损伤上肢康复中使用的因素，为实际应用提供了见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: Don't blindly introduce VR into pediatric acquired brain injury upper limb rehabilitation. This qualitative study reveals practical factors influencing its use. You should understand these barriers and facilitators to integrate VR technology more effectively and ensure its success in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小，结果的普遍性受限，主要关注使用者感知而非客观疗效。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size, limiting generalizability, and focuses on user perceptions rather than objective efficacy.

items.title: Activity profiles and their associations with transitions between fall and dementia: findings from a multistate time-to-event analysis | Alzheimer's Research & Therapy
items.summary: This study, using a multistate time-to-event analysis, investigated the associations of activity profiles with transitions between falls and dementia, providing insights into potential risk factors in older adults.
items.curatedReason: 跌倒和痴呆是老年人常见的双重打击。这项研究通过多状态时间事件分析，探讨了不同日常活动模式与跌倒和痴呆之间转换的关联，提示特定活动模式可能预示这两种不良结局，这有助于你进行早期风险评估。
items.titleZh: 活动模式与跌倒和痴呆之间转换的关联：一项多状态时间事件分析
items.summaryZh: 这项研究利用多状态时间事件分析，调查了活动模式与跌倒和痴呆之间转换的关联，为老年人潜在的风险因素提供了见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: Falls and dementia are common dual burdens in older adults. This study, using multistate time-to-event analysis, explores the association between daily activity profiles and transitions between falls and dementia, suggesting that specific activity patterns may predict these adverse outcomes. This can aid in early risk assessment.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性设计，无法建立活动模式与跌倒/痴呆转换之间的因果关系，且结果可能受其他未测量混杂因素影响。
items.limitationEn: This study has an observational design, precluding causal inference between activity profiles and transitions to falls/dementia, and results may be influenced by unmeasured confounders.

items.title: Smartphone apps, wearable trackers helped people with heart disease boost physical activity
items.summary: An analysis of previous research published in the Journal of the American Heart Association found that smartphone apps, fitness trackers, and wearable devices helped people with heart disease boost physical activity, which is crucial for preventing additional cardiovascular events.
items.curatedReason: 智能手机应用和可穿戴设备在帮助心脏病患者增加体力活动方面的作用日益显著。这项研究分析指出，这些技术是促进心血管疾病患者重获运动能力、预防二次事件的有效辅助工具。
items.titleZh: 智能手机应用和可穿戴设备帮助心脏病患者增加体力活动
items.summaryZh: 《美国心脏协会杂志》发表的一项研究分析发现，智能手机应用、健身追踪器和可穿戴设备有助于心脏病患者增加体力活动，这对于预防额外的心血管事件至关重要。
items.curatedReasonEn: Smartphone apps and wearable devices are increasingly important in helping people with heart disease increase physical activity. This analysis indicates these technologies are effective aids in promoting exercise capacity and preventing secondary events in cardiovascular disease patients.
items.limitation: 作为对现有研究的分析，其结论强度取决于原始研究的质量和异质性，可能无法提供确凿的因果证据。
items.limitationEn: As an analysis of existing research, the strength of its conclusions depends on the quality and heterogeneity of the original studies, and it may not provide definitive causal evidence.

items.title: Harnessing neuroplasticity to improve motor performance ...
items.summary: This study protocol outlines the design for the GAME randomized controlled trial, which aims to harness neuroplasticity to improve motor performance in infants with cerebral palsy.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项研究方案，而非结果。GAME RCT 旨在通过神经可塑性改善脑瘫婴儿运动表现。你在设计类似儿童神经康复研究时，可以参考其方法学框架，但切勿将其内容作为临床实践依据。
items.titleZh: 利用神经可塑性改善脑瘫婴儿运动表现：GAME 随机对照试验的研究方案
items.summaryZh: 这项研究方案概述了 GAME 随机对照试验的设计，该试验旨在利用神经可塑性来改善脑瘫婴儿的运动表现。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a study protocol, not a result. The GAME RCT aims to improve motor performance in infants with cerebral palsy by harnessing neuroplasticity. You may refer to its methodological framework when designing similar pediatric neurorehabilitation studies, but do not use its content as a basis for clinical practice.
items.limitation: 这是一项研究方案，尚未发布结果，无法评估干预效果。
items.limitationEn: This is a study protocol with no results yet, so the intervention's effectiveness cannot be evaluated.

items.title: Corynoxine inhibts ferroptosis by SIRT1/p53/SLC7A11 axis on traumatic brain injury
items.summary: This study investigated Corynoxine's neuroprotective effects against traumatic brain injury (TBI) in a mouse model and Erastin-induced HT-22 neuronal cells, elucidating its mechanism in inhibiting ferroptosis via the SIRT1/p53/SLC7A11 signaling axis.
items.curatedReason: Corynoxine 在创伤性脑损伤（TBI）中的神经保护作用研究提供了潜在的药物干预方向。尽管这项研究主要关注分子机制，但其发现可能启发未来结合药物和物理康复的 TBI 治疗策略。
items.titleZh: Corynoxine 通过 SIRT1/p53/SLC7A11 轴抑制铁死亡，对抗创伤性脑损伤
items.summaryZh: 这项研究在小鼠模型和 Erastin 诱导的 HT-22 神经元细胞中，探讨了 Corynoxine 对创伤性脑损伤（TBI）的神经保护作用，阐明了其通过 SIRT1/p53/SLC7A11 信号轴抑制铁死亡的机制。
items.curatedReasonEn: Research into the neuroprotective effects of Corynoxine in traumatic brain injury (TBI) offers a potential direction for pharmacological intervention. Although this study primarily focuses on molecular mechanisms, its findings may inspire future TBI treatment strategies combining medication and physical rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究主要基于动物模型和细胞实验，其结果的临床转化性和在人体 TBI 中的疗效尚不明确。
items.limitationEn: This study is primarily based on animal models and cell experiments, so the clinical translatability and efficacy in human TBI are unclear.

items.title: Neuroprotective Effects of lncRNA EPB41L4A-AS1 Against Ischemic Stroke Injury Through Regulating Microglial State Transition and Ferroptosis via miR-214-3p/GPX4 Axis | Neurochemical Research
items.summary: This study investigated the neuroprotective effects of lncRNA EPB41L4A-AS1 against ischemic stroke injury by regulating microglial state transition and ferroptosis via the miR-214-3p/GPX4 axis.
items.curatedReason: 这项基础研究揭示了 lncRNA EPB41L4A-AS1 在缺血性卒中损伤中通过调控小胶质细胞和铁死亡的神经保护机制。尽管目前尚不能直接指导临床，但它为未来卒中康复的分子靶点干预提供了重要的理论线索和研究方向。
items.titleZh: lncRNA EPB41L4A-AS1 通过 miR-214-3p/GPX4 轴调控小胶质细胞状态转换和铁死亡，发挥抗缺血性卒中损伤的神经保护作用
items.summaryZh: 这项研究探讨了 lncRNA EPB41L4A-AS1 通过 miR-214-3p/GPX4 轴调控小胶质细胞状态转换和铁死亡，从而对抗缺血性卒中损伤的神经保护作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study investigates the neuroprotective effects of lncRNA EPB41L4A-AS1 against ischemic stroke injury by regulating microglial state transition and ferroptosis. Although it is a basic mechanistic study, it provides clues for future molecular target interventions in stroke rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究主要关注分子机制，其结果的临床转化性和在人体卒中康复中的应用仍需大量研究验证。
items.limitationEn: This study primarily focuses on molecular mechanisms, and its clinical translatability and application in human stroke rehabilitation still require extensive research validation.

items.title: Virtual Reality-assisted Physiotherapeutic Training for Patients With Knee Osteoarthritis: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 5 RCTs found that virtual reality (VR)-assisted physiotherapy significantly improved pain (SMD = 0.40, 95% CI: 0.14-0.65, P = 0.002), physical function (SMD = 0.37, 95% CI: 0.05-0.70, P = 0.003), and balance (SMD = 0.44, 95% CI: 0.16-0.72, P = 0.002) in patients with knee osteoarthritis compared to traditional rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 对于膝骨关节炎（KOA）患者，VR 辅助物理治疗在缓解疼痛、改善身体功能和平衡方面显示出优于传统康复治疗的显著优势。它提供了可行的临床替代方案，值得你在实践中考虑引入。
items.titleZh: 虚拟现实辅助物理治疗对膝骨关节炎患者的疗效：一项系统综述和 Meta 分析
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 5 项随机对照试验（RCT）的系统综述和 Meta 分析发现，虚拟现实（VR）辅助物理治疗在改善膝骨关节炎（KOA）患者的疼痛 (SMD = 0.40, P = 0.002)、身体功能 (SMD = 0.37, P = 0.003) 和平衡 (SMD = 0.44, P = 0.002) 方面，均优于传统康复治疗。
items.curatedReasonEn: For patients with knee osteoarthritis (KOA), VR-assisted physiotherapy demonstrates significant advantages over traditional rehabilitation in pain relief, physical function, and balance. It offers a viable clinical alternative worth considering in your practice.
items.limitation: 本综述仅纳入 5 项 RCT，样本量可能限制了结果的普遍性，且未报告异质性数据。
items.limitationEn: This review included only 5 RCTs, which may limit the generalizability of results, and did not report heterogeneity data.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain: a randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized, double-blinded, sham-controlled trial with 49 participants found that ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation (PENS) applied to the radial nerve, combined with exercise, provided mid- and long-term benefits for chronic lateral elbow pain, improving pain intensity, disability, and psychological outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 对于慢性外侧肘痛（网球肘），经皮电神经刺激（PENS）结合运动在中长期随访中显示出显著疗效。当你遇到药物和传统方法效果不佳的患者时，可以考虑将 PENS 作为辅助干预手段，但需注意其定位精度和患者选择。
items.titleZh: 超声引导经皮电神经刺激联合运动治疗慢性外侧肘痛的中长期疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 49 名患者的随机、双盲、假对照试验发现，超声引导的经皮电神经刺激（PENS）应用于桡神经并结合运动，对慢性外侧肘痛（网球肘）在中长期随访中具有益处，改善了疼痛强度、残疾和心理结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: For chronic lateral elbow pain (tennis elbow), percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation (PENS) combined with exercise shows significant efficacy in mid- to long-term follow-up. When encountering patients with inadequate response to medication and traditional methods, consider PENS as an adjunctive intervention, paying attention to its precise targeting and patient selection.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（49 例），可能影响结果的外推性；长期随访数据有限。
items.limitationEn: The study's small sample size (49 cases) may limit generalizability, and long-term follow-up data are limited.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain: a randomized controlled trial

items.title: Association of combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation with post-stroke dementia: a U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study.
items.summary: A U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study of 479 propensity score-matched patients found that combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation was associated with a reduced risk of post-stroke dementia compared to physical rehabilitation alone in adults aged ≥55 years who developed MCI within 6 months after stroke.
items.curatedReason: 对卒中后认知障碍患者，除了传统物理康复，别忘了评估和转诊认知康复。这项回顾性研究提示，结合认知康复可能显著降低患者发展为卒中后痴呆的风险。
items.titleZh: 物理与认知联合康复与卒中后痴呆发生率的关联：一项美国多中心回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项美国多中心回顾性队列研究，对479名倾向评分匹配的卒中后轻度认知障碍患者（年龄≥55岁）进行分析，结果显示，与单独物理康复相比，物理与认知联合康复与卒中后痴呆发生风险降低相关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: For post-stroke cognitive impairment patients, in addition to traditional physical rehabilitation, remember to assess for and refer to cognitive rehabilitation. This retrospective study suggests that combined cognitive rehabilitation may significantly reduce the risk of developing post-stroke dementia.
items.limitation: 研究为回顾性队列设计，且数据来源于电子健康记录，可能存在混杂因素和信息偏差。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective cohort study using electronic health record data, which may introduce confounding factors and information bias.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Association of combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation with post-stroke dementia: a U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study

items.title: A Multimodal Assessment of Gastric Motility, reflux risk, and Clinical Efficacy: Intermittent Oro-Esophageal versus Nasogastric Tube Feeding for Post-Stroke Dysphagia in a Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A single-center RCT (n=54) found that intermittent oro-esophageal tube feeding for 14 days improved gastric motility and swallowing recovery, and reduced reflux risk compared to continuous nasogastric tube feeding in patients with post-stroke dysphagia.
items.curatedReason: 对于卒中后吞咽困难患者，间歇性口咽管喂养相对于鼻胃管喂养可能提供更好的胃动力和吞咽恢复效果。如果你目前常规使用鼻胃管，这项研究提示你可以开始考虑间歇性口咽管作为替代方案，尤其是在降低反流风险方面。
items.titleZh: 卒中后吞咽困难患者间歇性口咽管喂养与鼻胃管喂养的多模式评估、反流风险及临床疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项单中心随机对照试验（n=54）显示，对于卒中后吞咽困难患者，为期14天的间歇性口咽管喂养在改善胃动力、促进吞咽恢复和降低反流风险方面优于持续鼻胃管喂养。
items.curatedReasonEn: For patients with post-stroke dysphagia, intermittent oro-esophageal tube feeding may offer better gastric motility and swallowing recovery compared to nasogastric tube feeding. If you routinely use nasogastric tubes, this study suggests you might consider intermittent oro-esophageal tubes as an alternative, particularly for reducing reflux risk.
items.limitation: 这是一项单中心研究，样本量较小（54例），结果外推至其他人群需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center study with a small sample size (54 patients), so results should be generalized with caution.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: A Multimodal Assessment of Gastric Motility, reflux risk, and Clinical Efficacy: Intermittent Oro-Esophageal versus Nasogastric Tube Feeding for Post-Stroke Dysphagia in a Randomized Controlled Trial

items.title: Undernutrition is associated with higher rate of reamputation or survival, lower mobility and lower quality of life following dysvascular major lower limb amputation: a longitudinal observational study
items.summary: A longitudinal observational study investigating the association between undernutrition and various outcomes post-dysvascular major lower limb amputation found that undernutrition is linked to higher reamputation rates, lower mobility, and reduced quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 对于截肢患者，营养状况不佳不仅仅是伴随问题，它还与更差的移动能力、更低的生存率和更高的再截肢风险相关。在康复过程中，务必筛查并管理患者的营养状态。
items.titleZh: 血管性下肢大截肢后营养不良与更高的再截肢率或生存率、更低的活动能力和生活质量相关：一项纵向观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项纵向观察性研究发现，在血管性下肢大截肢术后，营养不良与更高的再截肢率、更低的活动能力和较差的生活质量相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: Undernutrition in amputee patients is not merely a comorbidity; it is associated with poorer mobility, lower survival rates, and a higher risk of reamputation. Ensure you screen for and manage nutritional status during rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 这是一项观察性研究，无法建立因果关系，可能存在混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This was an observational study, which cannot establish causality and may be subject to confounding factors.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Modified Ghost System combining action, observation, and vibration stimulation for recovery after distal radius fracture surgery: A single-arm clinical feasibility study protocol
items.summary: A single-arm feasibility study protocol introduces a modified Ghost System, combining iPad-based action observation and wristband vibration, for rehabilitation after distal radius fracture surgery in 10 adults.
items.curatedReason: 这项单臂可行性研究引入了一种结合 iPad 动作观察和腕带振动的改良 Ghost 系统，用于桡骨远端骨折术后康复。这只是一项方案研究，探讨技术整合的可行性，离实际临床应用还有距离，目前不应根据它改变你的康复方案。
items.titleZh: 改良 Ghost 系统结合动作观察与振动刺激，用于桡骨远端骨折术后康复：一项单臂临床可行性研究方案
items.summaryZh: 一项单臂可行性研究方案介绍了改良 Ghost 系统，该系统结合了基于 iPad 的动作观察和腕带振动刺激，旨在评估其在 10 名桡骨远端骨折术后成人康复中的应用潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This single-arm feasibility study introduces a modified Ghost System combining iPad-based action observation and wristband vibration for post-distal radius fracture surgery rehab. It's merely a protocol exploring technical integration feasibility, far from clinical application, so don't alter your rehab protocols based on it yet.
items.limitation: 这是一项单中心、单臂的可行性研究方案，样本量小（10例），无对照组，主要关注技术的可行性而非临床疗效。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-center, single-arm feasibility study protocol with a small sample size (10 cases) and no control group, focusing on technical feasibility rather than clinical efficacy.

items.title: The association between diabetes mellitus and low back pain: a systematic review and meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis confirmed a significant association between diabetes mellitus and low back pain, highlighting the comorbid prevalence and longitudinal relationship between these two conditions in adult populations.
items.curatedReason: 糖尿病与腰痛之间存在明确关联。在评估和管理糖尿病患者的腰痛时，你应意识到这种共病关系，并考虑更综合的治疗策略，而非孤立处理。不要忽视对糖尿病患者的腰痛进行全面评估。
items.titleZh: 糖尿病与腰痛的关联：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析证实，糖尿病与腰痛之间存在显著关联，强调了这两种疾病在成年人群中的共病患病率和纵向关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: A clear association exists between diabetes and low back pain. When assessing and managing LBP in diabetic patients, you should be aware of this comorbidity and consider more integrated treatment strategies rather than isolated approaches. Do not overlook comprehensive LBP assessment in diabetic patients.
items.limitation: 尽管是系统综述，但纳入研究的异质性（如 LBP 诊断标准、糖尿病类型、随访时间）可能影响汇总结果的准确性。
items.limitationEn: Although a systematic review, heterogeneity among included studies (e.g., LBP diagnostic criteria, diabetes types, follow-up duration) might affect the accuracy of pooled results.

items.title: Beyond acute concussion assessment to office management: a systematic review informing the development of a Sport Concussion Office Assessment Tool (SCOAT6) for adults and children
