items.summary: A systematic review informed the development of a Sport Concussion Office Assessment Tool (SCOAT6) for adults and children, aiming to guide acute concussion assessment to office management.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述为制定运动性脑震荡办公室评估工具（SCOAT6）提供了依据。你可以参考其内容，更新你对成人和儿童脑震荡的评估和办公室管理策略，确保实践与最新证据保持一致。
items.titleZh: 超越急性脑震荡评估到办公室管理：一项为成人和儿童运动性脑震荡办公室评估工具 (SCOAT6) 开发提供信息的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述为成人和儿童运动性脑震荡办公室评估工具（SCOAT6）的开发提供了信息，旨在指导急性脑震荡评估至办公室管理。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review provides the basis for developing the Sport Concussion Office Assessment Tool (SCOAT6). You can refer to its content to update your assessment and office management strategies for adult and pediatric concussions, ensuring your practice aligns with the latest evidence.
items.limitation: 作为系统综述，其质量受限于纳入研究的异质性和偏倚风险。
items.limitationEn: As a systematic review, its quality is limited by the heterogeneity and risk of bias in the included studies.

items.title: The correlation between spatiotemporal gait and pain in patients with musculoskeletal pain using smartphone-based gait technology: a retrospective cross sectional study
items.summary: A retrospective cross-sectional study of 3,595 patients found significant correlations between smartphone-based spatiotemporal gait parameters and pain severity in patients with knee and back musculoskeletal pain, with varying gait compensation strategies based on pain location.
items.curatedReason: 智能手机步态技术为评估肌骨疼痛患者的步态参数与疼痛相关性提供了便捷工具。可将这类客观数据纳入你的临床评估，以更好地理解膝关节和腰背疼痛患者的步态代偿策略。
items.titleZh: 使用智能手机步态技术评估肌骨疼痛患者时空步态与疼痛的相关性：一项回顾性横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 3,595 名患者进行的回顾性横断面研究发现，使用智能手机步态技术评估的患者，其时空步态参数与膝关节和腰背肌骨疼痛的严重程度之间存在显著相关性，且步态代偿策略因疼痛部位而异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Smartphone-based gait technology offers a convenient tool to assess spatiotemporal gait parameters and their correlation with pain in musculoskeletal pain patients. Integrate such objective data into your clinical assessments to better understand gait compensation strategies in knee and back pain patients.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性研究，无法建立因果关系，且数据主要来自美国诊所，外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective study, limiting causal inference, and data primarily from US clinics may limit generalizability.

items.title: The efficacy of virtual reality interventions for depressive ...
items.summary: A three-level meta-analysis found virtual reality interventions to be effective for depressive disorder secondary to other medical conditions, suggesting its potential as an adjunctive therapy.
items.curatedReason: 虚拟现实干预对伴有其他医学疾病的抑郁症患者可能有效。作为康复治疗师，你可以开始探索 VR 技术作为辅助干预手段的可行性，尤其是在神经或长期病患管理中。
items.titleZh: 虚拟现实干预对其他医学疾病引起的抑郁症的疗效：一项三级荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项三级荟萃分析发现，虚拟现实干预对伴有其他医学疾病的抑郁症有效，表明其作为辅助疗法的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: Virtual reality interventions may be effective for patients with depressive disorder due to another medical condition. As a rehabilitation therapist, you can start exploring the feasibility of VR technology as an adjunctive intervention, particularly in neurological or chronic disease management.
items.limitation: 三级荟萃分析可能包含异质性较高的研究，结果需结合具体疾病背景解读。
items.limitationEn: A three-level meta-analysis may include studies with high heterogeneity, and results should be interpreted in the context of specific medical conditions.

items.title: Evaluation of stroke-associated risk alleles in a multi-ethnic Singaporean ischemic stroke cohort
items.summary: A study in a multi-ethnic Singaporean ischemic stroke cohort evaluated 29 previously reported stroke-associated single-nucleotide polymorphisms (SNPs), finding that some European-derived risk alleles are also relevant in Southeast Asian populations.
items.curatedReason: 这项观察性遗传学研究提示，在东南亚多民族人群中，部分欧洲人群的卒中风险基因型也具有相关性。这提醒你，卒中风险具有复杂的遗传背景，尽管目前尚不能直接指导康复，但有助于你更全面地理解患者风险因素，并期待未来精准医疗对康复策略的影响。
items.titleZh: 多民族新加坡缺血性卒中队列中卒中相关风险等位基因的评估
items.summaryZh: 一项针对新加坡多民族缺血性卒中队列的研究评估了 29 个先前报道的卒中相关单核苷酸多态性（SNP），发现一些源自欧洲的风险等位基因在东南亚人群中也具有相关性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study on a multi-ethnic Singaporean ischemic stroke cohort evaluated stroke-associated risk alleles. Although genetic, it helps you understand the complexity of stroke risk and suggests that stroke prevention and rehabilitation strategies might need to consider genetic differences in diverse cultural contexts.
items.limitation: 该研究主要关注遗传风险因素，未涉及康复干预，因此对临床实践的直接指导有限。
items.limitationEn: The study primarily focuses on genetic risk factors and does not involve rehabilitation interventions, thus offering limited direct guidance for clinical practice.

items.title: Clinical and biomechanical outcomes of rehabilitation targeting intersegmental control in athletic groin pain: prospective cohort of 205 patients
items.summary: A prospective cohort study of 205 patients with athletic groin pain demonstrated positive clinical and biomechanical outcomes from rehabilitation targeting intersegmental control.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对205名患者的前瞻性队列研究证实了针对节段间控制的康复训练对运动性腹股沟疼痛的临床和生物力学益处。这为你的运动性腹股沟疼痛患者提供了明确的治疗方向，你可以积极将节段间控制训练纳入康复方案，以改善患者预后。
items.titleZh: 针对节段间控制的康复训练在运动性腹股沟疼痛中的临床和生物力学效果：205 名患者的前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 205 名运动性腹股沟疼痛患者的前瞻性队列研究表明，针对节段间控制的康复训练取得了积极的临床和生物力学成果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study of 205 patients confirms the clinical and biomechanical benefits of rehabilitation targeting intersegmental control for athletic groin pain. This provides a clear treatment direction for your patients with athletic groin pain, and you can actively incorporate intersegmental control training into rehabilitation programs to improve patient outcomes.
items.limitation: 研究设计为前瞻性队列研究，缺乏随机对照，结果可能存在混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: The study design is a prospective cohort study, lacking randomized controls, and results may be subject to confounding factors.

items.title: Handgrip strength in children, adolescents, and young adults with suspected myalgic encephalomyelitis/chronic fatigue syndrome | Journal of Translational Medicine
items.summary: A study on children, adolescents, and young adults with suspected myalgic encephalomyelitis/chronic fatigue syndrome (ME/CFS) found handgrip strength assessment to be feasible and clinically valuable for evaluating post-exertional malaise (PEM).
items.curatedReason: 这项关于肌痛性脑脊髓炎/慢性疲劳综合征（ME/CFS）患儿握力研究，指出了握力评估在识别运动后不适（PEM）和评估病情中的潜力。在评估 ME/CFS 患儿时，你可以将握力测试作为客观指标之一，辅助诊断和监测。
items.titleZh: 疑似肌痛性脑脊髓炎/慢性疲劳综合征儿童、青少年和年轻成人中的握力
items.summaryZh: 一项针对疑似肌痛性脑脊髓炎/慢性疲劳综合征（ME/CFS）儿童、青少年和年轻成人的研究发现，握力评估对于评估运动后不适（PEM）是可行且具有临床价值的。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study on handgrip strength in children with Myalgic Encephalomyelitis/Chronic Fatigue Syndrome (ME/CFS) highlights the potential of grip strength assessment in identifying post-exertional malaise (PEM) and evaluating disease severity. When assessing children with ME/CFS, you can use grip strength tests as one of the objective indicators to aid diagnosis and monitoring.
items.limitation: 研究关注的是疑似 ME/CFS 患儿，且主要评估了可行性和临床价值，而非干预效果。
items.limitationEn: The study focused on children with suspected ME/CFS and primarily evaluated feasibility and clinical value, not intervention effects.

items.title: Sleep-related Alzheimer's disease vulnerability in aging: A muscle-metabolic perspective
items.summary: This review proposes a "sleep-muscle-brain" framework, suggesting that sarcopenia, sarcopenic obesity, and insulin resistance are modifiable muscle-metabolic conditions that may bias sleep continuity and shape Alzheimer's disease vulnerability in aging.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述提出了“睡眠-肌肉-大脑”框架，将肌少症、肌少症肥胖和胰岛素抵抗视为影响睡眠连续性并塑造阿尔茨海默病易感性的可改变条件。这扩展了你对老年患者睡眠障碍和认知衰退的理解，提示了运动和代谢管理在预防中的重要性。
items.titleZh: 衰老中与睡眠相关的阿尔茨海默病易感性：肌肉-代谢视角
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述提出了“睡眠-肌肉-大脑”框架，认为肌少症、肌少症肥胖和胰岛素抵抗是可改变的肌肉-代谢条件，可能影响睡眠连续性并塑造衰老过程中阿尔茨海默病的易感性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review proposes a "sleep-muscle-brain" framework, identifying sarcopenia, sarcopenic obesity, and insulin resistance as modifiable conditions influencing sleep continuity and Alzheimer's disease vulnerability. This expands your understanding of sleep disturbances and cognitive decline in older adults, highlighting the importance of exercise and metabolic management in prevention.
items.limitation: 这是一篇综述，主要基于现有文献提出理论框架，而非提供新的实证数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a review, primarily proposing a theoretical framework based on existing literature rather than presenting new empirical data.

items.title: Minor Trauma Causing Spinal Cord Injury in a Child with ...
items.summary: A case report and literature review highlight a rare instance of minor trauma causing spinal cord injury in a child with Chiari Malformation, emphasizing the importance of considering underlying conditions.
items.curatedReason: 奇亚里畸形患儿即使是轻微创伤也可能导致脊髓损伤。在评估儿童尤其是颈部创伤时，务必警惕潜在的先天性畸形，这可能完全改变你的康复预后判断和风险管理策略，避免只关注创伤本身。
items.titleZh: 奇亚里畸形患儿轻微创伤导致脊髓损伤：病例报告与文献综述
items.summaryZh: 一篇病例报告和文献综述强调了一例奇亚里畸形患儿轻微创伤导致脊髓损伤的罕见病例，强调了考虑潜在基础病的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Even minor trauma can cause spinal cord injury in children with Chiari Malformation. When assessing pediatric trauma, especially to the neck, always be vigilant for underlying congenital malformations, as this could entirely alter your prognosis and risk management strategy. Avoid focusing solely on the trauma itself.
items.limitation: 作为病例报告和文献综述，证据等级较低，无法提供普遍性的临床指导。
items.limitationEn: As a case report and literature review, the evidence level is low and cannot provide general clinical guidance.

items.title: Early detection of Australian Aboriginal and Torres Strait ...
items.summary: This study protocol outlines a prospective cohort study (LEAP-CP) to identify Australian Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander infants at high risk of adverse neurodevelopmental outcomes at 12 months corrected age.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究旨在早期发现高神经发育不良风险的澳大利亚原住民和托雷斯海峡岛民婴儿。了解这类研究方案有助于你识别高危儿童，并为文化敏感的早期干预服务做好准备。
items.titleZh: 在澳大利亚原住民和托雷斯海峡岛民婴儿中早期发现 12 个月矫正年龄时有不良神经发育结局高风险的婴儿：LEAP-CP 前瞻性队列研究方案
items.summaryZh: 本研究方案概述了一项前瞻性队列研究（LEAP-CP），旨在识别澳大利亚原住民和托雷斯海峡岛民婴儿在 12 个月矫正年龄时出现不良神经发育结局的高风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study aims for early detection of Australian Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander infants at high risk of adverse neurodevelopmental outcomes. Understanding such research protocols helps you identify high-risk children and prepare for culturally sensitive early intervention services.
items.limitation: 这是一项研究方案，尚未发布具体研究结果，无法评估其临床影响。
items.limitationEn: This is a study protocol, and specific research results have not yet been published, so its clinical impact cannot be assessed.

items.title: 115 Early childhood development in the next 1000 days: an analysis through the lens of nurturing and sensitive care
items.summary:
115 Early childhood development in the next 1000 days: an analysis through the lens of nurturing and sensitive care | BMJ Paediatrics Open
...
# 115 Early childhood development in the next 1000 days: an
items.curatedReason: 这份关于“下一个 1000 天”早期儿童发展的报告强调了培养和敏感照护的重要性。你应将这些核心原则融入对家庭的指导中，以促进儿童的全面发展，而不仅仅是解决特定运动障碍。
items.titleZh: 下一个 1000 天的早期儿童发展：从培养和敏感照护视角进行分析
items.summaryZh: 一份报告分析了“下一个 1000 天”的早期儿童发展，强调了培养和敏感照护在儿童成长中的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This report on early childhood development in the “next 1000 days” emphasizes the importance of nurturing and sensitive care. You should integrate these core principles into your guidance for families to promote comprehensive child development, not just address specific motor impairments.
items.limitation: 这是一份会议摘要，提供了概念性框架，而非实证研究结果。
items.limitationEn: This is a conference abstract, providing a conceptual framework rather than empirical research findings.

items.title: Beyond "Biomedical-Plus": Reclaiming the biopsychosocial model in musculoskeletal physiotherapy.
items.summary: This perspective piece argues that while the biopsychosocial (BPS) model is endorsed in musculoskeletal physiotherapy, its implementation often devolves into "biomedical-plus" care. It proposes three foundational conditions—professional Confidence, role Clarity, and Compassionate communication—for physiotherapists to achieve a more authentic BPS application.
items.curatedReason: 生物心理社会（BPS）模型在肌肉骨骼康复中被广泛认可，但实践中常流于形式。这篇文章强调，要真正实现 BPS 模型，你需要提升专业自信（Confidence）、明确角色定位（Clarity）以及运用富有同情心的沟通（Compassionate communication）。这是 PT 深入整合 BPS 的重要一步。
items.titleZh: 超越“生物医学附加”：在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中重申生物心理社会模型。
items.summaryZh: 该述评指出，生物心理社会（BPS）模型在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中虽受推崇，但实践常受生物医学假设限制，沦为“生物医学附加”模式。文章提出，物理治疗师可通过提升专业自信、明确角色定位和运用富有同情心的沟通，实现 BPS 模型的真正整合。
items.curatedReasonEn: The biopsychosocial (BPS) model is widely endorsed in musculoskeletal rehabilitation, but often superficially applied. This article emphasizes that truly integrating the BPS model requires you to foster professional Confidence, role Clarity, and Compassionate communication. This is a crucial step for PTs to deepen their BPS practice.
items.limitation: 这是一篇观点述评，不涉及实证研究设计。
items.limitationEn: This is a perspective piece and does not involve empirical study design.

items.title: Aspirin Matches Rivaroxaban for Blood Clot Prevention After Joint Replacement, Suggests Study
items.summary: The EPCAT III randomized trial found an aspirin-only regimen was as effective and safe as rivaroxaban for preventing symptomatic venous thromboembolism after total hip or knee arthroplasty, with no clinically significant difference in bleeding risk.
items.curatedReason: 对于全髋或全膝关节置换术后的 VTE 预防，阿司匹林与利伐沙班同样有效且安全，出血风险也无显著差异。这意味着你可以放心地为患者选择成本更低、更简便的阿司匹林方案。
items.titleZh: 研究表明：阿司匹林在关节置换术后预防血栓方面与利伐沙班效果相当
items.summaryZh: EPCAT III 随机试验发现，在全髋关节或膝关节置换术后，单纯使用阿司匹林方案在预防症状性静脉血栓栓塞方面与利伐沙班同样有效且安全，出血风险无临床显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Aspirin is as effective and safe as rivaroxaban for VTE prevention after total hip or knee arthroplasty, with no significant difference in bleeding risk. You can confidently choose the more cost-effective and simpler aspirin regimen for your patients.
items.limitation: 摘要未提供详细的患者风险分层信息，结果可能主要适用于标准风险患者。
items.limitationEn: The abstract does not provide detailed patient risk stratification information, so the results may primarily apply to standard-risk patients.

items.title: Moderate, Home-Based Exercise Proven Safe for Aortic Dissection Survivors, find researchers
items.summary: Researchers have found that moderate, home-based exercise is safe for survivors of aortic dissection, providing important insights for their rehabilitation and long-term management.
items.curatedReason: 请注意：中等强度的居家运动对主动脉夹层幸存者是安全的。这条证据打破了以往对这类高危患者运动限制的顾虑，为你制定和推荐康复运动方案提供了重要依据。
items.titleZh: 研究人员发现：中等强度居家运动对主动脉夹层幸存者安全有效
items.summaryZh: 研究人员发现，中等强度的居家运动对主动脉夹层幸存者是安全的，这为其康复和长期管理提供了重要见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: Please note: moderate, home-based exercise is safe for aortic dissection survivors. This evidence challenges previous concerns about exercise restrictions for these high-risk patients, providing crucial support for your rehabilitation exercise prescriptions.
items.limitation: 新闻稿中未提供原始研究的设计和具体数据，需要查阅原文以评估证据强度和适用人群。
items.limitationEn: The news release does not provide the design and specific data of the original study; the full text is needed to assess the strength of the evidence and target population.

items.title: P2Y12 Inhibitors Linked to Worse Outcomes After Spontaneous Intracerebral Hemorrhage: JAMA
items.summary: A registry-based cohort study published in JAMA Network Open found that prior use of P2Y12 inhibitors was associated with more severe strokes, higher in-hospital mortality, poorer clinical outcomes, and reduced functional recovery in patients with spontaneous intracerebral hemorrhage not related to anticoagulants.
items.curatedReason: 这项队列研究发现，既往使用 P2Y12 抑制剂与自发性脑出血患者更差的预后相关。在管理有卒中风险的患者时，应综合考虑其抗凝和抗血小板用药史对康复预后的潜在影响。
items.titleZh: JAMA：P2Y12 抑制剂与自发性脑出血后不良预后相关
items.summaryZh: JAMA Network Open 发表的一项基于注册的队列研究发现，对于与抗凝剂无关的自发性脑出血患者，既往使用 P2Y12 抑制剂与更严重的卒中、更高的住院死亡率、更差的临床结局和更低的功能恢复相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cohort study found that prior P2Y12 inhibitor use is associated with worse outcomes in patients with spontaneous intracerebral hemorrhage. When managing patients at stroke risk, you should comprehensively consider the potential impact of their anticoagulant and antiplatelet medication history on rehabilitation prognosis.
items.limitation: 这是一项注册研究，可能存在混杂因素和未测量变量的偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This is a registry-based cohort study, which may be subject to confounding factors and unmeasured variable bias.

items.title: Long-term exposure to air pollution linked to increased risk of Parkinson's disease: Study
items.summary: Cambridge researchers conducted a critical review of existing evidence, finding a link between long-term exposure to certain types of air pollution and an increased risk of Parkinson's disease, along with other neurodegenerative conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这项综述表明，长期暴露于空气污染可能增加帕金森病的风险。在评估帕金森患者的风险因素时，你可以将环境暴露作为潜在考虑之一。
items.titleZh: 研究：长期暴露于空气污染与帕金森病风险增加相关
items.summaryZh: 剑桥研究人员对现有证据进行了一项批判性综述，发现长期暴露于某些类型的空气污染与帕金森病及其他神经退行性疾病的风险增加相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review suggests that long-term exposure to air pollution may increase the risk of Parkinson's disease. When assessing risk factors for Parkinson's patients, you can consider environmental exposure as a potential factor.
items.limitation: 这是一项综述，其结论的强度取决于纳入研究的质量和一致性，而非原始证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a review, and the strength of its conclusions depends on the quality and consistency of the included studies, not primary evidence.

items.title: A randomised controlled feasibility trial of guided parent-delivered cognitive behaviour therapy for children’s perfectionism | European Child & Adolescent Psychiatry
items.summary: A two-arm randomized controlled feasibility trial compared a 6-session guided parent-delivered cognitive behavior therapy for perfectionism (GP-CBT-P) with a waitlist control for children's perfectionism, assessing feasibility, acceptability, and preliminary efficacy.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照可行性试验表明，家长主导的儿童完美主义认知行为疗法是可行且可接受的。这为儿童心理康复的早期干预模式提供了新的思路，你可以关注其后续的有效性研究。
items.titleZh: 一项针对儿童完美主义的家长主导认知行为疗法的随机对照可行性试验
items.summaryZh: 一项两臂随机对照可行性试验比较了针对儿童完美主义的 6 次引导式家长主导认知行为疗法（GP-CBT-P）与等待名单对照组，评估了其可行性、可接受性和初步疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled feasibility trial indicates that parent-delivered cognitive behavioral therapy for children's perfectionism is feasible and acceptable. This offers a new direction for early intervention models in pediatric psychological rehabilitation, and you should monitor its subsequent efficacy studies.
items.limitation: 这是一项可行性试验，主要关注干预的可行性和可接受性，而非大规模的临床疗效。
items.limitationEn: This is a feasibility trial, primarily focused on the feasibility and acceptability of the intervention, rather than large-scale clinical efficacy.

items.title: Risk factors for preoperative isolated calf muscle vein thrombosis in elderly patients with hip fracture and development of a predictive nomogram: a retrospective study
items.summary: A retrospective study aimed to determine the incidence and independent risk factors of preoperative isolated calf muscle vein thrombosis (ICMVT) in elderly patients with hip fractures and developed a predictive nomogram, addressing a common and often overlooked complication.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性研究确定了老年髋部骨折患者术前孤立性小腿肌静脉血栓（ICMVT）的发生率和独立风险因素。临床上，在评估这类患者时应警惕这些风险因素，以便早期筛查和干预，避免遗漏这一常见并发症。
items.titleZh: 老年髋部骨折患者术前孤立性小腿肌静脉血栓风险因素及预测列线图的开发：一项回顾性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性研究旨在确定老年髋部骨折患者术前孤立性小腿肌静脉血栓（ICMVT）的发生率和独立风险因素，并开发了预测列线图，以解决这一常见但常被忽视的并发症。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study identified risk factors for preoperative isolated calf muscle vein thrombosis (ICMVT) in elderly patients with hip fractures and developed a predictive nomogram. When assessing these patients, you can use these risk factors for early screening and prevention.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性研究，可能存在回顾性偏倚和选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective study, which may be subject to recall bias and selection bias.

items.title: Exercise Rewires the Heart's Nerve Network Beyond Strengthening It: Study
items.summary: A new study reveals that regular aerobic exercise rewires the heart's nerve network in a unique left-right pattern, suggesting exercise does more than just strengthen the heart and potentially leading to targeted treatments for heart disease.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，规律有氧运动可能通过重塑心脏的神经网络，以独特的左右模式发挥作用。它深化了我们对运动益处的理解，提示运动不仅强化心脏，更可能从神经层面改善心脏功能。
items.titleZh: 研究：运动通过重塑心脏神经网络，其作用超越了单纯强化心脏
items.summaryZh: 一项新研究显示，规律的有氧运动以独特的左右模式重塑心脏的神经网络，表明运动的作用不仅限于强化心脏，并可能为心脏病提供靶向治疗。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that regular aerobic exercise may work by rewiring the heart's nerve network in a unique left-right pattern. It deepens our understanding of exercise benefits, suggesting exercise not only strengthens the heart but may also improve cardiac function at a neurological level.
items.limitation: 新闻稿中未提供原始研究的设计和具体数据，需要查阅原文以评估其证据等级和临床相关性。
items.limitationEn: The news release does not provide the design and specific data of the original study; the full text is needed to assess its evidence level and clinical relevance.

items.title: Cohort profile: the Acquired Brain Injury Community ...
items.summary: The Acquired Brain Injury Community REhabilitation and Support Services OuTcomes CohoRT (ABI-RESTaRT) profile details a cohort study in Western Australia from 1991–2020, focusing on individuals with acquired brain injury receiving community rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这份队列研究的概要描述了澳大利亚西部脑损伤社区康复服务的 30 年数据。它主要用于了解人群特征和未来研究方向，而非直接提供干预措施的有效性证据。
items.titleZh: 队列概况：西澳大利亚创伤性脑损伤社区康复与支持服务结果队列（1991–2020）
items.summaryZh: 创伤性脑损伤社区康复与支持服务结果队列（ABI-RESTaRT）的概况详细介绍了 1991-2020 年间西澳大利亚一项针对接受社区康复的创伤性脑损伤患者的队列研究。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cohort profile describes 30 years of data from acquired brain injury community rehabilitation services in Western Australia. It serves to understand population characteristics and future research directions, rather than providing direct evidence of intervention effectiveness.
items.limitation: 这是一项队列研究的概况，本身不提供干预效果或因果关系证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a cohort profile, and as such, does not provide evidence of intervention efficacy or causality.

items.title: NumbersPlayRoom VR: a serious game for supporting numerical cognition in primary school children | Virtual Reality
items.summary: NumbersPlayRoom VR is a virtual reality serious game designed to support fundamental numerical skills in primary school children, particularly those with Developmental Dyscalculia, demonstrating potential in an exploratory study.
items.curatedReason: 这项早期探索性研究表明，VR 游戏 NumbersPlayRoom VR 在帮助小学儿童（包括发展性计算障碍儿童）提升基本数字技能方面有一定潜力。虽然还处于初级阶段，但值得我们关注虚拟现实在儿科康复中的应用前景。
items.titleZh: NumbersPlayRoom VR：一款支持学龄儿童数字认知的严肃游戏
items.summaryZh: NumbersPlayRoom VR 是一款虚拟现实严肃游戏，旨在支持学龄儿童，特别是患有发育性计算障碍的儿童，学习基本的数字技能，在一项探索性研究中展现了潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This early exploratory study suggests NumbersPlayRoom VR, a VR game, has potential in helping primary school children (including those with Developmental Dyscalculia) improve fundamental numerical skills. While still preliminary, it's worth monitoring the prospects of virtual reality in pediatric rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 这是一项探索性研究，主要评估可行性，而非干预的长期疗效。
items.limitationEn: This is an exploratory study, primarily assessing feasibility rather than long-term efficacy of the intervention.

items.title: Integrin-β1/FAK signaling is involved in electrical stimulation to prevent disuse muscular atrophy induced by tail suspension in mice
items.summary: An animal study using a tail suspension mouse model investigated the mechanism of electrical stimulation in preventing disuse muscular atrophy, hypothesizing the involvement of Integrin-β1 and its downstream FAK signaling pathway.
items.curatedReason: 这项动物实验探讨了电刺激通过 Integrin-β1/FAK 信号通路预防废用性肌萎缩的机制。它为我们理解电刺激的生物学作用提供了线索，但仍需进一步研究其在人体中的应用。
items.titleZh: Integrin-β1/FAK 信号通路参与电刺激预防小鼠废用性肌萎缩
items.summaryZh: 一项使用尾悬挂小鼠模型的动物研究探讨了电刺激预防废用性肌萎缩的机制，假设 Integrin-β1 及其下游 FAK 信号通路参与其中。
items.curatedReasonEn: This animal experiment explores the mechanism by which electrical stimulation prevents disuse muscle atrophy via the Integrin-β1/FAK signaling pathway. It provides clues for understanding the biological effects of electrical stimulation, but further research is needed for its human application.
items.limitation: 这是一项动物实验，结果不能直接外推到人类。
items.limitationEn: This is an animal experiment, and its results cannot be directly extrapolated to humans.

items.title: The RESOLVE Trial: A Stepped-Wedge, Cluster-Randomized Clinical Trial Evaluating the Effects of Clinical Practice Guidelines and Psychologically Informed Physical Therapy on Low Back Pain Outcomes in Service Members and Veterans.
items.summary: A stepped-wedge, cluster-randomized trial evaluating a clinical practice guideline and psychologically informed physical therapy (CPG+PIPT) implementation strategy found it reduced LBP-related disability, pain, and healthcare utilization in military and veteran settings.
items.curatedReason: 这项多中心、阶梯式整群随机试验验证了临床指南结合心理干预策略对腰痛患者的疗效，提供了临床决策的重要依据。关注其在军事和退伍军人医疗环境中的应用。
items.titleZh: RESOLVE试验：一项评估临床实践指南和心理信息物理疗法对服役人员和退伍军人腰痛结局影响的分层整群随机临床试验。
items.titleEn: The RESOLVE Trial: A Stepped-Wedge, Cluster-Randomized Clinical Trial Evaluating the Effects of Clinical Practice Guidelines and Psychologically Informed Physical Therapy on Low Back Pain Outcomes in Service Members and Veterans.
items.summaryZh: 一项评估临床实践指南与心理信息物理疗法（CPG+PIPT）实施策略的阶梯式整群随机试验，结果显示该策略在军事和退伍军人医疗环境中可减少腰痛相关残疾、疼痛及下游医疗利用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multi-site, stepped-wedge, cluster-randomized trial validates the effectiveness of clinical guidelines combined with psychologically informed physical therapy for low back pain, offering significant clinical decision-making insights. Focus on its application in military and veteran healthcare settings.
items.limitation: 研究仅涵盖军事和退伍军人医疗环境，结果的外推性需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study is limited to military and veteran healthcare settings, requiring caution in extrapolating results.

items.title: Exploring facilitators and barriers to health behaviors in stroke survivors: a multi-perspective qualitative study of patients, families, and healthcare professionals.
items.summary: A qualitative study involving stroke survivors, family caregivers, and healthcare professionals in China explored facilitators and barriers to post-stroke health behaviors related to secondary prevention, interpreting findings through the Adaptive Leadership Framework.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究提示，卒中后二级预防的健康行为受患者、家属及医护人员多重因素影响。理解这些障碍和促进因素，有助于制定更有效的干预措施。
items.titleZh: 卒中幸存者健康行为的促进与障碍因素探索：一项多视角定性研究。
items.titleEn: Exploring facilitators and barriers to health behaviors in stroke survivors: a multi-perspective qualitative study of patients, families, and healthcare professionals.
items.summaryZh: 一项在中国进行的涉及卒中幸存者、家庭照顾者和医疗专业人员的研究，通过适应性领导框架探讨了与二次预防相关的卒中后健康行为的促进和障碍因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study suggests that secondary prevention health behaviors post-stroke are influenced by multiple factors from patients, families, and healthcare professionals. Understanding these barriers and facilitators can help develop more effective interventions.
items.limitation: 研究为定性研究，样本量为17例卒中幸存者、10例家属及11名医护人员，且仅限于三家康复医院。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a sample size of 17 stroke survivors, 10 family caregivers, and 11 healthcare professionals, limited to three rehabilitation hospitals.

items.title: Perspectives of Private Practice Physical Therapy Health Care Systems Participating in a Pragmatic Clinical Trial: A Qualitative Study.
items.summary: A qualitative study sharing the perspectives of four private practice physical therapy health care systems participating in a pragmatic clinical trial (FM-TIPS) may benefit clinicians and researchers considering non-academic settings in research.
items.curatedReason: 对于考虑在私立诊所开展临床研究的同行，这项定性研究提示了与学术机构不同的挑战与机遇。然而，仅有 4 个系统参与，结果的外推性有限。
items.titleZh: 参与实用临床试验的私营物理治疗医疗系统参与者的视角：一项定性研究。
items.titleEn: Perspectives of Private Practice Physical Therapy Health Care Systems Participating in a Pragmatic Clinical Trial: A Qualitative Study.
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究分享了参与实用临床试验（FM-TIPS）的四家私营物理治疗医疗系统的视角，可能有助于考虑非学术环境参与研究的临床医生和研究人员。
items.curatedReasonEn: For peers considering clinical research in private practice, this qualitative study highlights distinct challenges and opportunities compared to academic settings. However, with only 4 systems involved, the generalizability of findings is limited.
items.limitation: 研究的视角仅限于参与一项具体试验的四家诊所。
items.limitationEn: The perspectives are limited to four clinics involved in one specific trial.

items.title: [Perspectives] The art of fidelity: clinical documentation and ambient AI
items.summary: A perspective piece highlights the current limitations of ambient AI in clinical documentation, noting its tendency to miss crucial patient narratives like caregiving burden and medication adherence issues, even while accurately recording medical facts.
items.curatedReason: 人工智能在医疗记录中的应用正在改变工作流程，但你也应警惕其在抓取患者核心问题时的局限性，尤其是那些未被直接言明的社会心理因素。
items.titleZh: 人工智能病历：忠实度与临床洞察的平衡
items.summaryZh: 一篇评论文章指出，环境人工智能在临床记录方面存在局限性，它可能忽略患者重要的叙述，如护理负担和药物依从性问题，即使其医学记录准确无误。
items.curatedReasonEn: AI's application in medical documentation is transforming workflows, but you should be wary of its limitations in capturing core patient issues, especially unspoken psychosocial factors.

items.title: Measurement Characteristics and Clinical Utility of the 6-Minute Walk Test Among People with Stroke
items.summary: This study focuses on the measurement characteristics and clinical utility of the 6-Minute Walk Test (6MWT) in individuals with stroke.
items.curatedReason: 卒中患者的 6 分钟步行测试（6MWT）仍是功能评估的重要工具，但你知道它在不同亚组里的测量特性和敏感性差异吗？了解这些细节能帮你更好地解读结果，并根据患者具体情况调整你的康复策略。
items.titleZh: 卒中患者 6 分钟步行测试的测量特性和临床应用价值
items.summaryZh: 本研究探讨了卒中患者 6 分钟步行测试（6MWT）的测量特性和临床应用价值。
items.curatedReasonEn: The 6-Minute Walk Test (6MWT) remains a vital tool for assessing function in stroke patients. However, do you know the differences in its measurement characteristics and sensitivity across various subgroups? Understanding these details will help you better interpret results and tailor your rehabilitation strategies to the patient's specific condition.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: High-intensity interval training in cancer patients: a bayesian meta-analysis of effects on VO2max, dose–response, and adherence | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A Bayesian meta-analysis on high-intensity interval training (HIIT) in cancer patients investigated its effects on VO2max, dose-response, and adherence, confirming positive impacts and good patient tolerance.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对癌症患者高强度间歇训练（HIIT）的贝叶斯荟萃分析，证实了 HIIT 对最大摄氧量（VO2max）的积极影响、剂量反应关系以及良好的依从性。这表明你可以更有信心地将 HIIT 纳入癌症患者的康复方案，但仍需根据个体情况调整，确保安全性和有效性。
items.titleZh: 癌症患者高强度间歇训练：VO2max、剂量反应和依从性的贝叶斯荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项针对癌症患者高强度间歇训练（HIIT）的贝叶斯荟萃分析，研究了其对最大摄氧量（VO2max）、剂量反应和依从性的影响，证实了积极效果和良好的患者耐受性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Bayesian meta-analysis on high-intensity interval training (HIIT) in cancer patients confirms its positive impact on VO2max, dose-response relationship, and good adherence. This suggests you can more confidently incorporate HIIT into cancer patient rehabilitation programs, while still individualizing adjustments to ensure safety and effectiveness.
items.limitation: 虽然是贝叶斯荟萃分析，但癌症患者群体异质性大，不同癌症类型和治疗阶段的适用性仍需谨慎考虑。
items.limitationEn: Although a Bayesian meta-analysis, the cancer patient population is highly heterogeneous, and applicability across different cancer types and treatment stages still requires careful consideration.

items.title: Hip range of motion is differentially associated with pain sensitivity in individuals with and without knee osteoarthritis
items.summary: This cross-sectional study aimed to investigate the association between knee pain sensitivity and hip rotator range of motion (ROM) in individuals with and without knee osteoarthritis (KOA), finding differential associations.
items.curatedReason: 髋关节活动度与膝骨关节炎（KOA）患者和非 KOA 个体的疼痛敏感性存在差异关联。这提示你在评估 KOA 患者时，除了膝关节本身，也要关注髋关节的功能状态及其对疼痛感知的影响。
items.titleZh: 髋关节活动度与膝骨关节炎患者和无病个体疼痛敏感性的差异关联
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究旨在调查膝关节疼痛敏感性与髋关节旋转活动度在膝骨关节炎（KOA）患者和无 KOA 个体中的关联，发现存在差异性关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: Hip range of motion is differentially associated with pain sensitivity in individuals with and without knee osteoarthritis (KOA). This suggests that when evaluating KOA patients, you should also consider hip joint function and its influence on pain perception, beyond the knee itself.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法建立因果关系，且样本量未明确。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional study cannot establish causality and the sample size was not explicitly stated.

items.title: Let's talk about sex (and gender) after ACL injury: a ...
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis investigated the influence of sex and gender on self-reported activity and knee-related outcomes after ACL injury.
items.curatedReason: 在评估和康复 ACL 损伤患者时，你必须考虑性别对自我报告活动和膝关节结局的影响。这项系统综述和荟萃分析明确显示了性别差异，提示你需要提供更个性化的干预方案。
items.titleZh: ACL 损伤后关于性别与活动的讨论：自我报告活动和膝关节相关结局的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析探讨了 ACL 损伤后性别对自我报告活动和膝关节相关结局的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: When evaluating and rehabilitating ACL injury patients, you must consider the influence of sex on self-reported activity and knee-related outcomes. This systematic review and meta-analysis clearly demonstrates sex differences, indicating the need for more personalized intervention plans.
items.limitation: 研究发表于 2023 年，部分数据可能不是最新。
items.limitationEn: The study was published in 2023, and some data may not be the most recent.

items.title: Supervised pulmonary rehabilitation using minimal or ...
items.summary: A propensity-matched analysis found that supervised pulmonary rehabilitation using minimal or specialist exercise equipment in COPD patients produced similar outcomes, suggesting that complex equipment is not essential.
items.curatedReason: 针对 COPD 患者，无论使用最少还是专业运动设备进行的有监督肺康复，都能产生相似的效果。这提示你，不必过分依赖昂贵设备，简易运动器材也能有效开展肺康复，提高其在资源有限环境下的可及性。
items.titleZh: COPD 患者使用最少或专业运动设备进行有监督肺康复：倾向匹配分析
items.summaryZh: 一项倾向匹配分析发现，COPD 患者无论使用最少还是专业运动设备进行有监督肺康复，都能产生相似的结果，表明复杂设备并非必需。
items.curatedReasonEn: Supervised pulmonary rehabilitation for COPD patients, whether using minimal or specialist exercise equipment, yields similar effects. This suggests that you don't need to over-rely on expensive equipment; simple exercise tools can effectively deliver pulmonary rehabilitation, increasing its accessibility in resource-limited settings.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性匹配分析，而非随机对照试验，可能存在未控制的混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective matched-pair analysis, not a randomized controlled trial, and may have unaddressed confounding factors.

items.title: Investigating primary healthcare practitioners' barriers and ...
items.summary: A mixed-methods study using the Theoretical Domains Framework investigated primary healthcare practitioners' barriers and enablers to referring COPD patients to pulmonary rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 要提高 COPD 肺康复的转诊率和患者依从性，你需要了解初级保健医生在转诊中的具体障碍和促成因素。这项研究指明了沟通和协作的重点，以便你能更有效地与他们合作。
items.titleZh: 调查初级保健医生转诊 COPD 患者至肺康复的障碍和促成因素：一项基于理论领域框架的混合方法研究
items.summaryZh: 一项采用理论领域框架的混合方法研究，调查了初级保健医生将 COPD 患者转诊至肺康复的障碍和促成因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explores barriers and enablers for primary healthcare practitioners referring COPD patients to pulmonary rehabilitation. This can help you understand key points for communication and collaboration with primary care physicians, thereby increasing referral rates and patient adherence to COPD pulmonary rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 这是一项混合方法研究，其定性部分可能受访谈者主观性影响，定量部分未明确具体数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a mixed-methods study; its qualitative component may be influenced by interviewee subjectivity, and the quantitative component does not specify concrete data.

items.title: based exercise adherence after stroke: a Delphi consensus
items.summary: A Delphi consensus study aimed to develop strategies to support home-based exercise adherence after stroke, providing a framework for improving patient engagement in rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这项德尔菲共识研究为支持卒中后居家运动依从性制定了策略。你可以参考这些策略，改进你对卒中患者居家康复的指导和支持，提高其长期依从性。
items.titleZh: 支持卒中后居家运动依从性策略的制定：一项德尔菲共识
items.summaryZh: 一项德尔菲共识研究旨在制定支持卒中后居家运动依从性的策略，为改善患者康复参与度提供了框架。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Delphi consensus study developed strategies to support home-based exercise adherence after stroke. You can refer to these strategies to improve your guidance and support for stroke patients' home-based rehabilitation, enhancing their long-term adherence.
items.limitation: 德尔菲共识研究结果依赖于专家意见，而非直接临床证据，可能存在专家群体代表性偏差。
items.limitationEn: Delphi consensus results rely on expert opinions rather than direct clinical evidence, which may lead to biases in expert panel representation.

items.title: Robotics and Exoskeletons in Neurorehabilitation
items.summary: This publication provides an overview of robotics and exoskeletons in neurorehabilitation, highlighting technological advancements in the field.
items.curatedReason: 机器人和外骨骼在神经康复领域的技术进步，正重新定义我们治疗卒中、脊髓损伤等患者的方式。关注这些趋势，预判未来数年内它们如何融入你的日常实践。
items.titleZh: 神经康复中的机器人和外骨骼
items.summaryZh: 这篇出版物概述了神经康复中的机器人和外骨骼技术，强调了该领域的技术进步。
items.curatedReasonEn: Technological advancements in robotics and exoskeletons for neurorehabilitation are redefining how we treat patients with conditions like stroke and spinal cord injury. Pay attention to these trends to anticipate how they will integrate into your daily practice in the coming years.

items.title: The impact of timing on bright light therapy: Alleviating anhedonia and circadian rhythm disturbances in depression patients: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: A single-blind, placebo-controlled randomized controlled trial (n=81) investigated the effectiveness of bright light therapy (BLT) at different times (morning vs. evening) in alleviating anhedonia and circadian rhythm disturbances in depression patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验显示，不同时间段的强光疗法对抑郁症患者的快感缺失和昼夜节律紊乱有影响。这提示你在康复中遇到伴有抑郁和睡眠问题的患者时，可以考虑将强光疗法作为辅助干预，但需要关注具体应用时机。
items.titleZh: 时机对强光疗法的影响：缓解抑郁症患者的快感缺失和昼夜节律紊乱：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项单盲、安慰剂对照的随机对照试验（n=81）调查了不同时间（早晨 vs. 晚上）强光疗法在缓解抑郁症患者快感缺失和昼夜节律紊乱方面的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial shows that bright light therapy at different timings affects anhedonia and circadian rhythm disturbances in depression patients. This suggests that when you encounter patients with depression and sleep problems in rehabilitation, you can consider bright light therapy as an adjunctive intervention, but pay attention to the specific timing of application.
items.limitation: 本研究为单盲设计，且样本量相对较小（n=81），结果的普遍性和长期有效性需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This study was single-blinded and had a relatively small sample size (n=81); the generalizability and long-term effectiveness of the results require further validation.

items.title: Disability and Rehabilitation, Volume 48, Issue 15 (2026)
items.summary: The latest issue of "Disability and Rehabilitation, Volume 48, Issue 15" has been published, featuring various research articles.
items.curatedReason: 《残疾与康复》期刊的最新一期收录了多篇神经康复相关研究。你可以浏览目录，了解该领域最新进展。
items.titleZh: 《残疾与康复》第 48 卷第 15 期（2026）
items.summaryZh: 《残疾与康复》第 48 卷第 15 期已出版，收录了多篇研究文章。
items.curatedReasonEn: The latest issue of "Disability and Rehabilitation" features multiple studies relevant to neurological rehabilitation. You can browse the table of contents to stay updated on advancements in the field.

items.title: Biomechanical patterns associated with body mass index in percutaneous transforaminal endoscopic decompression models of elderly lumbar spinal stenosis with severe disc degeneration and osteoporosis: a finite element study
items.summary: A finite element study investigated BMI-related biomechanical patterns in elderly lumbar spinal stenosis patients with severe disc degeneration and osteoporosis following percutaneous transforaminal endoscopic decompression (PTED), focusing on postoperative kinematics and load redistribution.
items.curatedReason: 这项有限元研究探讨了老年腰椎管狭窄症患者经皮椎间孔内窥镜减压术（PTED）后，BMI 对生物力学模式的影响。目前该研究属于工程力学建模范畴，不能直接指导临床康复方案，但可作为了解手术对脊柱生物力学影响的参考。
items.titleZh: BMI 对经皮椎间孔内窥镜减压术治疗重度椎间盘退变和骨质疏松老年腰椎管狭窄症生物力学模式的影响：一项有限元研究
items.summaryZh: 一项有限元研究调查了 BMI 对经皮椎间孔内窥镜减压术 (PTED) 治疗重度椎间盘退变和骨质疏松老年腰椎管狭窄症患者生物力学模式的影响，重点关注术后运动学和载荷再分配。
items.curatedReasonEn: This finite element study explores the impact of BMI on biomechanical patterns after percutaneous transforaminal endoscopic decompression (PTED) in elderly patients with lumbar spinal stenosis. Currently, this study falls within the scope of engineering mechanics modeling and cannot directly guide clinical rehabilitation protocols, but it can serve as a reference for understanding the biomechanical effects of surgery on the spine.
items.limitation: 这是一项有限元研究，属于计算机模拟，结果的临床转化性和现实应用性有待进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a finite element study, which is a computer simulation; the clinical translatability and real-world applicability of its results require further validation.

items.title: Acupressure Improves Quality of Life During Radiotherapy for Head and Neck Cancer: Study
items.summary: Researchers found that traditional and auricular acupressure improved physical, psychological, social, environmental, and overall quality of life in head and neck cancer patients undergoing radiotherapy, suggesting it may be a safe, low-risk supportive therapy.
items.curatedReason: 传统和耳穴按压法改善了头颈癌放疗患者的生活质量。尽管证据仍在累积中，你可以在临床上将按压作为安全、低风险的辅助疗法，帮助患者缓解治疗期间的不适。
items.titleZh: 研究：按压疗法改善头颈癌放疗期间的生活质量
items.summaryZh: 研究人员发现，传统和耳穴按压法改善了头颈癌放疗患者的生理、心理、社会、环境和整体生活质量，表明它可能是一种安全、低风险的辅助疗法。
items.curatedReasonEn: Traditional and auricular acupressure improved quality of life for head and neck cancer radiotherapy patients. While evidence is still accumulating, you can clinically use acupressure as a safe, low-risk adjunctive therapy to help patients alleviate discomfort during treatment.
items.limitation: 这是一篇新闻报道，基于一项研究的结论，但未提供研究的具体方法、样本量和详细数据，无法评估证据等级。
items.limitationEn: This is a news report based on a study's conclusion, but it does not provide specific methods, sample size, or detailed data from the study, making it impossible to assess the level of evidence.

items.title: Exploring equity in telehealth interventions in physiotherapy: A meta-epidemiological study.
items.summary: A meta-epidemiological study of 94 telehealth equity trials in physiotherapy found that while telehealth interventions are increasingly studied, equity considerations, especially regarding socioeconomic status and social background, remain a gap.
items.curatedReason: 这项荟萃流行病学研究揭示，尽管物理治疗中的远程医疗研究日益增多，但仍需高度关注其公平性，特别是在社会经济地位和社会背景方面。未来推广远程 PT 时，切勿忽视这些潜在的数字鸿沟。
items.titleZh: 探索物理治疗远程干预中的公平性：一项荟萃流行病学研究
items.titleEn: Exploring equity in telehealth interventions in physiotherapy: A meta-epidemiological study.
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 94 项物理治疗远程干预公平性的荟萃流行病学研究发现，尽管远程干预研究日益增多，但在社会经济地位和社会背景等方面的公平性考量仍存在差距。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-epidemiological study reveals that despite increasing research on telehealth in physiotherapy, significant equity gaps persist, especially regarding socioeconomic status and social background. Do not overlook these potential digital divides as telehealth PT expands.
items.limitation: 基于已发表的 RCT，可能存在发表偏倚； PROGRESS+ 框架评估的公平性维度可能不足。
items.limitationEn: Based on published RCTs, potential publication bias; equity dimensions assessed by the PROGRESS+ framework may be limited.

items.title: Effects of resistance-band shoulder exercise on pain, range of motion, and functional disability in diabetic adults with adhesive capsulitis: a pilot randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A pilot RCT (n=28) evaluated resistance-band shoulder exercises in diabetic adults with adhesive capsulitis, finding potential short-term benefits in pain and function.
items.curatedReason: 这项小型 RCT 提示，对于患有糖尿病的冻结肩患者，抗阻弹力带肩部锻炼在短期内可能对疼痛和功能有益。证据等级和样本量有限，但为该特定人群的运动处方提供初步支持。
items.titleZh: 抗阻弹力带肩部锻炼对患有粘连性关节囊炎的糖尿病成人的疼痛、活动范围和功能障碍的影响：一项初步随机对照试验
items.titleEn: Effects of resistance-band shoulder exercise on pain, range of motion, and functional disability in diabetic adults with adhesive capsulitis: a pilot randomized controlled trial.
items.summaryZh: 一项涉及 28 名患有粘连性关节囊炎的糖尿病成人的初步 RCT 评估了抗阻弹力带肩部锻炼的效果，发现其在疼痛和功能方面可能具有短期益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: This small RCT suggests resistance-band shoulder exercises may benefit pain and function short-term in diabetic patients with frozen shoulder. Evidence level and sample size are limited, but it offers preliminary support for exercise prescription in this specific population.
items.limitation: 样本量小（n=28），为初步试验。
items.limitationEn: Small sample size (n=28), pilot trial.

items.title: Outpatient rehabilitation can prevent suicide after acquired brain injury.
items.summary: An outpatient rehabilitation program for adults with acquired brain injuries (591 patients) was associated with a lower frequency of suicides compared to a matched control group (2,932 controls), suggesting a potential preventive effect.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项重要的观察性研究，提示门诊康复可能在脑损伤患者的自杀预防中扮演关键角色。在制定卒中或脑外伤患者的长期康复计划时，应将心理健康筛查和支持作为常规考量。
items.titleZh: 门诊康复可预防获得性脑损伤后的自杀
items.summaryZh: 一项登记研究显示，针对 591 名获得性脑损伤患者的门诊康复项目，与 2,932 名匹配对照组相比，自杀发生率较低，提示其预防作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This significant observational study suggests outpatient rehabilitation may play a crucial role in suicide prevention for brain injury patients. When developing long-term rehabilitation plans for stroke or TBI patients, integrate mental health screening and support as a routine consideration.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性登记研究，存在混杂因素和选择偏倚的风险，无法建立确切因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective registry study carries a risk of confounding factors and selection bias, precluding definitive causal inference.

items.title: The Combined Use of Non-Invasive Neurostimulation with Interactive Digital Technologies in Spinal Cord Injury Rehabilitation: A Scoping Review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified 494 unique records on the combined use of non-invasive neurostimulation with interactive digital technologies in spinal cord injury rehabilitation, mapping the empirical evidence in this emerging field.
items.curatedReason: 本范围综述描绘了非侵入性神经刺激与互动数字技术结合在脊髓损伤康复中的现有证据图谱。它帮你快速掌握该领域技术现状和研究热点。
items.titleZh: 非侵入性神经刺激与互动数字技术在脊髓损伤康复中的联合应用：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述筛选了 494 篇相关研究，旨在描绘非侵入性神经刺激结合互动数字技术在脊髓损伤康复中的经验证据图谱。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review maps the existing evidence landscape for combined non-invasive neurostimulation and interactive digital technologies in SCI rehabilitation. Use it to quickly grasp the current technological status and research hotspots in this field.
items.limitation: 本综述是范围性综述，仅用于描绘现有证据，不进行荟萃分析或提供干预有效性的量化结论。
items.limitationEn: This is a scoping review, intended to map existing evidence, not to perform meta-analysis or provide quantitative conclusions on intervention effectiveness.

items.title: Effectiveness of Visual Needle Knife Release in Treating Knee Osteoarthritis: A Meta-analysis | Indian Journal of Orthopaedics
items.summary: A meta-analysis evaluated the effectiveness of visual needle knife release in treating knee osteoarthritis.
items.curatedReason: 可视化针刀松解术在治疗膝骨关节炎方面显示出一定疗效，该Meta分析提供了支持。但请注意，作为一种介入性治疗，其定位和标准化操作至关重要。将此作为一种辅助手段纳入考虑，但务必在充分评估患者个体情况和风险后进行。
items.titleZh: 可视化针刀松解术治疗膝骨关节炎的有效性：一项Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项Meta分析评估了可视化针刀松解术治疗膝骨关节炎的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Visual needle knife release shows some efficacy in treating knee osteoarthritis, supported by this meta-analysis. However, as an interventional therapy, its precise positioning and standardized operation are crucial. Consider this as an adjunct, but only after thoroughly assessing individual patient conditions and risks.
items.limitation: 作为Meta分析，其结论受限于纳入研究的质量和异质性。
items.limitationEn: As a meta-analysis, its conclusions are limited by the quality and heterogeneity of included studies.

items.title: Specific mode acupoint electrical stimulation combined with NGF for neurological recovery in ischemic stroke convalescence: A randomized controlled study | BMC Medicine
items.summary: A randomized controlled study investigated specific mode acupoint electrical stimulation combined with NGF for neurological recovery in ischemic stroke convalescence.
items.curatedReason: 特定模式穴位电刺激结合神经生长因子（NGF）在缺血性卒中恢复期神经功能恢复中显示出潜力。这提示你可以关注电刺激与生物因子结合在神经康复中的协同作用，但NGF的临床可及性仍是限制，需谨慎解读并等待更多转化研究。
items.titleZh: 特定模式穴位电刺激结合NGF促进缺血性卒中恢复期神经功能恢复：一项随机对照研究
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照研究探讨了特定模式穴位电刺激结合神经生长因子（NGF）在缺血性卒中恢复期对神经功能恢复的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: Specific mode acupoint electrical stimulation combined with nerve growth factor (NGF) shows potential in neurological recovery during ischemic stroke convalescence. This suggests you can pay attention to the synergistic effects of electrical stimulation and biological factors in neurorehabilitation, but NGF's clinical availability remains a limitation, requiring cautious interpretation and awaiting further translational research.
items.limitation: 本研究结合了药物干预（NGF），其独立效应和临床可及性需进一步评估。
items.limitationEn: This study combined pharmacological intervention (NGF), and its independent effects and clinical availability require further evaluation.

items.title: Contralateral Balance Training Improves Postural Control and Functional Recovery After Arthroscopic Anterior Talofibular Ligament Repair: A Prospective, Randomized, Single-Blind Trial | Sports Medicine - Open
items.summary: A prospective, randomized, single-blind trial found that contralateral balance training improves postural control and functional recovery after arthroscopic anterior talofibular ligament repair.
items.curatedReason: 对侧平衡训练在关节镜下前距腓韧带修复术后，可以改善姿势控制和功能恢复。这提示你在术后康复中，除了患侧训练，也应考虑将对侧平衡训练作为重要组成部分，以促进整体功能恢复。
items.titleZh: 对侧平衡训练改善关节镜下前距腓韧带修复术后的姿势控制和功能恢复：一项前瞻性、随机、单盲试验
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性、随机、单盲试验发现，对侧平衡训练可改善关节镜下前距腓韧带修复术后的姿势控制和功能恢复。
items.curatedReasonEn: Contralateral balance training improves postural control and functional recovery after arthroscopic anterior talofibular ligament repair. This suggests that in postoperative rehabilitation, in addition to ipsilateral training, you should consider contralateral balance training as a crucial component to promote overall functional recovery.
items.limitation: 本研究为单盲试验，可能存在一定偏倚，且长期随访数据有待观察。
items.limitationEn: This study is a single-blind trial, which may introduce some bias, and long-term follow-up data are pending.

items.title: A randomized controlled trial of brachial plexus block manipulation versus steroid injection in conscious patients for moderate to severe shoulder stiffness | BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial compared brachial plexus block manipulation versus steroid injection in conscious patients for moderate to severe shoulder stiffness.
items.curatedReason: 对于中度至重度肩关节僵硬患者，臂丛神经阻滞下手法松解与类固醇注射的相对有效性还需要更多研究。目前看来，手法松解作为一种非手术选项是可行的，但其优势仍需通过更具可比性的结局指标来确立。
items.titleZh: 臂丛神经阻滞下手法松解与类固醇注射治疗清醒中度至重度肩关节僵硬患者的随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验比较了臂丛神经阻滞下手法松解与类固醇注射治疗清醒中度至重度肩关节僵硬患者的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: The comparative effectiveness of brachial plexus block manipulation versus steroid injection for moderate to severe shoulder stiffness requires further research. Manipulation appears to be a feasible non-surgical option, but its advantages need to be established through more comparable outcome measures.
items.limitation: 研究未详细报告两种干预的具体效应量和不同结局的差异。
items.limitationEn: The study did not report detailed effect sizes or differences across outcomes for the two interventions.

items.title: Adherence and continuance intention of biofeedback-assisted pelvic floor muscle training: a theory-driven study among women with pelvic floor disorders | BMC Women's Health
items.summary: A theory-driven study investigated the adherence and continuance intention of biofeedback-assisted pelvic floor muscle training among women with pelvic floor disorders.
items.curatedReason: 该观察研究提示，理解女性盆底功能障碍患者对生物反馈辅助盆底肌训练（PFMT）的依从性，需要深入探究其心理动因。你应考虑将行为改变理论融入到治疗方案设计中，以期提高患者的长期依从性和治疗效果。
items.titleZh: 生物反馈辅助盆底肌训练在盆底功能障碍女性中的依从性和持续意愿：一项理论驱动研究
items.summaryZh: 一项理论驱动研究探讨了盆底功能障碍女性生物反馈辅助盆底肌训练的依从性和持续意愿。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study suggests that understanding adherence to biofeedback-assisted pelvic floor muscle training (PFMT) in women with pelvic floor disorders requires delving into psychological motivators. You should consider integrating behavior change theories into treatment plans to enhance long-term adherence and improve outcomes.
items.limitation: 本研究侧重于依从性意愿的理论模型构建，而非干预效果的随机对照评估。
items.limitationEn: This study focuses on constructing a theoretical model of adherence intention, not on randomized controlled evaluation of intervention efficacy.

items.title: Performance of the SmartMe&You serious video games for home telemonitoring is related to cognitive status and resting-state electroencephalographic markers in healthy and Parkinson’s disease participants | GeroScience
items.summary: A study found that the performance of SmartMe&You serious video games for home telemonitoring is related to cognitive status and resting-state electroencephalographic markers in healthy and Parkinson’s disease participants.
items.curatedReason: SmartMe&You严肃视频游戏在家庭远程监测中表现，与认知状态和静息态脑电图标记相关。这提示在帕金森病患者的远程康复中，可利用这类游戏评估认知功能和神经生理状态，为个性化训练提供依据，但其临床应用尚需进一步验证。
items.titleZh: SmartMe&You严肃视频游戏在家庭远程监测中的表现与健康和帕金森病参与者的认知状态和静息态脑电图标记相关
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，SmartMe&You严肃视频游戏在家庭远程监测中的表现与健康和帕金森病参与者的认知状态和静息态脑电图标记相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: The performance of SmartMe&You serious video games in home telemonitoring correlates with cognitive status and resting-state electroencephalographic markers. This suggests that such games can be used in telerehabilitation for Parkinson's disease patients to assess cognitive function and neurophysiological status, providing a basis for personalized training. However, further clinical validation is needed for its application.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，揭示的是相关性而非因果关系，且样本量未明确提及。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study, revealing correlation rather than causation, and the sample size is not explicitly mentioned.

items.title: Clinical trial landscape of cell therapy for spinal cord injury: from integrated practices to future developments | BMC Medicine
items.summary: This review summarizes the clinical trial landscape of cell therapy for spinal cord injury, exploring integrated practices and future developments.
items.curatedReason: 这份综述概述了脊髓损伤（SCI）细胞治疗的临床试验格局，从整合实践到未来发展。作为物理治疗师，你需要关注细胞治疗作为SCI康复辅助手段的潜力，这有助于你与神经外科或康复科医生协作，了解患者可能接受的生物学干预，从而优化康复路径。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤细胞治疗的临床试验概况：从整合实践到未来发展
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述总结了脊髓损伤细胞治疗的临床试验概况，探讨了整合实践和未来发展方向。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review outlines the clinical trial landscape of cell therapy for spinal cord injury (SCI), from integrated practices to future developments. As a physical therapist, you need to pay attention to the potential of cell therapy as an adjunct to SCI rehabilitation, which helps you collaborate with neurosurgeons or physiatrists to understand biological interventions patients might receive, thereby optimizing rehabilitation pathways.
items.limitation: 作为综述性文章，主要提供现有研究概览，不包含新的临床证据或直接干预效果。
items.limitationEn: As a review article, it provides an overview of existing research and does not contain new clinical evidence or direct intervention effects.

items.title: Exploratory Assessment of Robotic Ankle Foot Orthosis Stiffness and Neutral Angle on Stair Ambulation in Individuals with Cerebral Palsy | Annals of Biomedical Engineering
items.summary: An exploratory assessment investigated the impact of robotic ankle-foot orthosis stiffness and neutral angle on stair ambulation in individuals with cerebral palsy.
items.curatedReason: 对脑瘫患者而言，探索机器人踝足矫形器（AFO）的刚度和中立角度对楼梯行走的影响，显示了定制化辅助技术在儿科康复中的潜力。你可以关注这类智能设备如何通过参数调整优化步态，为未来个性化矫形器设计提供依据。
items.titleZh: 探索性评估机器人踝足矫形器刚度和中立角度对脑瘫患者楼梯行走的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性评估研究了机器人踝足矫形器的刚度和中立角度对脑瘫患者楼梯行走能力的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: Exploring the impact of robotic ankle-foot orthosis (AFO) stiffness and neutral angle on stair ambulation in individuals with cerebral palsy demonstrates the potential of customized assistive technology in pediatric rehabilitation. You can focus on how such smart devices optimize gait through parameter adjustments, providing a basis for future personalized orthosis design.
items.limitation: 本研究为探索性评估，样本量较小，且主要关注技术参数对步态的影响，而非长期功能改善。
items.limitationEn: This is an exploratory assessment with a small sample size, primarily focusing on the impact of technical parameters on gait rather than long-term functional improvement.

items.title: Photobiomodulation for primary wound healing and patient-reported outcomes after esthetic crown lengthening surgery: A pilot randomized clinical trial | Lasers in Medical Science
items.summary: A pilot randomized clinical trial explored the effects of photobiomodulation on primary wound healing and patient-reported outcomes after esthetic crown lengthening surgery.
items.curatedReason: 光生物调节（PBM）在改善美学冠延长术后伤口愈合和患者报告结局方面显示出初步潜力。作为一种非侵入性辅助手段，你可以关注其在口腔康复中的应用前景，但目前证据仅限于初步研究，不宜作为常规推荐。
items.titleZh: 光生物调节促进美学冠延长术后原发伤口愈合和患者报告结局：一项初步随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 一项初步随机临床试验探讨了光生物调节对美学冠延长术后原发伤口愈合和患者报告结局的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: Photobiomodulation (PBM) shows preliminary potential in improving wound healing and patient-reported outcomes after esthetic crown lengthening surgery. You can monitor its prospects as a non-invasive adjunct in oral rehabilitation, but current evidence is limited to pilot studies and not yet for routine recommendation.
items.limitation: 本研究为初步的随机临床试验，样本量和外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot randomized clinical trial with limited sample size and generalizability.

items.title: A feasibility randomized controlled trial, the Otago MASTER trial, compared tailored exercise and manual thera…
items.summary: A feasibility randomized controlled trial, the Otago MASTER trial, compared tailored exercise and manual therapy versus standardized exercise for patients with shoulder subacromial pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项可行性随机对照试验提示，针对肩峰下疼痛的个性化运动和手法治疗方案是可行的。在你探索更精细的肩痛管理策略时，这提供了一个研究方向，但请注意其可行性研究的性质，目前尚不能直接指导临床实践。
items.titleZh: 针对肩峰下疼痛患者的个性化运动和手法治疗与标准化运动的比较：一项可行性随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项名为“Otago MASTER”的可行性随机对照试验，比较了针对肩峰下疼痛患者的个性化运动和手法治疗与标准化运动。
items.curatedReasonEn: This feasibility randomized controlled trial suggests that tailored exercise and manual therapy for shoulder subacromial pain are feasible. While exploring more refined shoulder pain management strategies, this offers a research direction, but note its feasibility nature means it cannot directly guide clinical practice yet.
items.limitation: 这是一项可行性研究，主要评估干预措施的可行性而非疗效，样本量较小。
items.limitationEn: This is a feasibility study, primarily assessing intervention feasibility rather than efficacy, with a small sample size.

items.title: Molecular Alterations in Vaginal Wall Tissues Associated with Post-Hysterectomy Pelvic Organ Prolapse | Current Medical Science
items.summary: A study explored molecular alterations in vaginal wall tissues associated with post-hysterectomy pelvic organ prolapse.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了子宫切除术后盆腔器官脱垂（POP）与阴道壁组织分子改变之间的关联。这为理解POP的病理生理机制提供了新的视角，有助于未来更精准的预防和康复策略，但目前对PT临床实践无直接指导意义。
items.titleZh: 子宫切除术后盆腔器官脱垂相关阴道壁组织分子改变
items.summaryZh: 一项研究探讨了子宫切除术后盆腔器官脱垂相关阴道壁组织的分子改变。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals an association between post-hysterectomy pelvic organ prolapse (POP) and molecular alterations in vaginal wall tissues. This offers new perspectives for understanding POP pathophysiology, aiding future precise prevention and rehabilitation strategies, but currently has no direct guidance for PT clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为分子水平的探索性研究，缺乏与康复干预的直接关联性。
items.limitationEn: This is an exploratory study at the molecular level, lacking direct relevance to rehabilitation interventions.

items.title: Clinical outcomes of percutaneous vertebroplasty using robot-assisted cross-puncture technique for osteoporotic vertebral compression fractures | Journal of Robotic Surgery
items.summary: A study investigated the clinical outcomes of percutaneous vertebroplasty using a robot-assisted cross-puncture technique for osteoporotic vertebral compression fractures.
items.curatedReason: 机器人辅助经皮椎体成形术治疗骨质疏松性椎体压缩性骨折，在临床结局方面似乎是可行的。作为物理治疗师，你需要了解这类微创手术的最新进展，以便在术后康复中更好地与骨科医生协作，但该研究本身并未涉及康复干预。
items.titleZh: 机器人辅助交叉穿刺技术经皮椎体成形术治疗骨质疏松性椎体压缩性骨折的临床结局
items.summaryZh: 一项研究评估了机器人辅助交叉穿刺技术经皮椎体成形术治疗骨质疏松性椎体压缩性骨折的临床结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: Robot-assisted percutaneous vertebroplasty for osteoporotic vertebral compression fractures appears feasible in terms of clinical outcomes. As a physical therapist, you need to be aware of the latest advancements in such minimally invasive procedures to better collaborate with orthopedic surgeons in post-operative rehabilitation, though this study itself does not involve rehabilitation interventions.
items.limitation: 本研究重点在于手术技术，未涉及康复干预或其对功能结局的长期影响。
items.limitationEn: This study focuses on surgical technique and does not address rehabilitation interventions or their long-term impact on functional outcomes.

items.title: Patient-and Caregiver-Centered Outcomes in Survivors of Severe Stroke with Respiratory Failure at 6 Months: A Substudy of the SETPOINT2 Trial | Neurocritical Care
items.summary: A substudy of the SETPOINT2 trial investigated patient- and caregiver-centered outcomes in survivors of severe stroke with respiratory failure at 6 months.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提供了重度卒中合并呼吸衰竭幸存者在6个月时的患者和照护者中心结局数据。对于长期护理和康复规划，你需要关注这些结局，以更好地理解患者和家庭的需求，但该研究本身并未评估康复干预的效果。
items.titleZh: 重度卒中合并呼吸衰竭幸存者6个月时以患者和照护者为中心的结局：Setpoint2试验的一项亚研究
items.summaryZh: Setpoint2试验的一项亚研究调查了重度卒中合并呼吸衰竭幸存者在6个月时以患者和照护者为中心的结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study provides patient- and caregiver-centered outcome data at 6 months for survivors of severe stroke with respiratory failure. For long-term care and rehabilitation planning, you need to consider these outcomes to better understand patient and family needs, but the study itself did not evaluate the efficacy of rehabilitation interventions.
items.limitation: 本研究为亚组分析，并非独立的随机对照试验，主要关注结局而非干预。
items.limitationEn: This is a substudy, not an independent RCT, focusing on outcomes rather than interventions.

items.title: Virtual reality stimulation modulates saccular activity and vestibular system responses | European Archives of Oto-Rhino-Laryngology
items.summary: A study found that virtual reality stimulation modulates saccular activity and vestibular system responses.
items.curatedReason: 虚拟现实（VR）刺激可以调节球囊活动和前庭系统反应。这为VR在评估和治疗前庭功能障碍方面提供了神经生理学基础，但目前仍是机制探索阶段，距离直接临床应用还需要更多研究。
items.titleZh: 虚拟现实刺激调节球囊活动和前庭系统反应
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现虚拟现实刺激可以调节球囊活动和前庭系统反应。
items.curatedReasonEn: Virtual reality (VR) stimulation can modulate saccular activity and vestibular system responses. This provides a neurophysiological basis for VR in assessing and treating vestibular dysfunction, but it is currently in the mechanism exploration phase and requires further research before direct clinical application.
items.limitation: 本研究侧重于生理机制的探索，未评估其在临床康复中的实际疗效。
items.limitationEn: This study focuses on exploring physiological mechanisms and did not evaluate its actual efficacy in clinical rehabilitation.

items.title: Cervical vestibular-evoked myogenic potentials mediate the association between vestibular endolymphatic hydrops and clinical outcomes in acute low-tone sensorineural hearing loss | European Archives of Oto-Rhino-Laryngology
items.summary: A study found that cervical vestibular-evoked myogenic potentials mediate the association between vestibular endolymphatic hydrops and clinical outcomes in acute low-tone sensorineural hearing loss.
items.curatedReason: 颈部前庭诱发肌源性电位（cVEMPs）在前庭内淋巴积水与急性低频感音神经性听力损失的临床结局之间存在中介作用。这为理解前庭-听觉系统疾病的复杂机制提供了线索，对未来的诊断和干预策略有潜在影响，但对你目前的临床康复实践无直接指导意义。
items.titleZh: 颈部前庭诱发肌源性电位介导前庭内淋巴积水与急性低频感音神经性听力损失临床结局之间的关联
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现颈部前庭诱发肌源性电位在前庭内淋巴积水与急性低频感音神经性听力损失的临床结局之间存在中介作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: Cervical vestibular-evoked myogenic potentials (cVEMPs) mediate the association between vestibular endolymphatic hydrops and clinical outcomes in acute low-tone sensorineural hearing loss. This provides clues for understanding the complex mechanisms of vestibulo-auditory disorders, with potential implications for future diagnostic and intervention strategies, but no direct guidance for your current clinical rehabilitation practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为相关性分析，未能提供因果关系，且未涉及康复干预。
items.limitationEn: This study is a correlational analysis, does not provide causality, and does not involve rehabilitation interventions.

items.title: Betulinic Acid Promotes Motor Function Recovery After Spinal Cord Injury by Inhibiting Apoptosis Through Myc/NF-κB Signaling Pathway | Neurochemical Research
items.summary: A study found that Betulinic Acid promotes motor function recovery after spinal cord injury by inhibiting apoptosis through the Myc/NF-κB signaling pathway.
items.curatedReason: 桦木酸（Betulinic Acid）通过抑制Myc/NF-κB信号通路凋亡，促进脊髓损伤（SCI）后的运动功能恢复。这提供了SCI治疗的潜在生物学靶点，但目前主要停留在分子机制和动物实验阶段，距离临床转化和物理治疗干预尚远。
items.titleZh: 桦木酸通过抑制Myc/NF-κB信号通路凋亡促进脊髓损伤后运动功能恢复
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现桦木酸通过抑制Myc/NF-κB信号通路凋亡，促进脊髓损伤后运动功能的恢复。
items.curatedReasonEn: Betulinic Acid promotes motor function recovery after spinal cord injury (SCI) by inhibiting apoptosis through the Myc/NF-κB signaling pathway. This offers a potential biological target for SCI treatment, but it is currently primarily at the molecular mechanism and animal experiment stage, far from clinical translation and physical therapy interventions.
items.limitation: 本研究为基础分子机制探索，主要在动物模型中进行，临床转化仍需大量研究。
items.limitationEn: This study explores basic molecular mechanisms, primarily conducted in animal models, and extensive research is still needed for clinical translation.

items.title: Sports Medicine | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: Sports Medicine, a hybrid publishing model journal by Springer Nature, focuses on bridging science and practice in exercise, health, and sports performance, publishing definitive review articles on injury prevention, treatment, exercise for health, drugs in sport, and training/nutrition recommendations.
items.curatedReason: Springer Nature旗下的《运动医学》（Sports Medicine）期刊概述。作为专业期刊，它持续发表运动康复领域的重要研究，是你获取最新循证实践的可靠来源，但本条目本身仅为期刊介绍。
items.titleZh: 运动医学期刊介绍
items.summaryZh: Springer Nature旗下的《运动医学》期刊采用混合出版模式，旨在连接运动、健康和运动表现领域的科学与实践，发布有关损伤预防、治疗、健康运动、体育用药及训练/营养建议的权威综述文章。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is an overview of the journal "Sports Medicine" by Springer Nature. As a professional journal, it continuously publishes important research in sports rehabilitation, serving as a reliable source for you to access the latest evidence-based practices, but this entry itself is just a journal description.

items.title: Changes in publicly insured general practitioner consultations before and after workplace injury: interrupted time series by consultation duration and care plans in Australia | BMC Primary Care
items.summary: An interrupted time series study analyzed changes in publicly insured general practitioner consultations before and after workplace injury in Australia, examining consultation duration and care plans.
items.curatedReason: 本研究揭示了澳大利亚工伤患者在全科医生就诊模式上的变化，但并未直接评估物理治疗干预的效果。这提示你，在处理工伤案例时，需要更关注患者在整个医疗流程中的就诊频率和时长，这可能影响其整体康复进程。
items.titleZh: 澳大利亚工伤前后公共医保全科医生就诊变化：按就诊时长和护理计划划分的间断时间序列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项间断时间序列研究分析了澳大利亚工伤前后公共医保全科医生就诊模式的变化，考察了就诊时长和护理计划。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study revealed changes in general practitioner consultation patterns for workplace injury patients in Australia, but it did not directly assess the efficacy of physical therapy interventions. This suggests that when managing workplace injury cases, you need to pay more attention to patients' consultation frequency and duration within the overall healthcare process, which may impact their total rehabilitation progress.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性时间序列分析，揭示的是就诊模式变化，而非特定干预的效果。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational time series analysis, revealing changes in consultation patterns, not the effects of specific interventions.

items.title: Enhancing dynamic postural stability during gait in Parkinson's disease with textured insoles and auditory cue training: a randomized controlled trial study.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=27) in Parkinson's disease patients (Hoehn & Yahr stages 2.5-3) found that combining textured insoles with auditory cueing provided complementary benefits for enhancing dynamic postural stability during gait compared to textured insoles alone or progressive walking training.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验提示，在帕金森病患者步态训练中结合有纹理鞋垫和听觉提示可能比单独使用有纹理鞋垫或步行训练更能改善动态姿势稳定性。这为帕金森患者的平衡和步态干预提供了新的联合方案思路。
items.titleZh: 纹理鞋垫与听觉提示训练联合增强帕金森病患者步态动态姿势稳定性：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对帕金森病（Hoehn & Yahr 2.5-3 期）患者的随机对照试验（n=27）发现，与单独使用纹理鞋垫或渐进式步行训练相比，结合纹理鞋垫和听觉提示能更好地增强步态期间的动态姿势稳定性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that combining textured insoles with auditory cues during gait training for Parkinson's disease patients may improve dynamic postural stability more than textured insoles or walking training alone. This offers new insights for combined interventions for balance and gait in Parkinson's patients.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（27 例），且为单中心研究，结果的普适性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: The study had a small sample size (27 participants) and was single-center, which may limit the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Effectiveness of an individualised swimming and education programme for chronic low back pain (EduSwim): a randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: This RCT assessed an individualized swimming and education program for chronic low back pain compared to education alone, delivered via telehealth sessions over 8 weeks, with disability (RMDQ) as the primary outcome.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 为慢性非特异性腰痛的游泳干预提供了高质量证据。你可以依据这项研究，更有信心地将个体化游泳与教育方案纳入患者治疗计划。
items.titleZh: 个体化游泳与教育项目治疗慢性腰痛的有效性（EduSwim）：一项随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验评估了为期 8 周、通过远程物理治疗提供的个体化游泳与教育项目，与单纯教育相比，对慢性腰痛患者的有效性，主要结局是残疾程度（RMDQ）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT provides high-quality evidence for swimming intervention in chronic non-specific low back pain. You can use this research to more confidently integrate individualized swimming and education programs into patient treatment plans.
items.limitation: 研究结果可能受远程物理治疗交付方式影响，外推到面诊环境需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: Results may be influenced by the telehealth delivery method, and generalization to in-person settings should be cautious.

items.title: APTA Members Unite to Advance Payment Advocacy Via New SPARC Forum and Pledge
items.summary: APTA members are uniting to advance payment advocacy through the newly formed SPARC Forum and a pledge to support these efforts.
items.curatedReason: APTA 成立新论坛 SPARC，旨在推进支付倡导。这将直接影响你在美国市场上的物理治疗报销环境和执业收入，务必关注其后续动向。
items.titleZh: APTA 成员通过新 SPARC 论坛和承诺团结起来推动支付倡导。
items.summaryZh: APTA 成员正通过新成立的 SPARC 论坛及相关承诺，共同推进支付倡导工作。
items.curatedReasonEn: APTA has launched SPARC, a new forum to advance payment advocacy. This will directly impact the physical therapy reimbursement environment and your practice revenue in the US market, so be sure to monitor its developments.

items.title: A systematic review of current evidence on clinical outcomes of lumbar roll and modified SIMS manipulation techniques in sacroiliac joint dysfunction.
items.summary: This systematic review evaluated the clinical efficacy of lumbar roll and modified SIMS manipulation techniques for sacroiliac joint dysfunction, searching databases for studies published between January 2021 and December 2025.
items.curatedReason: 关于腰骶关节功能障碍的手法治疗，该系统综述应能帮你厘清腰椎翻滚和改良 SIMS 手法作为干预的最新证据，指导你的临床实践。
items.titleZh: 腰骶关节功能障碍中腰椎翻滚和改良 SIMS 手法治疗临床效果的系统综述。
items.summaryZh: 该系统综述评估了腰椎翻滚和改良 SIMS 手法治疗骶髂关节功能障碍的临床疗效，检索了 2021 年 1 月至 2025 年 12 月发表的相关研究。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review on manual therapy for sacroiliac joint dysfunction should clarify the latest evidence for lumbar roll and modified SIMS manipulation, guiding your clinical practice.
items.limitation: 研究仅纳入了 2021-2025 年间发表的文献，可能错过早期重要研究。
items.limitationEn: The review only included studies published between 2021 and 2025, potentially missing earlier significant research.

items.title: In adult patients with brainstem strokes, does dysphagia rehabilitation improve health-related outcomes compared to usual care for inpatients? A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis with 12 studies and 443 participants explored the effectiveness of dysphagia rehabilitation in inpatients with brainstem stroke, categorizing interventions into traditional swallowing therapy or device inclusion.
items.curatedReason: 脑干卒中住院患者的吞咽康复，目前看来，传统吞咽疗法或结合器械干预都有一定效果。作为系统综述和荟萃分析，它总结了 12 项研究，为选择干预方案提供了当前最佳证据。
items.titleZh: 脑干卒中成人住院患者的吞咽康复是否能改善健康相关结局？一项系统综述与荟萃分析。
items.summaryZh: 这项包含 12 项研究、443 名参与者的系统综述与荟萃分析探讨了脑干卒中住院患者吞咽康复的有效性，将干预措施分为传统吞咽疗法或器械辅助。
items.curatedReasonEn: For dysphagia rehabilitation in inpatients with brainstem stroke, both traditional swallowing therapy and device-inclusive interventions appear beneficial. As a systematic review and meta-analysis, it consolidates 12 studies, offering the best current evidence for intervention selection.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的异质性可能影响荟萃分析的整体结论。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity among included studies may affect the overall conclusions of the meta-analysis.

items.title: Responsiveness of the Arabic version of the lower extremity functional scale in individuals with lower extremity musculoskeletal disorders.
items.summary: This study examined the responsiveness of the Arabic version of the Lower Extremity Functional Scale (LEFS) in 74 participants with lower extremity musculoskeletal disorders, finding its change scores correlated well with other outcome measures.
items.curatedReason: LEFS 阿拉伯语版在下肢肌肉骨骼疾病患者中显示出良好的响应性。如果你服务阿拉伯语患者，该量表是一个可靠的评估工具。
items.titleZh: 下肢功能量表阿拉伯语版在下肢肌肉骨骼疾病患者中的响应性。
items.summaryZh: 这项研究评估了下肢功能量表（LEFS）阿拉伯语版在 74 名下肢肌肉骨骼疾病患者中的响应性，发现其分数变化与其他结局测量值关联良好。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Arabic version of LEFS demonstrates good responsiveness in individuals with lower extremity musculoskeletal disorders. If you serve Arabic-speaking patients, this scale is a reliable assessment tool.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，样本量中等，可能存在选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This was an observational study with a moderate sample size, and selection bias may be present.

items.title: Correlation of Motor-Task Related Brain Activation Changes With Motor Performance Changes Induced by Constraint-Induced Therapy After Stroke.
items.summary: This study evaluated motor-task related brain activation changes and their relationship to functional recovery in 42 hemiparetic stroke participants undergoing CIMT during subacute and chronic periods, using fMRI and WMFT.
items.curatedReason: CIMT 对卒中偏瘫患者的疗效我们已知晓，但这项观察研究进一步提示，其效果可能与特定的脑激活模式改变有关。虽然是小样本（42 人）观察研究，但为理解 CIMT 的作用机制提供了神经影像学线索。
items.titleZh: 卒中后限制性运动疗法（CIMT）引起的运动任务相关脑激活变化与运动表现变化的关联。
items.summaryZh: 这项研究评估了 42 名偏瘫卒中患者在亚急性期和慢性期接受 CIMT 治疗期间，运动任务相关脑激活变化与功能恢复的关联，使用了 fMRI 和 WMFT 进行评估。
items.curatedReasonEn: While CIMT's efficacy for hemiparetic stroke patients is established, this observational study suggests its benefits may correlate with specific changes in brain activation patterns. Though a small-sample (42 participants) observational study, it offers neuroimaging clues to the mechanisms underpinning CIMT.
items.limitation: 研究的 fMRI 分析结果可能存在多重比较问题，且样本量相对较小。
items.limitationEn: The fMRI analysis results may have multiple comparison issues, and the sample size is relatively small.

items.title: Eccentric cycling for ACL-R rehabilitation: A masterclass.
items.summary: This masterclass discusses the increasing use of eccentric training in ACL-R rehabilitation, noting its potential benefits for quadriceps strength and return-to-sport performance, while emphasizing gradual and individualized implementation.
items.curatedReason: 关于 ACL 重建术后离心训练的实施，这篇综述提醒你关注早期离心训练的潜在益处。在考虑将其纳入康复计划时，要注重个体化和循序渐进。
items.titleZh: ACL 重建术后康复中的离心骑行：专家课程。
items.summaryZh: 这篇专家课程讨论了离心训练在 ACL 重建术后康复中日益增长的应用，指出其对股四头肌力量和重返运动表现的潜在益处，同时强调应循序渐进和个体化实施。
items.curatedReasonEn: Regarding the implementation of eccentric training after ACL reconstruction, this review highlights the potential benefits of early eccentric training. When considering incorporating it into rehabilitation, focus on individualization and gradual progression.
items.limitation: 本文性质更偏向专家观点或述评，缺乏系统性证据整合。
items.limitationEn: This article is more akin to an expert opinion or commentary, lacking systematic evidence integration.
items.journal: Physical therapy in sport : official journal of the Association of Chartered Physiotherapists in Sports Medicine

items.title: Authors' reply to: letter to the editor: occupational therapy at home E-rehabilitation (OTHER): a feasibility study of post-stroke intervention for transition to home.
items.summary: This is an author's reply to a letter concerning a feasibility study on occupational therapy at home e-rehabilitation (OTHER) for post-stroke transition to home.
items.curatedReason: 这篇是作者回复信，不是原创研究，但涉及远程康复的可行性，可作背景参考。
items.titleZh: 作者回复：关于“居家职业治疗电子康复（OTHER）——卒中后居家过渡可行性研究”的致编辑信
items.summaryZh: 这篇是作者对一封关于卒中后居家过渡的居家职业治疗电子康复（OTHER）可行性研究的致编辑信的回复。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is an author's reply, not original research, but it touches upon the feasibility of telerehabilitation and can be considered for background context.

items.title: From mechanics to mobilization: a biomechanically-informed rehabilitation framework for cesarean-related scars | BMC Women's Health
items.summary: A systematic review proposed a biomechanically-informed rehabilitation framework for cesarean-related scars, integrating strategies for both abdominal wall and uterine scars, addressing a lack of standardization in current approaches.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述为剖宫产相关瘢痕康复提供了一个基于生物力学信息的新框架，整合了浅层和深层瘢痕的康复策略。这提示你在评估和治疗剖宫产瘢痕时，需要超越传统表层处理，考虑更深层的生物力学影响。
items.titleZh: 从力学到动员：剖宫产相关瘢痕的生物力学康复框架：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述提出了一个基于生物力学信息的剖宫产相关瘢痕康复框架，整合了腹壁和子宫瘢痕的康复策略，以解决当前方法中缺乏标准化的不足。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review offers a new biomechanically-informed rehabilitation framework for cesarean-related scars, integrating strategies for both superficial and deep scars. This suggests that when evaluating and treating cesarean scars, you need to look beyond traditional superficial treatments and consider deeper biomechanical impacts.
items.limitation: 此为基于现有文献的框架性综述，缺乏统一的治疗方案和疗效对比数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a framework review based on existing literature, lacking standardized treatment protocols and comparative efficacy data.

items.title: Kinesiotaping May Reduce Early Swelling After Knee Replacement, states study
items.summary: A randomized study of 136 patients found that adding kinesiotaping to standard rehabilitation after total knee arthroplasty reduced early postoperative knee swelling and led to a modest improvement in knee flexion.
items.curatedReason: 肌内效贴布（Kinesiotaping）辅助标准康复可能减少全膝关节置换术（TKA）早期肿胀并轻度改善屈膝活动度。这是一个低成本的辅助手段，但效应量有限，别期望它能彻底改变术后恢复，应作为短期支持性干预。
items.titleZh: 研究称肌内效贴布可减少膝关节置换术后早期肿胀
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 136 名患者的随机研究发现，在全膝关节置换术后标准康复中增加肌内效贴布治疗，可减少术后早期膝关节肿胀，并使膝关节屈曲度得到适度改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: Kinesiotaping as an adjunct to standard rehabilitation may reduce early swelling and modestly improve knee flexion after total knee arthroplasty (TKA). This is a low-cost adjunctive measure, but its effect size is limited; do not expect it to fundamentally alter postoperative recovery. It should be considered a short-term supportive intervention.
items.limitation: 研究强调需要进一步探究这些益处是否持续并改善以患者为中心的结局。
items.limitationEn: The study noted further research is needed to determine if these benefits persist and improve patient-centered outcomes.

items.title: Effects of square-step exercise on fear of falling in older patients with ischemic stroke: a cluster randomized controlled trial | BMC Geriatrics
items.summary: A cluster randomized controlled trial involving 62 older ischemic stroke patients found that square-step exercise improved fall fear, balance, and activities of daily living, and reduced fall risk.
items.curatedReason: 方步运动（square-step exercise）能有效降低老年缺血性卒中患者的跌倒恐惧。这个 RCT 证实了特定运动干预在改善心理结局方面的潜力，可作为神经康复中预防跌倒的补充手段。
items.titleZh: 方步运动对老年缺血性卒中患者跌倒恐惧的影响：一项集群随机对照试验
